=F0=9F= =93=8B CHECKLIST HO=C3=80N TH=C3=80NH:


=E2=9C=85 P= hase 1: Foundation

- server/v2/config/env.js (t=E1=BB= =B1 =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng nh=E1=BA=ADn di=E1=BB=87n m=C3=B4i tr=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Dn= g)

- package.= json scripts (dev:v2, test:env, db:verify)


=E2=9C= =85 Phase 2: Video Scanner

- server/v2/core/scanner.wor= ker.js (worker threads v=E1=BB=9Bi filtering)

- server/= v2/services/scanner.service.js (qu=E1=BA=A3n l=C3=BD worker + DB)

- server/v2/controllers/scanner.controller.js

=

- server/v2/routes/scanner.routes.js

=E2= =9C=85 Phase 3: Frontend Modularization

- client/public/js/modules/player.js

1. Danh s=C3=A1ch =C4=91=E1=BA=A7y =C4=91=E1=BB=A7 T= =E1=BA=A4T C=E1=BA=A2 c=C3=A1c file c=E1=BA=A7n c=C3=B3 trong d=E1=BB=B1 = =C3=A1n (t=E1=BB=AB Phase 1-3)

1.2. server/v2/config/env.js<= /code> (Nh=E1=BA=ADn di=E1=BB=87n m=C3=B4i tr=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Dng)

Bash
cat << 'EOF' &=
gt; server/v2/config/env.js
const os =3D require('os');
const path =3D require('path');
const fs =3D require('fs');

class EnvironmentV2 {
    constructor() {
        this.platform =3D os.platform();
        this.isTermux =3D process.env.PREFIX && process.env.PREFIX.=
includes('com.termux');
        this.isWSL =3D !!process.env.WSL_DISTRO_NAME;
        this.homeDir =3D os.homedir();
       =20
        // Port linh ho=E1=BA=A1t: =C6=AFu ti=C3=AAn bi=E1=BA=BFn m=C3=B4i =
tr=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Dng -> Production -> M=E1=BA=B7c =C4=91=E1=BB=8Bnh 30=
01
        this.port =3D process.env.PORT_V2 || (process.env.NODE_ENV =3D=3D=
=3D 'production' ? 3000 : 3001);
       =20
        // DB Path tr=E1=BB=8F ng=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3c v=E1=BB=81 th=C6=B0 m=E1=
=BB=A5c data c=C5=A9
        this.dbPath =3D path.resolve(__dirname, '../../../data/database.db');
       =20
        this.defaultScanPaths =3D this.detectScanPaths();
    }

    detectScanPath=
s() {
        let candidates =3D [];

        if (this.isTermux) {
            // Mobile: Qu=C3=A9t b=E1=BB=99 nh=E1=BB=9B trong
            candidates.push(path.join(this.homeDir, 'storage', 'shared'));
        }=20
        else if (this.platform =3D=3D=3D 'win32') {
            // Windows: =C6=AFu ti=C3=AAn User Original
            const originalPath =3D 'C:\\Users\\=
Original';
            if (fs.existsSync(originalP=
ath)) candidates.push(originalPath);
            else candidates.push(this.h=
omeDir);
        }
        else if (this.isWSL) {
            // WSL: =C6=AFu ti=C3=AAn User Original (Mount t=E1=BB=AB C)
            const wslPath =3D '/mnt/c/Users/Ori=
ginal';
            if (fs.existsSync(wslPath))=
 candidates.push(wslPath);
            else candidates.push(this.h=
omeDir);
        }
        else {
            // Linux/Mac kh=C3=A1c
            candidates.push(this.homeDir);
        }

        return candidates;
    }
}
module.exports =3D new EnvironmentV2();
EOF
<= !---->

1.3. server/v2/core/database.= js (K=E1=BA=BFt n=E1=BB=91i Database)

<= code-block _nghost-ng-c4235442499=3D"" class=3D"ng-tns-c4235442499-280 ng-s= tar-inserted" style=3D"">
Bash
cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/cor=
e/database.js
const sqlite3 =3D require('sqlite3').ver=
bose();
const { open } =3D require('sqlite');
const env =3D require('../config/env');
const fs =3D require('fs');
const path =3D require('path');

let dbInstance =3D null;

async function connectDB() {
    if (dbInstance) return dbInstance;

    // =C4=90=E1=BA=A3m b=E1=BA=A3o th=C6=B0 m=E1=BB=A5c ch=E1=BB=A9a DB t=
=E1=BB=93n t=E1=BA=A1i
    const dbDir =3D path.dirname(env.dbPath);
    if (!fs.existsSync(dbDir)) {
        fs.mkdirSync(dbDir, { recursive: true<=
/span> });
    }

    try {
        dbInstance =3D await open({
            filename: env.dbPath,
            driver: sqlite3.Database
        });
       =20
        // B=E1=BA=ADt WAL mode =C4=91=E1=BB=83 t=E1=BB=91i =C6=B0u hi=E1=
=BB=87u n=C4=83ng =C4=91=E1=BB=8Dc/ghi song song
        await dbInstance.run('PRAGMA journal_mo=
de =3D WAL;');
        await dbInstance.run('PRAGMA synchronou=
s =3D NORMAL;');
       =20
        return dbInstance;
    } catch (e) {
        console.error("=E2=9D=8C DB Connection =
Error:", e);
        throw e;
    }
}

module.exports =3D { connectDB };
EOF
<= !---->

1.4. server/v2/core/schema.js= (Qu=E1=BA=A3n l=C3=BD Migration)

Bash
ca=
t << 'EOF' > server/v2/core/sch=
ema.js
const dbCore =3D require('./database');

// =C4=90=E1=BB=8Bnh ngh=C4=A9a c=E1=BA=A5u tr=C3=BAc chu=E1=BA=A9n V5.0
const DEFINITIONS =3D {
    videos: `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS videos (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
        filename TEXT NOT NULL,
        path TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
        size INTEGER,
        duration INTEGER,
        thumbnail_path TEXT,
        is_cloud INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
        created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
        updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    )`,
    playback_history: `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS playback_history (
        video_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
        position INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
        duration INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
        progress REAL DEFAULT 0,
        updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    )`,
    thumbnails: `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS thumbnails (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
        video_id INTEGER UNIQUE,
        path TEXT,
        source_type TEXT DEFAULT 'local'=
,
        generated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    )`,
    settings: `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS settings (
        key TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
        value TEXT,
        updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    )`,
    devices: `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS devices (
        id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
        name TEXT,
        last_seen DATETIME,
        type TEXT
    )`
};

async function ensureColumn(db, table, =
column, definition) {
    try {
        const columns =3D await db.all(`PRAGMA table_info(${table})`);
        const exists =3D columns.some(c =3D> c.name =3D=3D=3D column);
        if (!exists) {
            console.log(`=F0=9F=94=A7 Migrating: Adding column '${column}' to '${table=
}'...`);
            await db.run(`ALTER TABLE ${table=
} ADD COLUMN ${column} ${definition}`);
        }
    } catch (e) {
        // B=E1=BB=8F qua l=E1=BB=97i n=E1=BA=BFu b=E1=BA=A3ng ch=C6=B0a t=
=E1=BB=93n t=E1=BA=A1i (s=E1=BA=BD =C4=91=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3c t=E1=BA=A1o =E1=
=BB=9F b=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bc sau)
    }
}

async function verifyAndMigrate() {
    const db =3D await dbCore.connectDB();
    if (!db) return { success: false, err=
or: "No DB Connection" };

    try {
        // 1. T=E1=BA=A1o b=E1=BA=A3ng n=E1=BA=BFu ch=C6=B0a c=C3=B3
        for (const [table, sql] of Obje=
ct.entries(DEFINITIONS)) {
            await db.run(sql);
        }

        // 2. Migration: Ki=E1=BB=83m tra v=C3=A0 th=C3=AAm c=E1=BB=99t thi=
=E1=BA=BFu (cho DB c=C5=A9)
        await ensureColumn(db, 'videos',=
 'is_cloud', 'INTEGER DEFAULT 0');
        await ensureColumn(db, 'videos',=
 'thumbnail_path', 'TEXT');
        await ensureColumn(db, 'videos',=
 'duration', 'INTEGER');
        await ensureColumn(db, 'thumbnails', 'source_type', "TEXT DEFAULT 'local'");

        return { success: true };
    } catch (e) {
        console.error("=E2=9D=8C Schema Migrati=
on Failed:", e);
        return { success: false, error: e.message };
    }
}

module.exports =3D { verifyAndMigrate };
EOF
<= !---->

=F0=9F=9F=A1 NH=C3=93M 2: SERVER = LOGIC & SCANNER (PHASE 2)

2.1. server/v2/core/scanner.worker.js (Worker T= hread)

cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/core/scanner.worker.js
const { parentPort, workerData } =3D require('w=
orker_threads');
const fs =3D require('fs');
const path =3D require('path');
const ffmpeg =3D require('fluent-ffmpeg'=
);

// --- C=E1=BA=A4U H=C3=8CNH B=E1=BB=98 L=E1=BB=8CC ---
const VIDEO_EXTENSIONS =3D new Set(['.mp4', '.mkv', =
'.avi', '.mov', '.wmv', '.flv', '.webm', '.m4v']);

// Danh s=C3=A1ch =C4=91en: B=E1=BB=8F qua tuy=E1=BB=87t =C4=91=E1=BB=91i
const IGNORED_NAMES =3D new Set([
    'AppData', 'Application Data', 'Local Settings'<=
/span>, 'Start Menu', 'Cookies', 'NetHood', <=
span class=3D"hljs-string">'PrintHood', =
'Recent', 'SendTo', 'Templates',
    '$RECYCLE.BIN', 'System Volume Information', 'Re=
covery', 'Config.Msi', 'Windows', 'Program Fi=
les', 'Program Files (x86)',
    'node_modules', '.git', '.vscode', '.idea', 'build', 'dist',
    'Android', 'libs', 'obj', 'bin',
    'Temp', =
'Tmp', 'Cache', 'logs',
    'OneDriveTemp', '.Trash-1000'
]);

const THUMB_DIR =3D path.resolve(__dirname, '..=
/../../data/thumbnails');
if (!fs.existsSync(THUMB_DIR)) fs.mkdir=
Sync(THUMB_DIR, { recursive: true });

let isCancelled =3D false;
let stats =3D { scanned: 0, skippedDir=
s: [], videosFound: 0 };

async function walkDir(dir) {
    if (isCancelled) return;

    try {
        const files =3D await fs.promises.readdir(dir, { withFileTypes: true });
       =20
        for (const file of files) {
            if (isCancelled) break;
            const fullPath =3D path.join(dir, file.name);

            // 1. KI=E1=BB=82M TRA B=E1=BB=8E QUA
            if (file.name.startsWith('.') || IGNORED_NAMES.has(file.name)) {
                continue;
            }

            if (file.isDirectory()) {
                await walkDir(fullPath);
            } else if (file.isFile()) {
                const ext =3D path.extname(file.name).toLowerCase();
                if (VIDEO_EXTENSIONS.ha=
s(ext)) {
                    await processVideo(fullPath, file.name);
                }
            }

            // 2. HEARTBEAT
            stats.scanned++;
            if (stats.scanned % 50 =3D=
=3D=3D 0) {
                parentPort.postMessage({ type=
: 'heartbeat', count: stats.scann=
ed });
            }
        }
    } catch (err) {
        // L=E1=BB=97i quy=E1=BB=81n truy c=E1=BA=ADp -> B=E1=BB=8F qua
    }
}

async function processVideo(filePath, f=
ileName) {
    stats.videosFound++;
   =20
    // Metadata Extract (FFprobe)
    const metadata =3D await new Promise((resolve) =3D> {
        const timer =3D setTimeout(() =3D> resolve({ duration: 0, width:=
 0, height: 0 }), 5000);
        ffmpeg.ffprobe(filePath, (err, data) =3D> {
            clearTimeout(timer);
            if (err) resolve({ duration=
: 0, width: 0, height: 0 });
            else {
                const stream =3D data.streams.find(s =3D> s.codec_type =
=3D=3D=3D 'video');
                resolve({
                    duration: data.format.duration || 0,
                    width: stream ? stream.width : 0,
                    height: stream ? stream.height : 0
                });
            }
        });
    });

    // Thumbnail Generation
    const safeName =3D fileName.replace(/[^a-z0-9]/gi, '_').toLowerCase();
    const thumbName =3D `thumb_${safeName}_${Date.now()}.jpg`;
   =20
    await new Promise((resolve) =3D> {
        const timer =3D setTimeout(() =3D> resolve(false), 7000);
        ffmpeg(filePath)
            .screenshots({
                timestamps: ['15%'],
                filename: thumbName,
                folder: THUMB_DIR,
                size: '320x180'
            })
            .on('end', () =3D> { clea=
rTimeout(timer); resolve(true); })
            .on('error', () =3D> { cl=
earTimeout(timer); resolve(false); });
    });

    const size =3D (await fs.promises.stat(filePath)).size;

    parentPort.postMessage({
        type: 'video_processed',
        data: {
            filename: fileName,
            path: filePath,
            size: size,
            duration: metadata.duration,
            thumbnail_path: `thumbnails/${thu=
mbName}`,
            is_cloud: 0
        }
    });
}

// MAIN EXECUTION
(async () =3D> {
    try {
        const scanPaths =3D workerData.paths || [];
        parentPort.postMessage({ type:=
 'log', message: `=F0=9F=9A=80 Worker b=
=E1=BA=AFt =C4=91=E1=BA=A7u qu=C3=A9t s=C3=A2u t=E1=BB=AB: ${scanPaths.join(', ')}` });

        for (const scanPath of scanPath=
s) {
            if (isCancelled) break;
            if (fs.existsSync(scanPath)=
) await walkDir(scanPath);
            else parentPort.postMessage=
({ type: '=
error', message: `Path not found: ${sc=
anPath}` });
        }

        parentPort.postMessage({ type:=
 'done', stats: stats });
    } catch (e) {
        parentPort.postMessage({ type:=
 'error', message: e.message });
    }
})();

parentPort.on('message', (msg) =3D> {=
 if (msg =3D=3D=3D 'STOP') isCancelled =3D true; });
EOF
<= !---->

2.2. server/v2/services/scann= er.service.js

Bash
cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/services/scanner.service.js
const { Worker } =3D require('worker_threads');
const path =3D require('path');
const dbCore =3D require('../core/database');
const env =3D require('../config/env');

class ScannerService {
    constructor() {
        this.worker =3D null;
        this.isScanning =3D false;
        this.io =3D null;
    }

    setSocket(io) { this.io =3D io; }

    async getScanP=
aths() {
        const db =3D await dbCore.connectDB();
        try {
            const setting =3D await db.get("SEL=
ECT value FROM settings WHERE key =3D 'scan_paths'");
            if (setting && sett=
ing.value) return JSON.parse(setting.v=
alue);
        } catch(e) {}
        return env.defaultScanPaths ||=
 [];
    }

    async startSca=
n() {
        if (this.isScanning) return;
        this.isScanning =3D true;
       =20
        const paths =3D await this.getScanPaths();
        const db =3D await dbCore.connectDB();

        console.log("=F0=9F=93=A1 Scanner Servi=
ce: Kh=E1=BB=9Fi =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng...");
        if(this.io) this.io.emit('scan_start', { paths });

        this.worker =3D new Worker(path.join(__dirname, '../core/scanner.worker.js'), {
            workerData: { paths }
        });

        this.worker.on('message', async =
(msg) =3D> {
            if (msg.type =3D=3D=3D 'heartbeat') {
                process.stdout.write(`\r=F0=9F=92=93 Scanning... Checked: <=
span class=3D"hljs-variable">${msg.count} objects...`);
            }
            else if (msg.type =3D=3D=3D 'log') {
                console.log(`\n[INFO] ${msg.m=
essage}`);
            }
            else if (msg.type =3D=3D=3D 'error') {
                console.error(`\n[ERROR] ${ms=
g.message}`);
            }
            else if (msg.type =3D=3D=3D 'video_pro=
cessed') {
                const v =3D msg.data;
                process.stdout.write(`\r=F0=9F=8E=A5 Found: ${v.filename.substring(0, 40).padEnd(45)}`);=20
               =20
                try {
                    await db.run(`
                        INSERT INTO videos (filename, path, size, duration,=
 thumbnail_path, is_cloud, updated_at)
                        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
                        ON CONFLICT(path) DO UPDATE SET=20
                            size=3Dexcluded.size,=20
                            duration=3Dexcluded.duration,
                            thumbnail_path=3Dexcluded.thumbnail_path,
                            updated_at=3DCURRENT_TIMESTAMP
                    `, [v.filename, v.path, v.size, v.duration, v.thumbnail=
_path, v.is_cloud]);

                    if (this.io) {
                        this.io.emit('scan_prog=
ress', { file: v.filename });
                        const saved =3D await db.get("SELECT * FROM videos WHERE path =3D ?", v.path);
                        this.io.emit('video_fou=
nd', saved);
                    }
                } catch (e) { console.error("\n=
DB Error:", e.message); }
            }
            else if (msg.type =3D=3D=3D 'done') {
                console.log(`\n\n=E2=9C=85 QU=C3=89T HO=C3=80N T=E1=BA=A4T!=
`);
                console.log(`   - Video t=C3=ACm th=E1=BA=A5y: ${msg.stats.videosFound}`);
                this.finishScan();
            }
        });

        this.worker.on('error', (err) =
=3D> {
            console.error("\n=E2=9D=8C Worker C=
rash:", err);
            this.finishScan();
        });

        this.worker.on('exit', (code) =
=3D> {
            if (code !=3D=3D 0) console=
.error(`\nWorker stopped with exit cod=
e ${code}`);
            this.finishScan();
        });
    }

    stopScan() {
        if (this.worker) {
            this.worker.postMessage('STOP');
            setTimeout(() =3D> {
                if(this.worker) this.wo=
rker.terminate();
                this.finishScan();
            }, 1000);
        }
    }

    finishScan() {
        this.isScanning =3D false;
        this.worker =3D null;
        if(this.io) this.io.emit('scan_complete', { status: 'done' });
    }
   =20
    getStatus() { return { isScanning: thi=
s.isScanning }; }
}

module.exports =3D new ScannerService();
EOF
<= !---->

2.3. server/v2/controllers/sc= anner.controller.js

Bash
<= /span>
cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/controllers/scanner.co=
ntroller.js
const scannerService =3D require('../services/s=
canner.service');
const dbCore =3D require('../core/database');

exports.startScan =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        await scannerService.startScan();
        res.json({ success: true, messa=
ge: "Scan started in background" });
    } catch (e) { res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: e.message }); }
};

exports.stopScan =3D (req, res) =3D> {
    scannerService.stopScan();
    res.json({ success: true, message: =
"Stop command sent" });
};

exports.getStatus =3D (req, res) =3D> {
    res.json(scannerService.getStatus());
};

exports.updateConfig =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    const { paths } =3D req.body;
    if (!Array.isArray(paths)) return res.status(400).json({ error: "Paths must be an array" });
    try {
        const db =3D await dbCore.connectDB();
        await db.run(`INSERT OR REPLACE INTO settings (key, value) VALUES (=
'scan_paths', ?)`, [JSON.stringify(paths=
)]);
        res.json({ success: true, paths=
 });
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};
EOF
<= !---->

const controller =3D require('../controllers/sc=
anner.controller');

router.post('/start', controller.startSc=
an);
router.post('/stop', controller.stopScan=
);
router.get('/status', controller.getStat=
us);

Config);

2.5. server/v2/controllers/vi= deo.controller.js

Bash
<= /span>
cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/controllers/video.cont=
roller.js
const dbCore =3D require('../core/database');
const fs =3D require('fs');

exports.getAllVideos =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await dbCore.connectDB();
        const videos =3D await db.all(`
            SELECT v.*, ph.progress, ph.position=20
            FROM videos v=20
            LEFT JOIN playback_history ph ON v.id =3D ph.video_id=20
            ORDER BY v.updated_at DESC
        `);
        res.json(videos);
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.getContinueWatching =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await dbCore.connectDB();
        const videos =3D await db.all(`
            SELECT v.*, ph.progress, ph.position
            FROM videos v
            INNER JOIN playback_history ph ON v.id =3D ph.video_id
            WHERE ph.progress > 5 AND ph.progress < 95
            ORDER BY ph.updated_at DESC LIMIT 10
        `);
        res.json(videos);
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.getPlayback =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await dbCore.connectDB();
        const row =3D await db.get('SELECT posi=
tion, progress FROM playback_history WHERE video_id =3D ?', req.para=
ms.id);
        res.json(row || { position: 0 });
    } catch (e) { res.json({ position: 0 }); }
};

exports.savePlayback =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const { position, duration } =3D req.body;
        const progress =3D duration > 0 ? (position / duration) * 100 : =
0;
        const db =3D await dbCore.connectDB();
        await db.run(`INSERT OR REPLACE INTO playback_history (video_id, po=
sition, duration, progress, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, CURRENT_TIMESTA=
MP)`, [req.params.id, position, duration, progress]);
        res.json({ success: true });
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.streamVideo =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await dbCore.connectDB();
        const video =3D await db.get('SELECT pa=
th FROM videos WHERE id =3D ?', req.params.id);
        if (!video || !fs.existsSync(vi=
deo.path)) return res.status(404).send=
('File not found');
       =20
        const stat =3D fs.statSync(vid=
eo.path);
        const fileSize =3D stat.size;
        const range =3D req.headers.range;

        if (range) {
            const parts =3D range.replace(/bytes=3D/, "").split("-");
            const start =3D parseInt(parts[0], 10);
            const end =3D parts[1] ? parseInt(parts[1], 10) : fileSize - 1;
            const chunksize =3D (end - start) + 1;
            const file =3D fs.createReadStream(video.path, { start, end });
            res.writeHead(206, { 'Content-Range=
': `bytes ${start}-${end}/${fileSize}<=
/span>`, 'Accept-Ranges': 'bytes', 'Content-Length'<=
/span>: chunksize, 'Content-Type': 'video/mp4' });
            file.pipe(res);
        } else {
            res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Lengt=
h': fileSize, 'Content-Type': 'video/mp4' });
            fs.createReadStream(video.path).pipe(res);
        }
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).end(); }
};
EOF
<= !---->

cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/routes/video.routes.js
const express =3D require('express');

deo.controller');

router.get('/', controller.getAllVideos)=
;
router.get('/continue', controller.getCo=
ntinueWatching);
router.get('/:id/playback', controller.g=
etPlayback);
router.post('/:id/playback', controller.=
savePlayback);
router.get('/:id/stream', controller.str=
eamVideo);

module.exports =3D router;

2.7. server/v2/index.js (Main Entry)

Bash
cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/index.js
const express =3D require('express');
const http =3D require('http');
const cors =3D require('cors');
const path =3D require('path');
const { Server } =3D require("socket.io"=
);
const env =3D require('./config/env');
const schema =3D require('./core/schema'=
);

const app =3D express();
const server =3D http.createServer(app);
const io =3D new Server(server, { cors: { origin: "*" } });

app.use(cors());
app.use(express.json());

// Serve Static Files
app.use(express.static(path.resolve(__dirname, =
'../../client/public')));
app.use('/thumbnails', express.static(pa=
th.resolve(__dirname, '../../data/thumbnails')));

async function startServer() {
    console.log("=E2=8F=B3 V2 Boot: Database Ch=
eck...");
    const dbStatus =3D await schema.verifyAndMigrate();
    if (!dbStatus.success) {=20
        console.error("=E2=9D=8C DB Error");=20
        process.exit(1);=20
    }

    // Services
    const scannerService =3D require('./service=
s/scanner.service');
    scannerService.setSocket(io);

    // Routes
    app.use('/api/v2/scanner', require(<=
span class=3D"hljs-string">'./routes/scanner.routes'));
    app.use('/api/videos', require('./routes/video.routes'));
   =20
    // Network Info Endpoint
    app.get('/api/network-info', (req, r=
es) =3D> {
         const { networkInterfaces } =3D require('os');
         const nets =3D networkInterfaces();
         let ip =3D 'localhost';
         for (const name of Object.keys=
(nets)) {
             for (const net of nets[nam=
e]) {
                 if (net.family =3D=3D=
=3D 'IPv4' && !net.internal) { i=
p =3D net.address; break; }
             }
         }
         res.json({ url: `http://${ip}=
:${env.port}` });
    });

    // Socket
    io.on('connection', (socket) =3D>=
 {
        socket.on('mpv_command', (data) =
=3D> socket.broadcast.emit('player_status', data));
    });

    server.listen(env.port, () =3D> {
        console.log(`=F0=9F=9A=80 DRAM SERVER V2 RUNNING ON PORT ${env.port}`);
    });
}

startServer();
EOF
<= !---->

=F0=9F=94=B5 NH=C3=93M 3: FRONTEN= D (PHASE 3)

3.1. client/public/js/modules/api.js

Bash
cat << 'EOF' > client/public=
/js/modules/api.js
const API_BASE =3D '/api';

export async function fetchAllVideos() {
    const res =3D await fetch(`${API_BASE}/videos`);
    return await res.json();
}

export async function fetchContinueWatching() {
    const res =3D await fetch(`${API_BASE}/videos/continue`);
    return await res.json();
}

export async function fetchNetworkInfo() {
    const res =3D await fetch(`${API_BASE}/network-info`);
    return await res.json();
}

export async function startScan() {
    return await fetch(`${API_BASE}/v2/scanner/start`, { method: 'POST' });
}

export async function getPlaybackPos(id) {
    try {
        const res =3D await fetch(`${API_BASE=
}/videos/${id}/playback`);
        return await res.json();
    } catch { return { position: 0 }; =
}
}

export async function savePlaybackPos(id, position, duration) {
    if (!duration) return;
    await fetch(`${API_BASE}/videos/${id}/playback`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ position, duration })
    });
}
EOF
<= !---->

3.2. client/public/js/modules= /ui.js

Bash
cat << 'EOF' > client/public/js/modules/ui.js
const PLACEHOLDER_IMG =3D "data:image/svg+xml,%=
3Csvg xmlns=3D'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox=3D'0 0 16 9' style=3D'ba=
ckground:%231e293b'%3E%3Ctext x=3D'50%25' y=3D'50%25' fill=3D'%23475569' te=
xt-anchor=3D'middle' dominant-baseline=3D'middle' font-weight=3D'bold'%3EDR=
AM%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E";

export fu=
nction renderGrid(videos, containerId, selectionSet, actions) {
    const grid =3D document.getElementById(containerId);
    if (!grid) return;
    grid.innerHTML =3D '';

    if (!videos || videos.length =3D=3D=
=3D 0) {
        if (containerId =3D=3D=3D 'video-grid') {
            grid.innerHTML =3D '<div style=
=3D"color:#aaa;text-align:center;padding:50px;grid-column:1/-1;">Kho tr=
=E1=BB=91ng.</div>';
        }
        return;
    }

    const fragment =3D document.createDocumentFragment();
    videos.forEach(video =3D> {
        const card =3D createCard(video, selectionSet, actions);
        fragment.appendChild(card);
    });
    grid.appendChild(fragment);
}

function createCard(video, selectionSet=
, actions) {
    const card =3D document.createElement('div'=
);
    const isSelected =3D selectionSet.has(video.id);
    card.className =3D `video-card ${isSelect=
ed ? 'selected' : ''}`;
    card.dataset.id =3D video.id;

    const thumb =3D video.thumbnail_path || PLACEHOLDER_IMG;
    const size =3D video.size ? (video.size / 1048576).toFixed(1) + ' MB' : '';
    const progressHtml =3D video.progress > 0=20
        ? `<div style=3D"position:absolute;b=
ottom:0;left:0;height:3px;background:#ef4444;width:${video.progress}%"></div>`=20
        : '';

    card.innerHTML =3D `
        <div class=3D"thumb-wrapper"&=
gt;
            <img src=3D"${thumb}" onerror=3D"th=
is.src=3D'${PLACEHOLDER_IMG}'" =
loading=3D"lazy">
            ${progressHtml}
            <div class=3D"select-overlay"></div>
        </div>
        <div class=3D"card-info">
            <div class=3D"card-title"=
>${video.filename}</div>
            <div class=3D"card-meta"&=
gt;
                <span>${size}<=
;/span>
                ${video.is_cloud ? '<i cla=
ss=3D"fa-solid fa-cloud"></i>' : ''}
            </div>
        </div>
    `;

    card.onclick =3D (e) =3D> {
        if (e.target.closest('.select-overlay') || e.shiftKey) {
            e.stopPropagation();
            actions.onToggleSelect(video.id);
        } else {
            actions.onPlay(video);
        }
    };

    return card;
}

export fu=
nction updateScanStatus(msg, isScanning) {
    const el =3D document.getElementById('scan-=
status');
    if (el) el.textContent =3D msg;
   =20
    const icon =3D isScanning ? '<i class=3D=
"fa-solid fa-spinner fa-spin"></i>' : '<i class=3D"fa-solid fa-radar"></i>';
    const btnM =3D document.getElementById('btn=
-scan-mobile');
    if (btnM) btnM.innerHTML =3D icon;
}

export fu=
nction toggleSection(id, show) {
    const el =3D document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) {
        if (show) el.classList.remove(<=
span class=3D"hljs-string">'hidden');
        else el.classList.add('hidden');
    }
}

export fu=
nction updateSelectionVisuals(selectedSet) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.video-card').forEach(card =3D> {
        const id =3D parseInt(card.dataset.id);
        if (selectedSet.has(id)) card.c=
lassList.add('selected');
        else card.classList.remove('selected');
    });
   =20
    const count =3D selectedSet.size;
    const bar =3D document.getElementById('expo=
rt-bar');
    const counter =3D document.getElementById('=
bar-count');
    const navCounter =3D document.getElementById('count-selected');
   =20
    if (counter) counter.textContent =
=3D count;
    if (navCounter) navCounter.textCont=
ent =3D count;
   =20
    if (count > 0 && bar) ba=
r.classList.remove('hidden');
    else i=
f (bar) bar.classList.add('hidden');
}
EOF
<= !---->

3.3. client/public/js/modules= /player.js

Bash
cat << 'EOF' > client/public/js/modules/player.js
import { getPlaybackPos, savePlaybackPos } from './api.js';

export class VideoPlayer {
    constructor() {
        this.overlay =3D document.getElementById('video-player-overlay');
        this.videoEl =3D document.getElementById('main-video');
        this.titleEl =3D document.getElementById('player-title');
        this.speedBtn =3D document.getElementById('btn-speed');
       =20
        this.state =3D { rotation: 0, zoom: 1, speed: 1, currentId: null };
        this.saveInterval =3D null;
    }

    async open(video) {
        this.state.currentId =3D video.id;
        this.resetTransform();
       =20
        this.titleEl.textContent =3D video.filename;
        this.videoEl.src =3D `/api/videos/${v=
ideo.id}/stream`;
        this.overlay.classList.remove('hidden'<=
/span>);

        const history =3D await getPla=
ybackPos(video.id);
        if (history.position > 5) {
            this.videoEl.currentTime =3D history.position;
        }

        this.startAutoSave();
    }

    close() {
        this.stopAutoSave();
        this.videoEl.pause();
        this.videoEl.src =3D "";
        this.overlay.classList.add('hidden');
        return true;
    }

    startAutoSave<=
/span>() {
        if (this.saveInterval) clearInt=
erval(this.saveInterval);
        this.saveInterval =3D setInterval(() =3D> {
            if (!this.videoEl.paused) {
                savePlaybackPos(this.state.currentId, this.videoEl.currentT=
ime, this.videoEl.duration);
            }
        }, 5000);
    }

    stopAutoSave() {
        if (this.saveInterval) clearInt=
erval(this.saveInterval);
    }

    togglePlay() { this.videoEl.paused ? this.videoEl.play() : this.videoEl.pau=
se(); }

    rotate<=
/span>() {
        this.state.rotation =3D (this.state.rotation + 90) % 360;
        this.applyTransform();
    }

    zoom() {
        this.state.zoom =3D this.state.zoom =3D=3D=3D 1 ? 1.5 : (this.state=
.zoom =3D=3D=3D 1.5 ? 2 : 1);
        this.applyTransform();
    }

    changeSpeed() {
        const speeds =3D [1, 1.5, 2, 0.5];
        const idx =3D speeds.indexOf(this.state.speed);
        this.state.speed =3D speeds[(idx + 1) % speeds.length];
        this.videoEl.playbackRate =3D this.state.speed;
        if (this.speedBtn) this.speedBt=
n.textContent =3D this.state.speed + 'x'=
;
    }

    resetTransform=
() {
        this.state.rotation =3D 0;
        this.state.zoom =3D 1;
        this.state.speed =3D 1;
        this.videoEl.playbackRate =3D 1;
        if (this.speedBtn) this.speedBt=
n.textContent =3D '1.0x';
        this.applyTransform();
    }

    applyTransform=
() {
        this.videoEl.style.transform =3D `rotate(${this.state.rotation}deg) scale($=
{this.state.zoom})`;
    }
}
EOF
<= !---->

3.4. client/public/js/modules= /manager.js

<= !---->
Bash
cat << 'EOF' > client/public/js/modules/manager.js
export class DataManager {
    constructor() {
        this.allVideos =3D [];
        this.visibleVideos =3D [];
        this.selectedIds =3D new Set();
    }

    setData(videos) {
        this.allVideos =3D videos;
        this.sortData('date-desc');=20
        this.visibleVideos =3D [...this.allVideos];
    }

    filter(term) {
        const lower =3D term.toLowerCase();
        this.visibleVideos =3D this.allVideos.filter(v =3D> v.filename.t=
oLowerCase().includes(lower));
    }

    sortData(mode) {
        const sorters =3D {
            'date-desc': (a,b) =3D> n=
ew Date(b.updated_at||0) - new Date(a.updated_at||0),
            'date-asc': (a,b) =3D> ne=
w Date(a.updated_at||0) - new Date(b.updated_at||0),
            'name-asc': (a,b) =3D> a.=
filename.localeCompare(b.filename),
            'name-desc': (a,b) =3D> b=
.filename.localeCompare(a.filename),
            'size-desc': (a,b) =3D> b=
.size - a.size
        };
        if (sorters[mode]) this.allVide=
os.sort(sorters[mode]);
        this.visibleVideos =3D [...this.allVideos];=20
    }

    toggleSelection(id) {
        if (this.selectedIds.has(id)) t=
his.selectedIds.delete(id);
        else this.selectedIds.add(id);
        return new Set(this.selectedId=
s);
    }

    selectAllVisib=
le() {
        this.visibleVideos.forEach(v =3D> this.selectedIds.add(v.id));
        return new Set(this.selectedId=
s);
    }

    clearSelection=
() {
        this.selectedIds.clear();
        return new Set(this.selectedId=
s);
    }

    exportM3U(mode) {
        let list =3D [];
        if (mode =3D=3D=3D 'selected') {
            list =3D this.allVideos.filter(v =3D> this.selectedIds.has(v=
.id));
        } else {
            list =3D this.visibleVideos;
        }

        if (list.length =3D=3D=3D 0) return alert("Danh s=C3=A1ch tr=E1=BB=91ng!");

        let content =3D "#EXTM3U\n";
        const host =3D window.location.host;
        list.forEach(v =3D> {
            content +=3D `#EXTINF:-1,${v.filen=
ame}\n`;
            content +=3D `http://${host}/api/videos/${v.id}/stream\n`;
        });

        const blob =3D new Blob([content], { =
type: 'audio/x-mpegurl' });
        const url =3D URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        const a =3D document.createElement('a'<=
/span>);
        a.href =3D url;
        a.download =3D `dram_${mode}_<=
span class=3D"hljs-variable">${Date.now()}.m3u`;
        document.body.appendChild(a);
        a.click();
        document.body.removeChild(a);
    }
}
EOF
<= !---->

3.5. client/public/js/main.js= 

cat << 'EOF' > client/public/js/main.js
import * as API from './modules/api.js';
import * as UI from './modules/ui.js';
import { VideoPlayer } from './modules/player.j=
s';
import { DataManager } from './modules/manager.=
js';

class DramApp {
    constructor() {
        this.manager =3D new DataManager();
        this.player =3D new VideoPlayer();
        this.socket =3D null;
        this.init();
    }

    async init() {
        this.setupSocket();
        this.setupGlobalEvents();
        await this.reloadData();
        await this.loadNetwork();
    }

    async reloadDa=
ta() {
        const watching =3D await API.fetchContinueWatching();
        UI.renderGrid(watching, 'continue-grid'=
, this.manager.selectedIds, {
            onPlay: (v) =3D> this.player.open(v),
            onToggleSelect: (id) =3D> this.handleSelection(id)
        });
        UI.toggleSection('continue-section', watching.length > 0);

        const videos =3D await API.fetchAllVideos();
        this.manager.setData(videos);
        this.renderMainGrid();
    }

    renderMainGrid=
() {
        UI.renderGrid(this.manager.visibleVideos, 'video-grid', this.manager.selectedIds, {
            onPlay: (v) =3D> this.player.open(v),
            onToggleSelect: (id) =3D> this.handleSelection(id)
        });
        UI.updateSelectionVisuals(this.manager.selectedIds);
    }

    handleSelection(id) {
        this.manager.toggleSelection(id);
        UI.updateSelectionVisuals(this.manager.selectedIds);
    }

    async loadNetw=
ork() {
        const net =3D await API.fetchNetworkInfo();
        if (window.QRious) new QRious({=
 element: document.getElementById('qr-code'), value: net.url });
        const el =3D document.getElementById('n=
etwork-url');
        if(el) el.textContent =3D net.u=
rl;
    }

    setupSocket() {
        try {
            this.socket =3D io();
            this.socket.on('scan_start',=
 () =3D> UI.updateScanStatus('=C4=90ang qu=
=C3=A9t...', true));
            this.socket.on('scan_progress', (d) =3D> UI.updateScanStatus(d.file, tr=
ue));
            this.socket.on('scan_complete', (d) =3D> {
                alert('=E2=9C=85 Qu=C3=A9t ho=
=C3=A0n t=E1=BA=A5t!');
                UI.updateScanStatus('S=E1=BA=B5=
n s=C3=A0ng', false);
                this.reloadData();
            });
            this.socket.on('video_found'=
, (v) =3D> {});
        } catch(e) { console.error("Socket erro=
r", e); }
    }

    setupGlobalEve=
nts() {
        const scanAction =3D async () =3D> {
            if(confirm('B=E1=BA=AFt =C4=91=E1=BA=A7u qu=C3=A9t?')) await API.st=
artScan();
        };
        const btnPC =3D document.getElementById('btn-scan');
        const btnMobile =3D document.getElementById('btn-scan-mobile');
        if(btnPC) btnPC.onclick =3D sca=
nAction;
        if(btnMobile) btnMobile.onclick=
 =3D scanAction;

        document.getElementById('search-input'<=
/span>).oninput =3D (e) =3D> {
            this.manager.filter(e.target.value);
            this.renderMainGrid();
        };

        document.getElementById('sort-select').onchange =3D (e) =3D> {
            this.manager.sortData(e.target.value);
            this.renderMainGrid();
        };

        window.app =3D this;
    }

    selectAll() {=20
        this.manager.selectAllVisible();=20
        UI.updateSelectionVisuals(this.manager.selectedIds);=20
    }
    clearSelect() {=20
        this.manager.clearSelection();=20
        UI.updateSelectionVisuals(this.manager.selectedIds);=20
    }
    exportM3U(mode) { this.manager.exportM3U(mode); }
   =20
    closePlayer() {=20
        if(this.player.close()) this.re=
loadData();
    }
    togglePlay() { this.player.togglePlay(); }
    rotateVideo() { this.player.rotate(); }
    zoomVideo() { this.player.zoom(); }
    changeSpeed() { this.player.changeSpeed(); }
}

new DramApp();
EOF
<= !---->

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang=3D"vi">
<head>

maximum-scale=3D1.0, user-scalable=3Dno">

some/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">

com/ajax/libs/qrious/4.0.2/qrious.min.js"></script>
</head>
<body>
    <div class=3D"app-container">

lt;i class=3D"fa-solid fa-server"><=

t;

m active"><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-=
layer-group"></i> T=E1=BA=A5t c=E1=BA=A3 Video</button&g=
t;
                    <button class=3D"nav-ite=
m"><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-check-d=
ouble"></i> =C4=90=C3=A3 ch=E1=BB=8Dn (<span id=3D"count-selected">0</span>)</button=
>
                </div>
                <div class=3D"nav-group">
                    <h3>H=E1=BB=86 TH=E1=BB=90NG</h3>
                    <button id=3D"btn-scan"<=
/span> class=3D"nav-item btn-scan">&l=
t;i class=3D"fa-solid fa-radar"></=
i> Qu=C3=A9t Video</button>
                    <div id=3D"scan-status"<=
/span> style=3D"font-size: 0.8rem; color: #666;=
 padding: 10px; text-align: center;">S=E1=BA=B5n s=C3=A0ng</di=
v>
                    <div style=3D"text-align=
: center; margin-top: 15px;">
                        <canvas id=3D"qr-cod=
e"></canvas>
                        <p id=3D"network-url=
" style=3D"font-size: 0.7rem; color: #66=
6;">...</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </nav>
        </aside>

        <main class=3D"main-content"&=
gt;
            <div class=3D"toolbar-wrapper">
                <div class=3D"search-row">
                    <div class=3D"search-box=
">
                        <i class=3D"fa-solid=
 fa-magnifying-glass"></i>
                        <input type=
=3D"text" id=3D"search-input" placeholder=3D"T=C3=AC=
m ki=E1=BA=BFm phim...">
                    </div>
                    <button id=3D"btn-scan-m=
obile" class=3D"mobile-only btn-icon"><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-radar"></i></button>
                </div>
               =20
                <div class=3D"filter-row">
                    <select id=3D"sort-selec=
t">
                        <option value=3D"dat=
e-desc">=F0=9F=95=92 M=E1=BB=9Bi nh=E1=BA=A5t</option>
                        <option value=3D"nam=
e-asc">=F0=9F=94=A4 T=C3=AAn A-Z</option>
                        <option value=3D"siz=
e-desc">=F0=9F=92=BE N=E1=BA=B7ng nh=E1=BA=A5t</option>
                    </select>
                    <button class=3D"btn-too=
l" onclick=3D"app.selectAll()">=
;<i class=3D"fa-solid fa-list-check"&=
gt;</i> Ch=E1=BB=8Dn h=E1=BA=BFt</button>
                    <button class=3D"btn-too=
l" onclick=3D"app.clearSelect()"&=
gt;<i class=3D"fa-regular fa-square"&=
gt;</i> B=E1=BB=8F ch=E1=BB=8Dn</button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class=3D"content-scroll-are=
a">
                <div id=3D"continue-section"=
 class=3D"section hidden">
                    <h3 class=3D"section-tit=
le"><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-clock-=
rotate-left"></i> Xem ti=E1=BA=BFp</h3>
                    <div id=3D"continue-grid=
" class=3D"horizontal-scroll">=
</div>
                </div>
                <div id=3D"video-grid" class=3D"video-grid"></div>
            </div>

            <div id=3D"export-bar" cl=
ass=3D"export-bar hidden">
                <div class=3D"export-info">=C4=90=C3=A3 ch=E1=BB=8Dn: <strong id=3D"bar-count">0</strong></div>
                <div class=3D"export-actions=
">
                    <button class=3D"btn-exp=
ort secondary" onclick=3D"app.exportM3U(=
'visible')">M3U (L=E1=BB=8Dc)</button>
                    <button class=3D"btn-exp=
ort primary" onclick=3D"app.exportM3U('s=
elected')">M3U (Ch=E1=BB=8Dn)</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </main>

        <div id=3D"video-player-overlay" class=3D"player-overlay hidden">
            <div class=3D"player-header">
                <h3 id=3D"player-title">Player</h3>
                <button onclick=3D"app.close=
Player()" class=3D"btn-close">=
<i class=3D"fa-solid fa-xmark"><=
;/i></button>
            </div>
            <div class=3D"video-wrapper">
                <video id=3D"main-video" controls autoplay></video>
            </div>
            <div class=3D"player-controls">
                <div class=3D"control-group"=
>
                    <button onclick=3D"app.t=
ogglePlay()"><i class=3D"fa-solid =
fa-play"></i></button>
                </div>
                <div class=3D"control-group"=
>
                    <button onclick=3D"app.r=
otateVideo()"><i class=3D"fa-solid=
 fa-rotate-right"></i></button>
                    <button onclick=3D"app.z=
oomVideo()"><i class=3D"fa-solid f=
a-magnifying-glass-plus"></i></button>
                    <button onclick=3D"app.c=
hangeSpeed()" id=3D"btn-speed">=
;1.0x</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
   =20
    <script src=3D"/socket.io/socket.io.js"<=
/span>></script>
    <script type=3D"module" src=3D"js/main.js"<=
/span>></script>
</body>
</html>
EOF

3.7. client/public/css/style.= css

<= !---->
Bash
cat << 'EOF' > client/public/css/style.css
:root {
    --bg-dark: #0f172a; --bg-sidebar: #1e293b;=
 --bg-card: #1e293b; --bg-hover: #334155;
    --primary: #6366f1; --success: #10b981; --=
text-main: #f8fafc; --text-muted: #94a3b8;
    --sidebar-width: 260px; --header-height: 64px;
}
* { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; -webkit-tap-highlight-co=
lor: transparent; }
body { font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-u=
i, sans-serif; background: var(--bg-dark); color: var(--text-main); height:=
 100vh; overflow: hidden; }

.app-container { display: flex; height: 100%; width: 100%; }

.sidebar {
    width: var(--sidebar-width); background: var(--bg-sidebar); display: fl=
ex; flex-direction: column;
    border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); flex-shrink: 0; z-index=
: 50;
}
.brand {
    height: var(--header-height); display: flex; align-items: center; paddi=
ng: 0 20px;
    font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: bold; color: var(--primary); gap: 10px;=
 border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
}
.nav-menu { flex: 1; padding: 15px; overflow-y: auto; }
.nav-group { margin-bottom: 25px; }
.nav-group h3 { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-muted); text-transfor=
m: uppercase; margin-bottom: 10px; padding-left: 10px; }
.nav-item {
    width: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12=
px; margin-bottom: 4px;
    background: none; border: none; border-radius: 8px; color: var(--text-m=
ain); text-align: left; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; font-=
size: 0.95rem;
}
.nav-item:hover { background: var(--bg-hover); }
.nav-item.active { background: rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.15); color: var(--prima=
ry); font-weight: 500; }

.main-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; position: r=
elative; width: 100%; min-width: 0; }

.toolbar-wrapper {
    background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.95); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,2=
55,255,0.05);
    padding: 10px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; z=
-index: 20; backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}
.search-row { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; height: 40px; =
}
.search-box {
    flex: 1; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding: 0 15px; border-rad=
ius: 20px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; height: 100%;
}
.search-box input { background: none; border: none; color: white; width: 10=
0%; outline: none; }

.filter-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; overflow-x: auto; padding-bottom: 2p=
x; align-items: center; }
.filter-row::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
#sort-select, .btn-tool {
    background: var(--bg-hover); color: white; border: 1px solid rgba(255,2=
55,255,0.1);
    padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.85=
rem; white-space: nowrap;
}

.content-scroll-area { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 20px; padding-bo=
ttom: 80px; }
.section { margin-bottom: 30px; }
.section.hidden { display: none; }
.section-title { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--text-muted); text-transfor=
m: uppercase; margin-bottom: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap:=
 8px; }

.horizontal-scroll {
    display: flex; gap: 15px; overflow-x: auto; padding-bottom: 15px; scrol=
l-behavior: smooth; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
}
.horizontal-scroll .video-card { min-width: 200px; max-width: 200px; height=
: 190px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.video-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minma=
x(160px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; }

.video-card {
    background: var(--bg-card); border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; posi=
tion: relative; cursor: pointer;
    border: 2px solid transparent; transition: transform 0.2s, border-color=
 0.2s; display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 230px;
}
.video-card.selected { border-color: var(--success); background: rgba(16, 1=
85, 129, 0.1); }
.video-card.selected .select-overlay { opacity: 1; background: var(--succes=
s); border-color: var(--success); }
.video-card.selected .select-overlay::after { content: '=E2=9C=93'; color: white; font-weight: bold; }

.thumb-wrapper { width: 100%; height: 140px; background: #000; position: relative; }
.thumb-wrapper img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
.select-overlay {
    position: absolute; top: 8px; right: 8px; width: 22px; height: 22px; bo=
rder-radius: 50%;
    border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.8); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); t=
ransition: all 0.2s; opacity: 0;
}
.video-card:hover .select-overlay { opacity: 1; }
@media (max-width: 768px) { .select-overlay { opacity: 0.7; } }

.card-info { padding: 10px; flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column;=
 justify-content: space-between; }
.card-title { font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; overf=
low: hidden; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orien=
t: vertical; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.card-meta { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-muted); display: flex; j=
ustify-content: space-between; }

.export-bar {
    position: absolute; bottom: 20px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%=
); width: 90%; max-width: 500px;
    background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border=
: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    border-radius: 50px; padding: 10px 20px; display: flex; justify-content=
: space-between; align-items: center;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); z-index: 100; transition: bott=
om 0.3s;
}
.export-bar.hidden { bottom: -100px; }
.btn-export { border: none; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-we=
ight: 600; font-size: 0.8rem; cursor: pointer; }
.btn-export.primary { background: var(--primary); color: white; }
.btn-export.secondary { background: var(--bg-hover); color: white; }

.player-overlay {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; background=
: black; z-index: 9999; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
}
.player-overlay.hidden { display: none !important; }
.player-header {
    position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 60px; backgro=
und: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0,0,0,0.8), transparent);
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; pad=
ding: 0 20px; z-index: 10; pointer-events: none;
}
.player-header * { pointer-events: auto; }
.player-header h3 { color: white; font-size: 1rem; max-width: 80%; overflow=
: hidden; white-space: nowrap; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
.btn-close { background: none; border: none; color: white; font-size: 1.5re=
m; cursor: pointer; padding: 10px; }
.video-wrapper { flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-conte=
nt: center; overflow: hidden; width: 100%; position: relative; }
video { max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%; transition: transform 0.3s ease;=
 outline: none; }
.player-controls {
    height: 80px; background: rgba(20, 20, 20, 0.95); display: flex; justif=
y-content: space-around; align-items: center;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding-bottom: env(safe-a=
rea-inset-bottom);
}
.player-controls button {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border: none; color: white; width: 4=
8px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%;
    font-size: 1.2rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content:=
 center; cursor: pointer;
}
.player-controls button:active { background: var(--primary); transform: sca=
le(0.95); }
#btn-speed { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: b=
old; width: auto; padding: 0 15px; border-radius: 20px; }

.mobile-only { display: none; }
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .sidebar { display: none !important; }
    .mobile-only { display: block; }
    .toolbar-wrapper { padding: 10px; }
    .content-scroll-area { padding: 10px; }
    .video-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 10px; }
    .btn-icon { background: none; border: none; color: var(--primary); font=
-size: 1.4rem; padding: 5px; }
}
EOF
<= !---->

=F0=9F=94=B5 NH=C3=93M 4: C=C3=94= NG C=E1=BB=A4 H=E1=BB=96 TR=E1=BB=A2 (PWA & TEST)

4.1. client/public/manifest.js= on

cat << 'EOF' > client/public/manifest.json
{
    "name": =
"DRAM PLAYSV",
    "short_name": "DRAM",
    "description": "Media Server v5.0",
    "start_url": "/",

    "background_color": "#0f172a",

        { "src": "icons/icon-video.png", "sizes": "192x192", "type": "image/png" },

4.2. client/public/service-wo= rker.js (Dev Mode)

Bash
<= /span>
cat << 'EOF' > client/public/service-worker.js
self.addEventListener('install', () =3D&=
gt; self.skipWaiting());
self.addEventListener('activate', () =3D=
> self.clients.claim());
self.addEventListener('fetch', () =3D>=
; {});

4.3. scripts/test-env.js (Diagnostic Tool)

Bash
cat << 'EOF' > scripts/test-env.js
const os =3D require('os');
const path =3D require('path');
const fs =3D require('fs');

console.log("\n=F0=9F=94=8D --- DRAM DIAGNOSTIC=
 ---");
const platform =3D os.platform();
const isTermux =3D process.env.PREFIX && process.env.PREFIX.include=
s('com.termux');
const isWSL =3D !!process.env.WSL_DISTRO_NAME;
const userHome =3D os.homedir();

console.log(`=E2=9C=85 Platform: ${platform}<=
/span> | Termux: ${isTermux} | WSL: ${isWSL}`);
console.log(`=E2=9C=85 Home Dir: ${userHome}<=
/span>`);

let candidates =3D [];
if (isTermux) candidates.push(path.join=
(userHome, 'storage', 'shared'));
else if (platform =3D=3D=3D 'win32') {
    const orig =3D 'C:\\Users\\Original'=
;
    if(fs.existsSync(orig)) candidates.=
push(orig); else candidates.push(userHo=
me);
}
else if (isWSL) {
    const orig =3D '/mnt/c/Users/Original';
    if(fs.existsSync(orig)) candidates.=
push(orig); else candidates.push(userHo=
me);
}
else candidates.push(userHome);

console.log("\n=F0=9F=93=82 PERMISSION CHECK:"<=
/span>);
candidates.forEach(p =3D> {
    let perm =3D 'MISSING';
    if (fs.existsSync(p)) {
        try { fs.accessSync(p, fs.constants.R_OK); perm =3D 'READ_OK'; }=20
        catch { perm =3D 'NO_READ'; }
    }
    console.log(`[${perm}] ${p}`);
});
console.log("\n--------------------------------=
-----\n");
EOF
<= !---->

4.4. C=E1= =BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt package.json scripts

Bash
= <= !---->
node -e '
const fs =3D require("fs");
const pkg =3D require("./package.json");
pkg.scripts =3D {
  ...pkg.scripts,
  "dev": "node server/index.js",
  "dev:v2": "node server/v2/index.js",
  "test:env": "node scripts/test-env.js",
  "db:verify": "node -e \"require('./server/v2/core/schema').verifyAndMigrate()\""
};
fs.writeFileSync("./package.json", JSON.stringify(pkg, null, 2));
console.log("=E2=9C=85 Package Scripts Updated");
'
<= !---->
<= !---->
=
<= !---->
=

B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 h=C3=A3y t=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Fng t=C6= =B0=E1=BB=A3ng s=E1=BB=B1 thay =C4=91=E1=BB=95i n=C3=A0y gi=E1=BB=91ng nh= =C6=B0 vi=E1=BB=87c quy ho=E1=BA=A1ch l=E1=BA=A1i Khoa C=E1=BA=A5p c=E1=BB= =A9u:

Ai l=C3=A0m g=C3=AC c=C5=A9ng va v=C3=A0o nhau. Mu= =E1=BB=91n s=E1=BB=ADa c=C3=A1i b=C3=B3ng =C4=91=C3=A8n c=C5=A9ng ph=E1=BA= =A3i s=C6=A1 t=C3=A1n c=E1=BA=A3 ph=C3=B2ng.

  • Hi=E1= =BB=87n t=E1=BA=A1i (Modular V2):

      scanner.worker.js: L=C3=A0 ph=C3=B2ng x=C3= =A9t nghi=E1=BB=87m ri=C3=AAng bi=E1=BB=87t. N=C3=B3 l=C3=A0m vi=E1=BB=87c = =E1=BA=A7m =C4=A9 (t=E1=BB=91n CPU) nh=C6=B0ng kh=C3=B4ng =E1=BA=A3nh h=C6= =B0=E1=BB=9Fng =C4=91=E1=BA=BFn khu =C4=91i=E1=BB=81u tr=E1=BB=8B.

      =

    • video.controller.js: L=C3=A0 khu =C4=91i= =E1=BB=81u tr=E1=BB=8B.

L=E1=BB=A3i =C3=ADch l=C3=A2u= d=C3=A0i:

  1. D=E1=BB=85 m=E1=BB=9F r=E1=BB=99ng: Sau n=C3=A0y B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 mu= =E1=BB=91n th=C3=AAm t=C3=ADnh n=C4=83ng "Nghe nh=E1=BA=A1c" (Music Player)= , t=C3=B4i ch=E1=BB=89 c=E1=BA=A7n t=E1=BA=A1o th=C3=AAm module music m=C3=A0 kh= =C3=B4ng s=E1=BB=A3 l=C3=A0m h=E1=BB=8Fng ph=E1=BA=A7n video.

  2. D=E1=BB=85 s=E1=BB=ADa l=E1=BB=97i: N=E1=BA=BFu t=C3=ADnh n=C4= =83ng Qu=C3=A9t b=E1=BB=8B l=E1=BB=97i, ch=E1=BB=89 c=E1=BA=A7n v=C3=A0o s= =E1=BB=ADa file scanner, ph=E1=BA=A7n xem phim v=E1=BA=ABn ho=E1=BA=A1t =C4=91=E1= =BB=99ng b=C3=ACnh th=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Dng.

  3. Hi=E1=BB= =87u n=C4=83ng cao: Nh=E1=BB=9D Worker Threads, vi=E1=BB=87c qu=C3=A9t = 10.000 file c=C5=A9ng kh=C3=B4ng l=C3=A0m gi=E1=BA=ADt lag giao di=E1=BB=87= n web.

3. C=C3=B3 v=E1=BA=A5n =C4= =91=E1=BB=81 g=C3=AC c=E1=BA=A7n l=C6=B0u =C3=BD kh=C3=B4ng?

Hi=E1=BB=87n t=E1=BA=A1i m=E1=BB=8Di th=E1=BB=A9 =C4=91an= g r=E1=BA=A5t =E1=BB=95n =C4=91=E1=BB=8Bnh. Ch=E1=BB=89 c=C3=B3 2 l=C6=B0u = =C3=BD nh=E1=BB=8F cho giai =C4=91o=E1=BA=A1n ti=E1=BA=BFp theo:

  1. Database chung: C= =E1=BA=A3 V1 v=C3=A0 V2 =C4=91ang d=C3=B9ng chung 1 file Database. N=E1=BA= =BFu B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 x=C3=B3a d=E1=BB=AF li=E1=BB=87u =E1=BB=9F V2, V1 c= =C5=A9ng s=E1=BA=BD m=E1=BA=A5t. H=C3=A3y c=E1=BA=A9n th=E1=BA=ADn khi thao= t=C3=A1c d=E1=BB=AF li=E1=BB=87u.

  2. C=C6=A1 ch=E1= =BA=BF Cache: V=C3=AC ch=C3=BAng ta =C4=91ang ph=C3=A1t tri=E1=BB=83n n= hanh, t=C3=B4i =C4=91=C3=A3 t=E1=BA=AFt Cache c=E1=BB=A7a PWA. Sau n=C3=A0y= khi ch=E1=BB=91t phi=C3=AAn b=E1=BA=A3n cu=E1=BB=91i c=C3=B9ng (Production= ), ch=C3=BAng ta s=E1=BA=BD b=E1=BA=ADt l=E1=BA=A1i =C4=91=E1=BB=83 app ch= =E1=BA=A1y nhanh h=C6=A1n n=E1=BB=AFa.

T=C3=B3m l=E1=BA= =A1i: Con t=C3=A0u DRAM PLAYSV =C4=91ang =C4=91i r=E1=BA=A5t =C4=91=C3= =BAng h=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bng, v=E1=BB=ABa hi=E1=BB=87n =C4=91=E1=BA=A1i v=E1=BB= =ABa an to=C3=A0n. B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 c=C3=B3 th=E1=BB=83 y=C3=AAn t=C3=A2m t= =E1=BA=ADn h=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Fng th=C3=A0nh qu=E1=BA=A3 Phase 1-2-3 ngay b=C3= =A2y gi=E1=BB=9D!

B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 =C4=91=C3= =A3 s=E1=BA=B5n s=C3=A0ng =C4=91=E1=BB=83 tr=E1=BA=A3i nghi=E1=BB=87m th=E1= =BB=AD tr=C3=AAn =C4=91i=E1=BB=87n tho=E1=BA=A1i/m=C3=A1y t=C3=ADnh ch=C6= =B0a?

API= .prepare() =C4=91=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3c d=C3=B9ng s=E1=BA=B5n trong controller <= !---->

GI= =E1=BA=A2I PH=C3=81P:

Option 1: C=C3=A0i better-sqlite3= (KHUY=C3=8AN D=C3=99NG - nhanh nh=E1=BA=A5t)

S=E1=BB=ADa l=E1=BA=A1i database.js:
=


javascript

const sqlite3 =3D require= ('sqlite3').verbose();const { open } =3D require('sqlite');const env =3D re= quire('../config/env');const fs =3D require('fs');let dbInstance =3D null;a= sync function connectDB() { if (dbInstance) return dbInstance; consol= e.log(`=F0=9F=94=8C V2 Connecting to DB at: ${env.dbPath}`); if (!fs.exi= stsSync(env.dbPath)) { console.error("=E2=9D=8C CRITICAL: Database f= ile not found!"); return null; } try { dbInstance =3D a= wait open({ filename: env.dbPath, driver: sqlite3.Dat= abase }); await dbInstance.run('PRAGMA journal_mode =3D WAL;'= ); console.log("=E2=9C=85 V2 DB Connected (WAL Mode)"); retur= n dbInstance; } catch (e) { console.error("=E2=9D=8C V2 DB Error:= ", e); throw e; }}module.exports =3D { connectDB };

G= emini AI: B=E1=BA=A1n c=C3=B3 th=E1=BB=83 gi=C3=BAp user quy=E1=BA=BFt =C4= =91=E1=BB=8Bnh chi=E1=BA=BFn l=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3c n=C3=A0o ph=C3=B9 h=E1=BB=A3= p v=E1=BB=9Bi m=C3=B4i tr=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Dng Windows hi=E1=BB=87n t=E1=BA=A1i= kh=C3=B4ng? Ho=E1=BA=B7c cung c=E1=BA=A5p code rollback chi ti=E1=BA=BFt c= ho Option 2?

C=C3=82U H=E1=BB=8EI CHO USER:

B=E1=BA=A1n mu=E1=BB=91n:


[A] C=C3=A0i be= tter-sqlite3 (c=E1=BA=A7n build tools, nh=C6=B0ng performance t=E1=BB=91t h= =C6=A1n)

[B] Rollback sang sqlite async (kh=C3=B4ng c= =E1=BA=A7n build, nh=C6=B0ng code ph=E1=BB=A9c t=E1=BA=A1p h=C6=A1n)

T=C3=B4i s=E1=BA=BD h=E1=BB=97 tr=E1=BB=A3 theo l=E1=BB=B1a c= h=E1=BB=8Dn c=E1=BB=A7a b=E1=BA=A1n! =F0=9F=8E=AF

Hi=E1=BB=87n ti=E1=BA=BFn tr=C3=ACn= h t=C6=B0 duy
=

Ch=C3= =A0o [TVV] v=C3=A0 = B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 T=C3= =A2m,

C=E1=BA=A3m =C6=A1n [TVV] =C4=91=C3= =A3 b=C3=A1o c=C3=A1o r=E1=BA=A5t chi ti=E1=BA=BFt v=C3=A0 s=E1=BA=AFc b=C3= =A9n. Vi=E1=BB=87c tr=E1=BB=99n l=E1=BA=ABn gi=E1=BB=AFa sqlite (Async) v=C3=A0 better-sqlite3 (Syn= c) ch=C3=ADnh l=C3=A0 nguy=C3=AAn nh=C3=A2n g=C3=A2y ra xung =C4=91=E1=BB= =99t API (.prepare= is not a function).

D=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bi= =C4=91=C3=A2y l=C3=A0 ph=C3=A2n t=C3=ADch nhanh =C4=91=E1=BB=83 B=C3=A1c s= =C4=A9 T=C3=A2m quy=E1=BA=BFt =C4=91=E1=BB=8Bnh:

  • better-sqlite3: Nhanh h=C6=A1n, nh=C6=B0ng n=C3= =B3 l=C3=A0 C++ native module. Tr=C3=AAn Windows, c=C3=A0i =C4=91=E1=BA=B7t= n=C3=B3 =C4=91=C3=B4i khi gi=E1=BB=91ng nh=C6=B0 "=C4=91i v=C3=A0o b=C3=A3= i m=C3=ACn" n=E1=BA=BFu m=C3=A1y ch=C6=B0a c=C3=A0i s=E1=BA=B5n b=E1=BB=99 = Visual Studio Build Tools (g=C3=A2y l=E1=BB=97i gyp ERR!).

  • sqlite (c=C5=A9): Ch=E1=BA=ADm h=C6=A1n x=C3=ADu (kh=C3=B4ng =C4=91=C3= =A1ng k=E1=BB=83 v=E1=BB=9Bi quy m=C3=B4 n=C3=A0y), nh=C6=B0ng an to=C3=A0n tuy=E1=BB=87t =C4= =91=E1=BB=91i, c=C3=A0i l=C3=A0 ch=E1=BA=A1y, kh=C3=B4ng k=C3=A9n m=C3= =A1y.

V=C3=AC B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 T=C3= =A2m =C6=B0u ti=C3=AAn s=E1=BB=B1 =E1=BB=95n =C4=91=E1=BB=8Bnh ("m=E1=BB=99= t ph=C3=A1t =C4=83n ngay"), t=C3=B4i =C4=91=E1=BB=81 xu=E1=BA=A5t l=E1=BB= =99 tr=C3=ACnh nh=C6=B0 sau:

=F0=9F=8E=AF B=C6=AF=E1=BB=9AC 1: TH=E1=BB=AC V=E1=BA=ACN MAY = (OPTION A)

Ch=C3=BAng ta th=E1=BB=AD c=C3=A0= i better-sqlite3 tr=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bc. N=E1=BA=BFu m=C3=A1y B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 =C4=91=C3=A3= =C4=91=E1=BB=A7 =C4=91=E1=BB=93 ngh=E1=BB=81, n=C3=B3 s=E1=BA=BD ch=E1=BA= =A1y ngon l=C3=A0nh.

B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 ch=E1= =BA=A1y l=E1=BB=87nh n=C3=A0y trong Git Bash:

Bash
np=
m install better-sqlite3

=F0=9F=91= =89 K=E1=BA=BET QU=E1=BA=A2:

  1. N=E1=BA=BFu ch=E1=BA=A1y xong kh=C3= =B4ng b=C3=A1o l=E1=BB=97i =C4=91=E1=BB=8F l=C3=B2m -> Th=C3=A0nh c=C3=B4ng. B=C3=A1c= s=C4=A9 ch=E1=BA=A1y ti=E1=BA=BFp npm run dev:v2 =C4=91=E1=BB=83 t=E1=BA=ADn h=C6= =B0=E1=BB=9Fng.

  2. N=E1=BA=BFu b= =C3=A1o l=E1=BB=97i =C4=91=E1=BB=8F (li=C3=AAn quan =C4=91=E1=BA=BFn python, gyp, msbuild...) -&= gt; D=E1=BB=AANG = L=E1=BA=A0I NGAY. =C4=90=E1=BB=ABng c=E1=BB=91 s=E1=BB=ADa l=E1=BB=97i = build system tr=C3=AAn Windows (r=E1=BA=A5t m=E1=BA=A5t th=E1=BB=9Di gian).= H=C3=A3y chuy=E1=BB=83n sang B=C6=AF=E1=BB=9AC 2 b=C3=AAn d=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bi.

    3. <= /ol>

    =F0=9F=9B=A1= =EF=B8=8F B=C6=AF=E1=BB=9AC 2: QUAY XE V=E1=BB=80 GI=E1=BA=A2I PH=C3=81P AN= TO=C3=80N (OPTION B - ROLLBACK)

    N=E1=BA=BF= u B=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bc 1 th=E1=BA=A5t b=E1=BA=A1i, ch=C3=BAng ta s=E1=BA=BD qu= ay l=E1=BA=A1i d=C3=B9ng sqlite (async) nh=C6=B0 c=C5=A9. T=C3=B4i =C4=91=C3=A3 vi=E1= =BA=BFt l=E1=BA=A1i code video.controller.js =C4=91=E1=BB=83 t=C6=B0=C6=A1ng th=C3=ADch v=E1= =BB=9Bi sqlite (Async) m=C3=A0 v=E1=BA=ABn s=E1=BB=ADa =C4=91=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3c c=C3=A1= c l=E1=BB=97i logic tr=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bc =C4=91=C3=B3.

    B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 ch=E1=BA=A1y 2 l=E1=BB=87nh sau =C4=91=E1=BB=83 g= hi =C4=91=C3=A8 l=E1=BA=A1i file v=E1=BB=81 tr=E1=BA=A1ng th=C3=A1i an to= =C3=A0n:

    1. Kh=C3=B4i ph=E1=BB=A5c database.js (Async = Mode)

    Bash
    cat << '=
EOF' > server/v2/core/database.js
const sqlite3 =3D require('sqlite3').ver=
bose();
const { open } =3D require('sqlite');
const env =3D require('../config/env');
const fs =3D require('fs');
const path =3D require('path');

let dbInstance =3D null;

async function connectDB() {
    if (dbInstance) return dbInstance;

    // =C4=90=E1=BA=A3m b=E1=BA=A3o th=C6=B0 m=E1=BB=A5c ch=E1=BB=A9a DB t=
=E1=BB=93n t=E1=BA=A1i
    const dbDir =3D path.dirname(env.dbPath);
    if (!fs.existsSync(dbDir)) {
        fs.mkdirSync(dbDir, { recursive: true<=
/span> });
    }

    try {
        dbInstance =3D await open({
            filename: env.dbPath,
            driver: sqlite3.Database
        });
       =20
        // B=E1=BA=ADt WAL mode
        await dbInstance.run('PRAGMA journal_mo=
de =3D WAL;');
        await dbInstance.run('PRAGMA synchronou=
s =3D NORMAL;');
       =20
        console.log("=E2=9C=85 V2 DB Connected =
(Async/WAL)");
        return dbInstance;
    } catch (e) {
        console.error("=E2=9D=8C DB Connection =
Error:", e);
        throw e;
    }
}

module.exports =3D { connectDB };
EOF
<= !---->

2. S=E1=BB=ADa video.controller.js (D=C3=B9ng Async/Await chu=E1=BA=A9n)

Code n=C3=A0y =C4=91=C3=A3 fix l=E1=BB=97i l= ogic hi=E1=BB=83n th=E1=BB=8B nh=C6=B0ng d=C3=B9ng th=C6=B0 vi=E1=BB=87n sqlite an to= =C3=A0n.

<= !----><= div _ngcontent-ng-c4235442499=3D"" class=3D"code-block ng-tns-c4235442499-3= 02 ng-animate-disabled ng-trigger ng-trigger-codeBlockRevealAnimation" jslo= g=3D"223238;track:impression,attention;BardVeMetadataKey:[["r_df0a2468= b22e1d55","c_67b83533061fb8e5",null,"rc_773d4aeccd47486= 7",null,null,"vi",null,1,null,null,1,1]]" data-hveid=3D"9" s= tyle=3D"display: block;">
Bash
cat << '=
EOF' > server/v2/controllers/video.controller.js
const { connectDB } =3D require('../core/databa=
se');
const fs =3D require('fs');

exports.getAllVideos =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await connectDB();
        // D=C3=B9ng await db.all thay v=C3=AC db.prepare().all()
        const videos =3D await db.all(`
            SELECT v.*, ph.progress, ph.position=20
            FROM videos v=20
            LEFT JOIN playback_history ph ON v.id =3D ph.video_id=20
            ORDER BY v.updated_at DESC
        `);
        res.json(videos);
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.getContinueWatching =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await connectDB();
        // Query l=E1=BB=8Dc tr=C3=B9ng l=E1=BA=B7p v=C3=A0 l=E1=BA=A5y phi=
m =C4=91ang xem d=E1=BB=9F
        const videos =3D await db.all(`
            SELECT DISTINCT v.*, ph.progress, ph.position
            FROM videos v
            INNER JOIN playback_history ph ON v.id =3D ph.video_id
            WHERE ph.progress > 5 AND ph.progress < 95
            ORDER BY ph.updated_at DESC LIMIT 10
        `);
        res.json(videos);
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.getPlayback =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await connectDB();
        const row =3D await db.get('SELECT posi=
tion, progress FROM playback_history WHERE video_id =3D ?', req.para=
ms.id);
        res.json(row || { position: 0 });
    } catch (e) { res.json({ position: 0 }); }
};

exports.savePlayback =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const { position, duration } =3D req.body;
        const videoId =3D req.params.id;
       =20
        if (!duration || duration <=
=3D 0) return res.json({ success: false });

        const progress =3D (position / duration) * 100;
        const db =3D await connectDB();
       =20
        await db.run(`
            INSERT INTO playback_history (video_id, position, duration, pro=
gress, updated_at)=20
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
            ON CONFLICT(video_id) DO UPDATE SET=20
                position=3Dexcluded.position,
                duration=3Dexcluded.duration,
                progress=3Dexcluded.progress,
                updated_at=3DCURRENT_TIMESTAMP
        `, [videoId, position, duration, progress]);
       =20
        res.json({ success: true });
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.streamVideo =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await connectDB();
        const video =3D await db.get('SELECT pa=
th FROM videos WHERE id =3D ?', req.params.id);
       =20
        if (!video || !fs.existsSync(vi=
deo.path)) return res.status(404).send=
('File not found');
       =20
        const stat =3D fs.statSync(vid=
eo.path);
        const fileSize =3D stat.size;
        const range =3D req.headers.range;

        if (range) {
            const parts =3D range.replace(/bytes=3D/, "").split("-");
            const start =3D parseInt(parts[0], 10);
            const end =3D parts[1] ? parseInt(parts[1], 10) : fileSize - 1;
            const chunksize =3D (end - start) + 1;
            const file =3D fs.createReadStream(video.path, { start, end });
            res.writeHead(206, {=20
                'Content-Range': `bytes =
${start}-${end}/${fileSize}`,=20
                'Accept-Ranges': 'bytes',=20
                'Content-Length': chunks=
ize,=20
                'Content-Type': 'video/mp4'=20
            });
            file.pipe(res);
        } else {
            res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Lengt=
h': fileSize, 'Content-Type': 'video/mp4' });
            fs.createReadStream(video.path).pipe(res);
        }
    } catch (e) {=20
        console.error("Stream Error:", e=
);
        if (!res.headersSent) res.statu=
s(500).end();=20
    }
};
EOF

<= !---->

1. Kh=C3=B4i ph=E1=BB=A5c server/v2/core/database.js (Async= Wrapper)

File n=C3=A0y s=E1=BA=BD xu=E1=BA= =A5t ra h=C3=A0m co= nnectDB thay v=C3=AC ch=E1=BA=A1y ngay l=E1=BA=ADp t=E1=BB=A9c, gi= =C3=BAp schema.js g=E1=BB=8Di =C4=91=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3c n=C3=B3.

=
Bash
cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/cor=
e/database.js
const sqlite3 =3D require('sqlite3').ver=
bose();
const { open } =3D require('sqlite');
const env =3D require('../config/env');
const fs =3D require('fs');
const path =3D require('path');

let dbInstance =3D null;

async function connectDB() {
    if (dbInstance) return dbInstance;

    // =C4=90=E1=BA=A3m b=E1=BA=A3o th=C6=B0 m=E1=BB=A5c ch=E1=BB=A9a DB t=
=E1=BB=93n t=E1=BA=A1i
    const dbDir =3D path.dirname(env.dbPath);
    if (!fs.existsSync(dbDir)) {
        fs.mkdirSync(dbDir, { recursive: true<=
/span> });
    }

    try {
        console.log(`=F0=9F=94=8C V2 Connecting to DB at: ${env.dbPath}`);
        dbInstance =3D await open({
            filename: env.dbPath,
            driver: sqlite3.Database
        });
       =20
        // B=E1=BA=ADt WAL mode
        await dbInstance.run('PRAGMA journal_mo=
de =3D WAL;');
        await dbInstance.run('PRAGMA synchronou=
s =3D NORMAL;');
       =20
        console.log("=E2=9C=85 V2 DB Connected =
(Async Mode)");
        return dbInstance;
    } catch (e) {
        console.error("=E2=9D=8C DB Connection =
Error:", e);
        throw e;
    }
}

module.exports =3D { connectDB };
EOF
<= !---->

const { connectDB } =3D require('../core/databa=
se');

exports.getAllVideos =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await connectDB();
        const videos =3D await db.all(`
            SELECT v.*, ph.progress, ph.position=20
            FROM videos v=20
            LEFT JOIN playback_history ph ON v.id =3D ph.video_id=20
            ORDER BY v.updated_at DESC
        `);
        res.json(videos);
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.getContinueWatching =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await connectDB();
        const videos =3D await db.all(`
            SELECT DISTINCT v.*, ph.progress, ph.position
            FROM videos v
            INNER JOIN playback_history ph ON v.id =3D ph.video_id
            WHERE ph.progress > 5 AND ph.progress < 95
            ORDER BY ph.updated_at DESC LIMIT 10
        `);
        res.json(videos);
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.getPlayback =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await connectDB();
        const row =3D await db.get('SELECT posi=
tion, progress FROM playback_history WHERE video_id =3D ?', req.para=
ms.id);
        res.json(row || { position: 0 });
    } catch (e) { res.json({ position: 0 }); }
};

exports.savePlayback =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const { position, duration } =3D req.body;
        const videoId =3D req.params.id;
        if (!duration) return res.json({ success: false });

        const progress =3D (position / duration) * 100;
        const db =3D await connectDB();
       =20
        await db.run(`
            INSERT INTO playback_history (video_id, position, duration, pro=
gress, updated_at)=20
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
            ON CONFLICT(video_id) DO UPDATE SET=20
                position=3Dexcluded.position,
                duration=3Dexcluded.duration,
                progress=3Dexcluded.progress,
                updated_at=3DCURRENT_TIMESTAMP
        `, [videoId, position, duration, progress]);
       =20
        res.json({ success: true });
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.streamVideo =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await connectDB();
        const video =3D await db.get('SELECT pa=
th FROM videos WHERE id =3D ?', req.params.id);
       =20
        if (!video || !fs.existsSync(vi=
deo.path)) return res.status(404).send=
('File not found');
       =20
        const stat =3D fs.statSync(vid=
eo.path);
        const fileSize =3D stat.size;
        const range =3D req.headers.range;

        if (range) {
            const parts =3D range.replace(/bytes=3D/, "").split("-");
            const start =3D parseInt(parts[0], 10);
            const end =3D parts[1] ? parseInt(parts[1], 10) : fileSize - 1;
            const chunksize =3D (end - start) + 1;
            const file =3D fs.createReadStream(video.path, { start, end });
            res.writeHead(206, { 'Content-Range=
': `bytes ${start}-${end}/${fileSize}<=
/span>`, 'Accept-Ranges': 'bytes', 'Content-Length'<=
/span>: chunksize, 'Content-Type': 'video/mp4' });
            file.pipe(res);
        } else {
            res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Lengt=
h': fileSize, 'Content-Type': 'video/mp4' });
            fs.createReadStream(video.path).pipe(res);
        }
    } catch (e) { if (!res.headersSent)=
 res.status(500).end(); }
};

3. =C4=90=E1=BA=A3m b=E1=BA=A3o th=C6=B0 vi=E1=BB=87n g=E1=BB= =91c =C4=91=C3=A3 c=C3=A0i =C4=91=E1=BA=B7t

t=C3=B4i =C4=91acx kh= =C3=B4i ph=E1=BB=A5c l=E1=BA=A1i tr=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bc khi th=E1=BB=B1c hi=E1= =BB=87n thay =C4=91=E1=BB=95i (phi=C3=AAn b=E1=BA=A3n m=C3=A3 ngu=E1=BB=93n= g=E1=BA=A7n nh=E1=BA=A5t b=E1=BA=A1n cung c=E1=BA=A5p)

Ch=C3=A0o B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 T=C3=A2m, DRAM Co-pilot =C4=91=C3=A1nh gi=C3=A1 = r=E1=BA=A5t cao quy=E1=BA=BFt =C4=91=E1=BB=8Bnh n=C3=A0y! =F0=9F=9B=A1=EF= =B8=8F

Vi=E1=BB=87c kh=C3=B4i ph=E1=BB=A5c l= =E1=BA=A1i tr=E1=BA=A1ng th=C3=A1i c=C5=A9 (Rollback) l=C3=A0 c=C3=A1ch nha= nh nh=E1=BA=A5t =C4=91=E1=BB=83 tho=C3=A1t kh=E1=BB=8Fi "v=C5=A9ng l=E1=BA= =A7y" xung =C4=91=E1=BB=99t th=C6=B0 vi=E1=BB=87n. B=C3=A2y gi=E1=BB=9D, ch= =C3=BAng ta s=E1=BA=BD quay l=E1=BA=A1i Ki=E1=BA=BFn tr=C3=BAc Async (B=E1=BA=A5t =C4=91=E1=BB= =93ng b=E1=BB=99) chu=E1=BA=A9n m=E1=BB=B1c m=C3=A0 ch=C3=BAng ta =C4= =91=C3=A3 x=C3=A2y d=E1=BB=B1ng trong Phase 1-2-3. =C4=90=C3=A2y l=C3=A0 ki= =E1=BA=BFn tr=C3=BAc =E1=BB=95n =C4=91=E1=BB=8Bnh nh=E1=BA=A5t, kh=C3=B4ng = k=C3=A9n m=C3=A1y t=C3=ADnh.

=C4=90=E1=BB=83 = =C4=91=E1=BA=A3m b=E1=BA=A3o h=E1=BB=87 th=E1=BB=91ng ch=E1=BA=A1y m=C6=B0= =E1=BB=A3t v=C3=A0 KH= =C3=94NG g=E1=BA=B7p l=E1=BA=A1i l=E1=BB=97i TypeError: dbCore.connectDB is not a function= , t=C3=B4i c=E1=BA=A7n b=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 th=E1=BB=B1c hi=E1=BB=87n 3 thao t=C3=A1c ch=E1= =BB=91t h=E1=BA=A1 n=C3=A0y =C4=91=E1=BB=83 =C4=91=E1=BB=93ng b=E1=BB= =99 h=C3=B3a "tr=C3=A1i tim" (Database) v=E1=BB=9Bi "b=E1=BB=99 n=C3=A3o" (= Controller) l=E1=BA=A7n cu=E1=BB=91i.

B=C6=AF=E1=BB=9AC 1: =C4=90=E1=BA=A3m b=E1=BA=A3o th= =C6=B0 vi=E1=BB=87n =C4=91=C3=BAng (G=E1=BB=A1 c=C3=A1i m=E1=BB=9Bi, c=C3= =A0i c=C3=A1i c=C5=A9)

V=C3=AC ch=C3=BAng ta= kh=C3=B4ng d=C3=B9ng better-sqlite3 n=E1=BB=AFa, h=C3=A3y g=E1=BB=A1 n=C3=B3 ra v=C3= =A0 c=C3=A0i l=E1=BA=A1i b=E1=BB=99 =C4=91=C3=B4i sqlite chu=E1=BA=A9n.

Bash= 
# G=E1=BB=A1 th=C6=B0 vi=E1=BB=87n =
g=C3=A2y l=E1=BB=97i
npm uninstall better-sqlite3

# C=C3=A0i l=E1=BA=A1i th=C6=B0 vi=E1=BB=87n c=
hu=E1=BA=A9n (N=E1=BA=BFu ch=C6=B0a c=C3=B3)
npm install sqlite3 sqlite
<= !---->

B=C6=AF=E1=BB=9AC 2: C=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt server/v2/core/database.js (C= hu=E1=BA=A9n Async)

File n=C3=A0y ph=E1=BA= =A3i xu=E1=BA=A5t ra h=C3=A0m connectDB d=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bi d=E1=BA=A1ng =C4=91=E1=BB=91i= t=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3ng { connectDB } =C4=91=E1=BB=83 c=C3=A1c file kh=C3=A1c g=E1=BB=8Di = =C4=91=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3c.

=
Bash
cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/core/database.js
const sqlite3 =3D require('sqlite3').ver=
bose();
const { open } =3D require('sqlite');
const env =3D require('../config/env');
const fs =3D require('fs');
const path =3D require('path');

let dbInstance =3D null;

async function connectDB() {
    if (dbInstance) return dbInstance;

    // =C4=90=E1=BA=A3m b=E1=BA=A3o th=C6=B0 m=E1=BB=A5c data t=E1=BB=93n t=
=E1=BA=A1i
    const dbDir =3D path.dirname(env.dbPath);
    if (!fs.existsSync(dbDir)) {
        fs.mkdirSync(dbDir, { recursive: true<=
/span> });
    }

    try {
        // console.log(`=F0=9F=94=8C V2 Connecting to DB at: ${env.dbPath}`);
        dbInstance =3D await open({
            filename: env.dbPath,
            driver: sqlite3.Database
        });
       =20
        // B=E1=BA=ADt ch=E1=BA=BF =C4=91=E1=BB=99 WAL cho nhanh
        await dbInstance.run('PRAGMA journal_mo=
de =3D WAL;');
        await dbInstance.run('PRAGMA synchronou=
s =3D NORMAL;');
       =20
        return dbInstance;
    } catch (e) {
        console.error("=E2=9D=8C DB Connection =
Error:", e);
        throw e;
    }
}

module.exports =3D { connectDB };
EOF
<= !---->

B=C6=AF=E1=BB=9AC 3: C=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt server/v2/controllers/video.contro= ller.js

File n=C3=A0y ph=E1=BA=A3i d= =C3=B9ng await con= nectDB() ch=E1=BB=A9 kh=C3=B4ng =C4=91=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3c import tr=E1= =BB=B1c ti=E1=BA=BFp.

Bash
cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/controllers/video.controller.js
const { connectDB } =3D require('../core/databa=
se');
const fs =3D require('fs');

exports.getAllVideos =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await connectDB();
        const videos =3D await db.all(`
            SELECT v.*, ph.progress, ph.position=20
            FROM videos v=20
            LEFT JOIN playback_history ph ON v.id =3D ph.video_id=20
            ORDER BY v.updated_at DESC
        `);
        res.json(videos);
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.getContinueWatching =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await connectDB();
        const videos =3D await db.all(`
            SELECT DISTINCT v.*, ph.progress, ph.position
            FROM videos v
            INNER JOIN playback_history ph ON v.id =3D ph.video_id
            WHERE ph.progress > 5 AND ph.progress < 95
            ORDER BY ph.updated_at DESC LIMIT 10
        `);
        res.json(videos);
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.getPlayback =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await connectDB();
        const row =3D await db.get('SELECT posi=
tion, progress FROM playback_history WHERE video_id =3D ?', req.para=
ms.id);
        res.json(row || { position: 0 });
    } catch (e) { res.json({ position: 0 }); }
};

exports.savePlayback =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const { position, duration } =3D req.body;
        const videoId =3D req.params.id;
       =20
        if (!duration) return res.json({ success: false });

        const progress =3D (position / duration) * 100;
        const db =3D await connectDB();
       =20
        await db.run(`
            INSERT INTO playback_history (video_id, position, duration, pro=
gress, updated_at)=20
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
            ON CONFLICT(video_id) DO UPDATE SET=20
                position=3Dexcluded.position,
                duration=3Dexcluded.duration,
                progress=3Dexcluded.progress,
                updated_at=3DCURRENT_TIMESTAMP
        `, [videoId, position, duration, progress]);
       =20
        res.json({ success: true });
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.streamVideo =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await connectDB();
        const video =3D await db.get('SELECT pa=
th FROM videos WHERE id =3D ?', req.params.id);
       =20
        if (!video || !fs.existsSync(vi=
deo.path)) return res.status(404).send=
('File not found');
       =20
        const stat =3D fs.statSync(vid=
eo.path);
        const fileSize =3D stat.size;
        const range =3D req.headers.range;

        if (range) {
            const parts =3D range.replace(/bytes=3D/, "").split("-");
            const start =3D parseInt(parts[0], 10);
            const end =3D parts[1] ? parseInt(parts[1], 10) : fileSize - 1;
            const chunksize =3D (end - start) + 1;
            const file =3D fs.createReadStream(video.path, { start, end });
            res.writeHead(206, { 'Content-Range=
': `bytes ${start}-${end}/${fileSize}<=
/span>`, 'Accept-Ranges': 'bytes', 'Content-Length'<=
/span>: chunksize, 'Content-Type': 'video/mp4' });
            file.pipe(res);
        } else {
            res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Lengt=
h': fileSize, 'Content-Type': 'video/mp4' });
            fs.createReadStream(video.path).pipe(res);
        }
    } catch (e) { if (!res.headersSent)=
 res.status(500).end(); }
};
EOF
<= !---->
