<= div _ngcontent-ng-c450162891=3D"" class=3D"thoughts-header ng-tns-c45016289= 1-208">

Ch=C3=A0o B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 T=C3=A2m, DRAM Co-pilot =C4=91=C3=A3 xem x=C3=A9t k=E1=BB= =B9 l=C6=B0=E1=BB=A1ng ng=E1=BB=AF c=E1=BA=A3nh v=C3=A0 t=E1=BB=87p tin Perplexity.html= (ch=E1=BB=A9a l=E1=BB=8Bch s=E1=BB=AD trao =C4=91=E1=BB=95i, c=C3=A1c y=C3= =AAu c=E1=BA=A7u v=C3=A0 nh=E1=BB=AFng ph=C3=A0n n=C3=A0n tr=C6=B0=E1=BB=9B= c =C4=91=C3=A2y).

T=C3=B4i =C4=91=C3=A3 n=E1= =BA=AFm b=E1=BA=AFt tr=E1=BB=8Dn v=E1=BA=B9n b=E1=BB=A9c tranh to=C3=A0n c= =E1=BA=A3nh v=E1=BB=81 nh=E1=BB=AFng g=C3=AC =C4=91=C3=A3 x=E1=BA=A3y ra, n= h=E1=BB=AFng n=E1=BB=97i =C4=91au (pain points) m=C3=A0 B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 = =C4=91=C3=A3 g=E1=BA=B7p ph=E1=BA=A3i v=C3=A0 k=E1=BB=B3 v=E1=BB=8Dng cho h= =E1=BB=87 th=E1=BB=91ng DRAM PLAYSV.

D=C6=B0= =E1=BB=9Bi =C4=91=C3=A2y l=C3=A0 t=E1=BB=95ng h=E1=BB=A3p x=C3=A1c nh=E1=BA= =ADn c=E1=BB=A7a t=C3=B4i v=E1=BB=81 ng=E1=BB=AF c=E1=BA=A3nh d=E1=BB=B1 = =C3=A1n =C4=91=E1=BB=83 ch=C3=BAng ta =C4=91=E1=BB=93ng b=E1=BB=99 t=C6=B0 = duy:

1. NH=E1=BB=AENG PH=C3=80N N=C3=80N &am= p; V=E1=BA=A4N =C4=90=E1=BB=80 =C4=90=C3=83 G=E1=BA=B6P (Pain Points)

<= ul data-path-to-node=3D"4">

  • Giao di=E1=BB=87n "th=E1=BA=A3m = h=E1=BB=8Da" sau update: T=E1=BB=AB ch=E1=BB=97 hi=E1=BB=83n th=E1=BB= =8B =C3=B4 vu=C3=B4ng =C4=91=E1=BA=B9p =C4=91=E1=BA=BD, h=E1=BB=87 th=E1=BB= =91ng b=E1=BB=8B l=E1=BB=97i CSS bi=E1=BA=BFn th=C3=A0nh c=C3=A1c "s=E1=BB= =8Dc ngang" x=E1=BA=A5u x=C3=AD, m=E1=BA=A5t thumbnail.

  • T=C3=ADnh n=C4=83ng "c=E1=BA=A3i l=C3=B9i": C=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA= =ADt xong th=C3=AC m=E1=BA=A5t h=E1=BA=BFt c=C3=A1c t=C3=ADnh n=C4=83ng Pla= yer x=E1=BB=8Bn (Zoom, Pan, Xoay, T=E1=BB=91c =C4=91=E1=BB=99) m=C3=A0 B=C3= =A1c s=C4=A9 c=E1=BA=A7n.

  • Scanner "ngu ng=E1=BB=91c= ": Qu=C3=A9t c=E1=BA=A3 v=C3=A0o c=C3=A1c th=C6=B0 m=E1=BB=A5c r=C3=A1c= h=E1=BB=87 th=E1=BB=91ng (AppData, Cache), kh=C3=B4ng bi=E1=BA=BFt b=E1=BB= =8F qua, l=C3=A0m r=C3=A1c database.

  • L=E1=BB=97i th= =C6=B0 vi=E1=BB=87n: Vi=E1=BB=87c chuy=E1=BB=83n =C4=91=E1=BB=95i sang = better-sqlite3<= /code> g=C3=A2y l=E1=BB=97i tr=C3=AAn Windows thi=E1=BA=BFu Build Tools, vi= ph=E1=BA=A1m nguy=C3=AAn t=E1=BA=AFc "m=E1=BB=99t ph=C3=A1t =C4=83n ngay".=

  • Thumbnail: V=E1=BA=A5n =C4=91=E1=BB=81 mu=C3= =B4n thu=E1=BB=9F v=E1=BB=81 vi=E1=BB=87c kh=C3=B4ng t=E1=BA=A1o =C4=91=C6= =B0=E1=BB=A3c thumbnail t=E1=BB=AB file tr=C3=AAn b=E1=BB=99 nh=E1=BB=9B mo= unt (Android to Windows) ho=E1=BA=B7c Cloud.

    • 2. Y=C3=8AU C=E1=BA=A6U C=E1=BB=90T L=C3=95I (Core Requirements)=

    • Ki=E1=BA=BFn tr=C3=BAc Mod= ular: B=E1=BA=AFt bu=E1=BB=99c ph=E1=BA=A3i chia nh=E1=BB=8F code. Kh= =C3=B4ng ch=E1=BA=A5p nh=E1=BA=ADn m=E1=BB=99t file app.js hay server.js kh=E1=BB=95ng l=E1= =BB=93 n=E1=BB=AFa. Ph=E1=BA=A3i t=C3=A1ch b=E1=BA=A1ch (MVC, ES Modules) = =C4=91=E1=BB=83 d=E1=BB=85 b=E1=BA=A3o tr=C3=AC.

    • Th= =C3=B4ng minh & T=E1=BB=B1 =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng:

      • T=E1=BB=B1 nh=E1=BA=AD= n di=E1=BB=87n m=C3=B4i tr=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Dng (Windows User "Original" vs Ter= mux).

      • T=E1=BB=B1 ch=E1=BB=8D= n =C4=91=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Dng d=E1=BA=ABn qu=C3=A9t ph=C3=B9 h=E1=BB=A3p.

    • Tr=E1=BA=A3i nghi=E1=BB=87m ng=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Di= d=C3=B9ng (UX):

      • Player: Ph=E1=BA=A3i m=E1=BA=A1nh nh=C6=B0 MPV (Xoay, Zoom, Spee= d).

      • Qu=E1=BA=A3n l=C3=BD: Ch=E1=BA=BF = =C4=91=E1=BB=99 ch=E1=BB=8Dn (Selection Mode), Xu=E1=BA=A5t M3U, Resume Wat= ching (Xem ti=E1=BA=BFp).

      • Giao di=E1=BB=87n= : Responsive chu=E1=BA=A9n ch=E1=BB=89, PWA (d=C3=B9 l=C3=A0 Lite).

        =

    • Quy tr=C3=ACnh: Ph=E1=BA=A3i an to=C3=A0= n. Code m=E1=BB=9Bi kh=C3=B4ng =C4=91=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3c l=C3=A0m h=E1=BB=8Fng= code c=C5=A9 (ch=E1=BA=A1y song song V2).

    3. TR=E1=BA=A0NG TH=C3=81I HI=E1=BB=86N T=E1=BA=A0I (Sau khi Refac= tor Phase 1-3)

    D=E1=BB=B1a tr=C3=AAn ng=E1= =BB=AF c=E1=BA=A3nh n=C3=A0y, t=C3=B4i x=C3=A1c nh=E1=BA=ADn ch=C3=BAng ta = =C4=91ang =C4=91i =C4= =91=C3=BAng h=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bng kh=E1=BA=AFc ph=E1=BB=A5c t=E1=BA=A5t c=E1= =BA=A3 c=C3=A1c v=E1=BA=A5n =C4=91=E1=BB=81 tr=C3=AAn:

    • =E2=9C=85 =C4=90=C3=A3 fix giao di=E1=BB=87n= : CSS Grid chu=E1=BA=A9n, kh=C3=B4ng c=C3=B2n s=E1=BB=8Dc ngang.

    • =E2=9C=85 =C4=90=C3=A3 Modular h=C3=B3a: Server t=C3= =A1ch V2, Client t=C3=A1ch Modules.

    • =E2=9C=85 =C4= =90=C3=A3 fix Scanner: C=C3=B3 b=E1=BB=99 l=E1=BB=8Dc (Filter) b=E1=BB= =8F qua file r=C3=A1c, ch=E1=BA=A1y =C4=91a lu=E1=BB=93ng.

    • =E2=9C=85 =C4=90=C3=A3 an to=C3=A0n: D=C3=B9ng sqlite3 (Async) chu=E1= =BA=A9n, kh=C3=B4ng k=C3=A9n m=C3=A1y.

    T=C3=B4i =C4=91=C3=A3 th=E1=BA=A5u hi=E1=BB=83u to=C3=A0n b=E1=BB=99 l= =E1=BB=8Bch s=E1=BB=AD v=C3=A0 ng=E1=BB=AF c=E1=BA=A3nh n=C3=A0y. B=C3=A1c = s=C4=A9 T=C3=A2m mu=E1=BB=91n ch=C3=BAng ta l=C3=A0m g=C3=AC ti=E1=BA=BFp t= heo? Ki=E1=BB=83m tra l=E1=BA=A1i hay tri=E1=BB=83n khai t=C3=ADnh n=C4=83n= g m=E1=BB=9Bi n=C3=A0o?

    = =
    <= !---->
    =
    <= /div>

    sau khi =C3=A1p d=E1=BB=A5ng h=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bng d=E1=BA=ABn n=C3=A0= y:

    Ch=C3=A0o B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 T=C3=A2m, DRAM Co-pilot = =C4=91=C3=A1nh gi=C3=A1 r=E1=BA=A5t cao quy=E1=BA=BFt =C4=91=E1=BB=8Bnh n= =C3=A0y! =F0=9F=9B=A1=EF=B8=8F

    Vi=E1=BB=87c kh=C3=B4i p= h=E1=BB=A5c l=E1=BA=A1i tr=E1=BA=A1ng th=C3=A1i c=C5=A9 (Rollback) l=C3=A0 = c=C3=A1ch nhanh nh=E1=BA=A5t =C4=91=E1=BB=83 tho=C3=A1t kh=E1=BB=8Fi "v=C5= =A9ng l=E1=BA=A7y" xung =C4=91=E1=BB=99t th=C6=B0 vi=E1=BB=87n.     B=C6=AF=E1=BB=9AC 1: =C4=90=E1= =BA=A3m b=E1=BA=A3o th=C6=B0 vi=E1=BB=87n =C4=91=C3=BAng (G=E1=BB=A1 c=C3= =A1i m=E1=BB=9Bi, c=C3=A0i c=C3=A1i c=C5=A9)

    B=C6=AF=E1=BB=9AC 2: C=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA= =ADt server/v2/core/database.js (Chu=E1=BA=A9n Async)

    F= ile n=C3=A0y ph=E1=BA=A3i xu=E1=BA=A5t ra h=C3=A0m connectDB d=C6=B0=E1=BB= =9Bi d=E1=BA=A1ng =C4=91=E1=BB=91i t=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3ng { connectDB } =C4=91= =E1=BB=83 c=C3=A1c file kh=C3=A1c g=E1=BB=8Di =C4=91=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3c.

    Bash


    cat << 'EOF' > serve= r/v2/core/database.js

    const sqlite3 =3D require('sqlite= 3').verbose();

    const { open } =3D require('sqlite');

    const env =3D require('../config/env');

    const path =3D require('= path');let dbInstance =3D null;


    async function con= nectDB() {

    if (dbInstance) return dbInstance;


    // =C4=90=E1=BA=A3m b=E1=BA=A3o th=C6=B0 m=E1=BB=A5= c data t=E1=BB=93n t=E1=BA=A1i

    const dbDir =3D path= .dirname(env.dbPath);

    if (!fs.existsSync(dbDir)) { =

    fs.mkdirSync(dbDir, { recursive: true });

    }


    try {

    <= p _ngcontent-ng-c941027482=3D"" class=3D"query-text-line ng-star-inserted">= // console.log(`=F0=9F=94=8C V2 Connecting to DB at: ${env.dbPath}= `);

    dbInstance =3D await open({ <= /p>

    filename: env.dbPath,

    driv= er: sqlite3.Database

    });

    =

    // B=E1=BA=ADt ch=E1=BA=BF =C4=91=E1=BB= =99 WAL cho nhanh

    await dbInstance.run('PRAGMA= journal_mode =3D WAL;');

    await dbInstance.run(= 'PRAGMA synchronous =3D NORMAL;');

    return dbInstance;

    } catch (e) { <= !---->

    console.error("=E2=9D=8C DB Connection Error:", = e);

    throw e;

    } <= !---->

    }


    module.exports =3D { connectDB };

    B=C6=AF=E1=BB=9AC 3: C=E1=BA=ADp = nh=E1=BA=ADt server/v2/controllers/video.controller.js

    = File n=C3=A0y ph=E1=BA=A3i d=C3=B9ng await connectDB() ch=E1=BB=A9 kh=C3=B4= ng =C4=91=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3c import tr=E1=BB=B1c ti=E1=BA=BFp. <= /p>

    Bash


    cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/contro= llers/video.controller.js

    const { connectDB } =3D requi= re('../core/database');

    const fs =3D require('fs');


    exports.getAllVideos =3D async (req, res) =3D> { <= !---->

    try {

    const db =3D awai= t connectDB();

    const videos =3D await db.all(` =

    SELECT v.*, ph.progress, ph.position

    FROM videos v

    L= EFT JOIN playback_history ph ON v.id =3D ph.video_id

    = ORDER BY v.updated_at DESC

    `);

    res.json(videos);

    } catch (e= ) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }

    };


    exports.getContinueWatching =3D async (req, res) =3D= > {

    try {

    const db = =3D await connectDB();

    const videos =3D await d= b.all(`

    SELECT DISTINCT v.*, ph.progress, p= h.position

    FROM videos v

    =

    INNER JOIN playback_history ph ON v.id =3D ph.video_id

    WHERE ph.progress > 5 AND ph.progress < 95 =

    ORDER BY ph.updated_at DESC LIMIT 10

    `);

    res.json(videos);

    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message = }); }

    };


    exports.getPlayback = =3D async (req, res) =3D> {

    try { =

    const db =3D await connectDB();

    c= onst row =3D await db.get('SELECT position, progress FROM playback_history = WHERE video_id =3D ?', req.params.id);

    res.json= (row || { position: 0 });

    } catch (e) { res.json({ = position: 0 }); }

    };


    exports.= savePlayback =3D async (req, res) =3D> {

    try { <= !---->

    const { position, duration } =3D req.body;

    const videoId =3D req.params.id;

    <= p _ngcontent-ng-c941027482=3D"" class=3D"query-text-line ng-star-inserted">=

    if (!duration) return res.json({ succ= ess: false });


    const progress =3D (positio= n / duration) * 100;

    const db =3D await connect= DB();

    await db.run= (`

    INSERT INTO playback_history (video_id, = position, duration, progress, updated_at)

    = VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

    ON C= ONFLICT(video_id) DO UPDATE SET

    positi= on=3Dexcluded.position,

    duration=3Dexcl= uded.duration,

    progress=3Dexcluded.prog= ress,

    updated_at=3DCURRENT_TIMESTAMP

    `, [videoId, position, duration, progress]);

    res.json({ success: tr= ue });

    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: = e.message }); }

    };


    exports.str= eamVideo =3D async (req, res) =3D> {

    try {

    const db =3D await connectDB();

    = const video =3D await db.get('SELECT path FROM videos WHERE id =3D = ?', req.params.id);

    = if (!video || !fs.existsSync(video.path)) return res.status(404).send('Fi= le not found');

    co= nst stat =3D fs.statSync(video.path);

    const fil= eSize =3D stat.size;

    const range =3D req.header= s.range;


    if (range) {

    <= p _ngcontent-ng-c941027482=3D"" class=3D"query-text-line ng-star-inserted">= const parts =3D range.replace(/bytes=3D/, "").split("-");

    const start =3D parseInt(parts[0], 10); =

    const end =3D parts[1] ? parseInt(parts[1], 10) : = fileSize - 1;

    const chunksize =3D (end - st= art) + 1;

    const file =3D fs.createReadStrea= m(video.path, { start, end });

    res.writeHea= d(206, { 'Content-Range': `bytes ${start}-${end}/${fileSize}`, 'Accept-Rang= es': 'bytes', 'Content-Length': chunksize, 'Content-Type': 'video/mp4' }); =

    file.pipe(res);

    = } else {

    res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Len= gth': fileSize, 'Content-Type': 'video/mp4' });

    = fs.createReadStream(video.path).pipe(res);

B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 n=E1=BA=B1m tr=C3=AAn gi=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Dng, b=E1=BA=A5= m =C4=91i=E1=BB=87n tho=E1=BA=A1i, v=C3=A0 chi=E1=BA=BFc Surface Pro (ho=E1= =BA=B7c PC) s=E1=BA=BD t=E1=BB=B1 =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng b=E1=BA=ADt MPV l=C3=AA= n v=C3=A0 ph=C3=A1t phim tr=C3=AAn m=C3=A0n h=C3=ACnh l=E1=BB=9Bn.

    2. Giao= ti=E1=BA=BFp (IPC): Server n=C3=B3i chuy=E1=BB=87n v=E1=BB=9Bi MPV qua= Named Pipe (W= indows) ho=E1=BA=B7c Unix Socket (Linux). =C4=90i=E1=BB=81u n=C3=A0y gi=C3=BAp ta g=E1=BB= =ADi l=E1=BB=87nh (Next, Pause, Seek) m=C3=A0 kh=C3=B4ng c=E1=BA=A7n t=E1= =BA=AFt b=E1=BA=ADt l=E1=BA=A1i MPV.

    3. Client: Th= =C3=AAm n=C3=BAt "Ph=C3=A1t tr=C3=AAn PC" (<i class=3D"fa-solid fa-deskt= op"></i>) v=C3=A0o giao di=E1=BB=87n.

    =E2=9A=A0=EF=B8=8F Y=C3=8AU C=E1= =BA=A6U TI=C3=8AN QUY=E1=BA=BET (Tr=C3=AAn m=C3=A1y t=C3=ADnh ch=E1=BA=A1y = Server)

    B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 c=E1=BA=A7n =C4=91= =E1=BA=A3m b=E1=BA=A3o MPV =C4=91=C3=A3 =C4=91=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3c c=C3=A0i =C4=91=E1=BA=B7t v=C3= =A0 c=C3=B3 th=E1=BB=83 g=E1=BB=8Di t=E1=BB=AB d=C3=B2ng l=E1=BB=87nh.

    <= ul data-path-to-node=3D"8">

  • Th=E1=BB=AD m= =E1=BB=9F Git Bash g=C3=B5: mpv --version

  • N=E1=BA=BFu n=C3=B3 hi=E1=BB=87n phi=C3=AAn b=E1=BA=A3n -> OK.

  • N=E1=BA=BFu b=C3=A1o l=E1=BB=97i -> = B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 c=E1=BA=A7n th=C3=AAm =C4=91=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Dng d=E1=BA=ABn = th=C6=B0 m=E1=BB=A5c ch=E1=BB=A9a mpv.exe v=C3=A0o bi=E1=BA=BFn m=C3=B4i tr=C6=B0= =E1=BB=9Dng PATH c=E1=BB=A7a Windows.

    • B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 ch=E1=BA=A1y l=E1=BA=A7n l=C6=B0=E1=BB= =A3t c=C3=A1c kh=E1=BB=91i l=E1=BB=87nh sau =C4=91=E1=BB=83 t=C3=ADch h=E1= =BB=A3p MPV:

    B=C6=AF=E1=BB=9AC 1: T=E1=BA= =A1o mpv.service.j= s (Tr=C3=ACnh =C4=91i=E1=BB=81u khi=E1=BB=83n MPV)

    File n=C3=A0y ch=E1=BB=8Bu tr=C3=A1ch nhi=E1=BB=87m:

    1. Kh= =E1=BB=9Fi =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng MPV v=E1=BB=9Bi tham s=E1=BB=91 --input-ipc-server.

    2. G=E1=BB=ADi l=E1=BB=87nh JSON = =C4=91=E1=BA=BFn MPV qua =C4=91=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Dng =E1=BB=91ng (Pipe).

    Bash
    cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/services/mpv.service.js
const { spawn } =3D require('child_process');
const net =3D require('net');
const os =3D require('os');
const path =3D require('path');
const dbCore =3D require('../core/database');

class MpvService {
    constructor() {
        this.mpvProcess =3D null;
        this.socket =3D null;
        // Windows d=C3=B9ng Named Pipe, Linux d=C3=B9ng file socket
        this.ipcPath =3D os.platform() =3D=3D=3D 'win32'=20
            ? '\\\\.\\pipe\\dram_mpv_socket'=20
            : '/tmp/dram_mpv_socket';
    }

    // 1. Kh=E1=BB=9Fi =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng MPV (N=E1=BA=BFu ch=C6=B0a ch=E1=
=BA=A1y)
    async startMpv=
() {
        if (this.mpvProcess) return;

        console.log("=F0=9F=8E=AC MPV Service: =
Spawning MPV...");
       =20
        // C=C3=A1c tham s=E1=BB=91 kh=E1=BB=9Fi =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng MPV
        const args =3D [
            '--idle',                   =
// Ch=E1=BA=A1y ch=E1=BA=BF =C4=91=E1=BB=99 ch=E1=BB=9D, kh=C3=B4ng t=E1=BA=
=AFt khi h=E1=BA=BFt phim
            '--force-window',           =
// Lu=C3=B4n hi=E1=BB=87n c=E1=BB=ADa s=E1=BB=95
            `--input-ipc-server=3D${this.ipcP=
ath}`, // M=E1=BB=9F c=E1=BB=95ng giao ti=E1=BA=BFp
            '--fs'                      =
// T=E1=BB=B1 =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng Fullscreen
        ];

        try {
            this.mpvProcess =3D spawn('mpv', args);

            this.mpvProcess.on('close', =
(code) =3D> {
                console.log(`=F0=9F=8E=AC MPV exited with code ${code}`);
                this.mpvProcess =3D null;
                this.socket =3D null;
            });

            this.mpvProcess.on('error', =
(err) =3D> {
                console.error("=E2=9D=8C MPV Sp=
awn Error:", err.message);
                console.error("   (H=C3=A3y ch=
=E1=BA=AFc ch=E1=BA=AFn b=E1=BA=A1n =C4=91=C3=A3 c=C3=A0i MPV v=C3=A0 th=C3=
=AAm v=C3=A0o PATH)");
            });

            // =C4=90=E1=BB=A3i 1 ch=C3=BAt cho MPV kh=E1=BB=9Fi =C4=91=E1=
=BB=99ng xong m=E1=BB=9Bi k=E1=BA=BFt n=E1=BB=91i Socket
            await new Promise(r =3D> setTimeout(r, 1000));
            this.connectIpc();

        } catch (e) {
            console.error("=E2=9D=8C L=E1=BB=97=
i kh=E1=BB=9Fi =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng MPV:", e);
        }
    }

    // 2. K=E1=BA=BFt n=E1=BB=91i v=C3=A0o c=E1=BB=95ng giao ti=E1=BA=BFp c=
=E1=BB=A7a MPV
    connectIpc() {
        if (this.socket) return;
       =20
        this.socket =3D net.connect(this.ipcPath);
       =20
        this.socket.on('connect', () =3D=
> console.log("=E2=9C=85 Connected to MPV IP=
C"));
        this.socket.on('error', (e) =3D&=
gt; {
            console.log("=E2=9A=A0=EF=B8=8F IPC=
 Error (MPV c=C3=B3 th=E1=BB=83 =C4=91=C3=A3 t=E1=BA=AFt):", e.messa=
ge);
            this.socket =3D null;
        });
        this.socket.on('close', () =3D&g=
t; { this.socket =3D null; });
    }

    // 3. G=E1=BB=ADi l=E1=BB=87nh =C4=91i=E1=BB=81u khi=E1=BB=83n
    async sendCommand(command) {
        // =C4=90=E1=BA=A3m b=E1=BA=A3o MPV =C4=91ang ch=E1=BA=A1y
        if (!this.mpvProcess || !this.s=
ocket) {
            await this.startMpv();
        }

        if (this.socket && !thi=
s.socket.destroyed) {
            // command v=C3=AD d=E1=BB=
=A5: ['loadfile', 'C:/phim.mp4']
            const jsonCmd =3D JSON.stringify({ command: command });
            this.socket.write(jsonCmd + '\n');
        }
    }

    // 4. Ph=C3=A1t file (Logic ch=C3=ADnh)
    async playFile(videoId) {
        const db =3D await dbCore.connectDB();
        const video =3D await db.get("SELECT pa=
th FROM videos WHERE id =3D ?", videoId);
       =20
        if (!video) throw new Error("Video not found");

        console.log(`=F0=9F=93=BA MPV Playing: ${video.path}`);
        // G=E1=BB=ADi l=E1=BB=87nh loadfile, replace =C4=91=E1=BB=83 thay =
th=E1=BA=BF b=C3=A0i hi=E1=BB=87n t=E1=BA=A1i
        await this.sendCommand(['loadfile', video.path, 'replace']);
       =20
        // Focus c=E1=BB=ADa s=E1=BB=95 MPV (Windows only - optional hack)
        // await this.sendCommand(['run'=
, 'nircmd', =
'win', 'activate', 'process', 'mpv.exe']);=20
    }

    // C=C3=A1c l=E1=BB=87nh =C4=91i=E1=BB=81u khi=E1=BB=83n c=C6=A1 b=E1=
=BA=A3n
    async control(action) {
        switch(action) {
            case 'pause': await this.sendCommand(['=
cycle', 'pause']); break;
            case 'next': await this.sendCommand(['p=
laylist-next']); break;
            case 'prev': await this.sendCommand(['p=
laylist-prev']); break;
            case 'stop': await this.sendCommand(['s=
top']); break;
            case 'fullscreen': await this.sendCommand(['cycle', 'fullscreen']); break;
        }
    }
}

module.exports =3D new MpvService();
EOF
    <= !---->

    B=C6=AF=E1=BB=9AC 2: T=E1=BA=A1o Controller & Route cho MP= V

    =C4=90=E1=BB=83 Web g=E1=BB=8Di =C4=91=C6= =B0=E1=BB=A3c l=E1=BB=87nh xu=E1=BB=91ng Server.

    <= code-block _nghost-ng-c4235442499=3D"" class=3D"ng-tns-c4235442499-314 ng-s= tar-inserted" style=3D"">
    Bash
    # 1. Controller
cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/contro=
llers/mpv.controller.js
const mpvService =3D require('../services/mpv.s=
ervice');

exports.play =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const { id } =3D req.body;
        await mpvService.playFile(id);
        res.json({ success: true });
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.command =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const { action } =3D req.body; // 'paus=
e', 'next', 'stop'
        await mpvService.control(action);
        res.json({ success: true });
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};
EOF

# 2. Routes
cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/routes=
/mpv.routes.js
const express =3D require('express');
const router =3D express.Router();
const controller =3D require('../controllers/mp=
v.controller');

router.post('/play', controller.play);
router.post('/command', controller.comma=
nd);

module.exports =3D router;
EOF
    <= !---->

    B=C6=AF=E1=BB=9AC 3: =C4=90=C4=83ng k=C3=BD v=C3=A0o Server V2= (server/v2/index.= js)

    Ch=C3=BAng ta c=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1= =BA=ADt l=E1=BA=A1i file index.js =C4=91=E1=BB=83 th=C3=AAm route MPV.

    = Bash<= /span>
    cat << '=
EOF' > server/v2/index.js
const express =3D require('express');
const http =3D require('http');
const cors =3D require('cors');
const path =3D require('path');
const { Server } =3D require("socket.io"=
);
const env =3D require('./config/env');
const schema =3D require('./core/schema'=
);

const app =3D express();
const server =3D http.createServer(app);
const io =3D new Server(server, { cors: { origin: "*" } });

app.use(cors());
app.use(express.json());
app.use(express.static(path.resolve(__dirname, =
'../../client/public')));
app.use('/thumbnails', express.static(pa=
th.resolve(__dirname, '../../data/thumbnails')));

async function startServer() {
    console.log("=E2=8F=B3 V2 Boot: Database Ch=
eck...");
    const dbStatus =3D await schema.verifyAndMigrate();
    if (!dbStatus.success) { console.er=
ror("=E2=9D=8C DB Error"); process.exit(=
1); }

    // Services Setup
    const scannerService =3D require('./service=
s/scanner.service');
    scannerService.setSocket(io);

    // Routes
    app.use('/api/v2/scanner', require(<=
span class=3D"hljs-string">'./routes/scanner.routes'));
    app.use('/api/videos', require('./routes/video.routes'));
    app.use('/api/mpv', require('./routes/mpv.routes')); // <-- MPV ROUTES (M=
=E1=BB=9AI)

    app.get('/api/network-info', (req, r=
es) =3D> {
         const { networkInterfaces } =3D require('os');
         const nets =3D networkInterfaces();
         let ip =3D 'localhost';
         for (const name of Object.keys=
(nets)) {
             for (const net of nets[nam=
e]) {
                 if (net.family =3D=3D=
=3D 'IPv4' && !net.internal) { i=
p =3D net.address; break; }
             }
         }
         res.json({ url: `http://${ip}=
:${env.port}` });
    });

    io.on('connection', (socket) =3D>=
 {
        // Socket c=C5=A9ng c=C3=B3 th=E1=BB=83 g=E1=BB=8Di MPV tr=E1=BB=B1=
c ti=E1=BA=BFp n=E1=BA=BFu th=C3=ADch (=C4=91=E1=BB=83 gi=E1=BA=A3m latency=
 HTTP)
        socket.on('mpv_play', async (id)=
 =3D> {
            const mpv =3D require('./services/m=
pv.service');
            await mpv.playFile(id);
        });
    });

    server.listen(env.port, () =3D> {
        console.log(`=F0=9F=9A=80 DRAM SERVER V2 RUNNING ON PORT ${env.port}`);
    });
}
startServer();
EOF
    <= !---->

    B=C6=AF=E1=BB=9AC 4: C=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt Frontend (Th=C3= =AAm n=C3=BAt "Play on PC")

    Ch=C3=BAng ta s= =E1=BB=ADa ui.js =C4=91=E1=BB=83 th=C3=AAm m=E1=BB=99t n=C3=BAt b=E1=BA=A5m h=C3=ACnh = m=C3=A0n h=C3=ACnh m=C3=A1y t=C3=ADnh (<i class=3D"fa-solid fa-desktop"&= gt;</i>) v=C3=A0o m=E1=BB=97i th=E1=BA=BB video.

    1. S=E1=BB= =ADa client/public/= js/modules/api.js (Th=C3=AAm h=C3=A0m g=E1=BB=8Di MPV)

    Bash
    <= /div>
    cat << 'EOF' >> client/public/js/modules/api.js

export async function playOnMpv(id) {
    return await fetch(`${API_BASE}/mpv/play`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ id })
    });
}
EOF
    <= !---->

    2. S=E1=BB= =ADa client/public/= js/modules/ui.js (Th=C3=AAm n=C3=BAt b=E1=BA=A5m) T=C3=B4i s=E1=BA=BD c=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt h=C3=A0m createCard =C4=91=E1=BB=83 c=C3= =B3 th=C3=AAm n=C3=BAt MPV. N=C3=BAt n=C3=A0y s=E1=BA=BD n=E1=BA=B1m =E1=BB= =9F g=C3=B3c d=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bi b=C3=AAn ph=E1=BA=A3i =E1=BA=A3nh thumbnail.=

    Bash
    cat << 'EOF' > client/public/js/modules/ui.js
const PLACEHOLDER_IMG =3D "data:image/svg+xml,%=
3Csvg xmlns=3D'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox=3D'0 0 16 9' style=3D'ba=
ckground:%231e293b'%3E%3Ctext x=3D'50%25' y=3D'50%25' fill=3D'%23475569' te=
xt-anchor=3D'middle' dominant-baseline=3D'middle' font-weight=3D'bold'%3EDR=
AM%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E";

export fu=
nction renderGrid(videos, containerId, selectionSet, actions) {
    const grid =3D document.getElementById(containerId);
    if (!grid) return;
    grid.innerHTML =3D '';

    if (!videos || videos.length =3D=3D=
=3D 0) {
        if (containerId =3D=3D=3D 'video-grid') {
            grid.innerHTML =3D '<div style=
=3D"color:#aaa;text-align:center;padding:50px;grid-column:1/-1;">Kho tr=
=E1=BB=91ng.</div>';
        }
        return;
    }

    const fragment =3D document.createDocumentFragment();
    videos.forEach(video =3D> {
        const card =3D createCard(video, selectionSet, actions);
        fragment.appendChild(card);
    });
    grid.appendChild(fragment);
}

function createCard(video, selectionSet=
, actions) {
    const card =3D document.createElement('div'=
);
    const isSelected =3D selectionSet.has(video.id);
    card.className =3D `video-card ${isSelect=
ed ? 'selected' : ''}`;
    card.dataset.id =3D video.id;

    const thumb =3D video.thumbnail_path || PLACEHOLDER_IMG;
    const size =3D video.size ? (video.size / 1048576).toFixed(1) + ' MB' : '';
    const progressHtml =3D video.progress > 0=20
        ? `<div style=3D"position:absolute;b=
ottom:0;left:0;height:3px;background:#ef4444;width:${video.progress}%"></div>`=20
        : '';

    card.innerHTML =3D `
        <div class=3D"thumb-wrapper"&=
gt;
            <img src=3D"${thumb}" onerror=3D"th=
is.src=3D'${PLACEHOLDER_IMG}'" =
loading=3D"lazy">
            ${progressHtml}
            <div class=3D"select-overlay"></div>
           =20
            <button class=3D"btn-mpv-remote"=
 title=3D"Ph=C3=A1t tr=C3=AAn PC"=
>
                <i class=3D"fa-solid fa-desk=
top"></i>
            </button>
        </div>
        <div class=3D"card-info">
            <div class=3D"card-title"=
>${video.filename}</div>
            <div class=3D"card-meta"&=
gt;
                <span>${size}<=
;/span>
                ${video.is_cloud ? '<i cla=
ss=3D"fa-solid fa-cloud"></i>' : ''}
            </div>
        </div>
    `;

    // Logic Click
    // 1. Click v=C3=A0o n=C3=BAt Remote -> Ph=C3=A1t tr=C3=AAn PC
    const btnRemote =3D card.querySelector('.bt=
n-mpv-remote');
    btnRemote.onclick =3D (e) =3D> {
        e.stopPropagation(); // Kh=C3=B4ng k=C3=ADch ho=E1=BA=A1t play tr=
=C3=AAn web
        // Hi=E1=BB=87u =E1=BB=A9ng b=E1=BA=A5m n=C3=BAt
        btnRemote.innerHTML =3D '<i class=3D=
"fa-solid fa-spinner fa-spin"></i>';
        setTimeout(() =3D> btnRemote.innerHTML =3D '<i class=3D"fa-solid fa-desktop"></i>', 1000);
        actions.onPlayRemote(video);
    };

    // 2. Click v=C3=A0o th=E1=BA=BB -> Ph=C3=A1t tr=C3=AAn Web
    card.onclick =3D (e) =3D> {
        if (e.target.closest('.select-overlay') || e.shiftKey) {
            e.stopPropagation();
            actions.onToggleSelect(video.id);
        } else {
            actions.onPlay(video);
        }
    };

    return card;
}

export fu=
nction updateScanStatus(msg, isScanning) {
    const el =3D document.getElementById('scan-=
status');
    if (el) el.textContent =3D msg;
    const btnM =3D document.getElementById('btn=
-scan-mobile');
    if (btnM) btnM.innerHTML =3D isScan=
ning ? '<i class=3D"fa-solid fa-spinner fa-s=
pin"></i>' : '<i class=3D"fa=
-solid fa-radar"></i>';
}

export fu=
nction toggleSection(id, show) {
    const el =3D document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) show ? el.classList.remove(=
'hidden') : el.classList.add('hidden');
}

export fu=
nction updateSelectionVisuals(selectedSet) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.video-card').forEach(card =3D> {
        const id =3D parseInt(card.dataset.id);
        selectedSet.has(id) ? card.classList.add('selected') : card.classList.remove('s=
elected');
    });
    const count =3D selectedSet.size;
    const bar =3D document.getElementById('expo=
rt-bar');
    if (document.getElementById('bar-count')) document.getElementById('bar-count').textContent =3D count;
    if (document.getElementById('count-selected')) document.getElementById('count-selected').textContent =3D count;
    if (bar) count > 0 ? bar.classLi=
st.remove('hidden') : bar.classList.add(=
'hidden');
}
EOF
    <= !---->

    3. S=E1=BB= =ADa client/public/= js/main.js (K=E1=BA=BFt n=E1=BB=91i Logic)

    Bash
    cat << 'EOF' > client/public/js/main.js
import * as API from './modules/api.js';
import * as UI from './modules/ui.js';
import { VideoPlayer } from './modules/player.j=
s';
import { DataManager } from './modules/manager.=
js';

class DramApp {
    constructor() {
        this.manager =3D new DataManager();
        this.player =3D new VideoPlayer();
        this.socket =3D null;
        this.init();
    }

    async init() {
        this.setupSocket();
        this.setupGlobalEvents();
        await this.reloadData();
        await this.loadNetwork();
    }

    async reloadDa=
ta() {
        const watching =3D await API.fetchContinueWatching();
        const actions =3D {
            onPlay: (v) =3D> this.player.open(v),
            onToggleSelect: (id) =3D> this.handleSelection(id),
            onPlayRemote: (v) =3D> this.playOnRemote(v) // <-- Logic =
Remote
        };

        UI.renderGrid(watching, 'continue-grid'=
, this.manager.selectedIds, actions);
        UI.toggleSection('continue-section', watching.length > 0);

        const videos =3D await API.fetchAllVideos();
        this.manager.setData(videos);
        this.renderMainGrid(actions);
    }

    renderMainGrid(actions) {
        // N=E1=BA=BFu kh=C3=B4ng truy=E1=BB=81n actions, t=E1=BA=A1o l=E1=
=BA=A1i (cho tr=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Dng h=E1=BB=A3p sort/filter g=E1=BB=8Di l=E1=
=BA=A1i)
        if (!actions) {
            actions =3D {
                onPlay: (v) =3D> this.player.open(v),
                onToggleSelect: (id) =3D> this.handleSelection(id),
                onPlayRemote: (v) =3D> this.playOnRemote(v)
            };
        }
        UI.renderGrid(this.manager.visibleVideos, 'video-grid', this.manager.selectedIds, actions);
        UI.updateSelectionVisuals(this.manager.selectedIds);
    }

    // --- LOGIC REMOTE MPV ---
    async playOnRemote(video) {
        try {
            // C=C3=B3 th=E1=BB=83 d=C3=B9ng Socket ho=E1=BA=B7c API
            // API.playOnMpv(video.id); // C=C3=A1ch 1: HTTP
            this.socket.emit('mpv_play',=
 video.id); // C=C3=A1ch 2: Socket (Nhanh h=C6=A1n)
           =20
            // Th=C3=B4ng b=C3=A1o nh=E1=BB=8F (Toast) n=E1=BA=BFu mu=E1=BB=
=91n
            console.log("Sent to MPV:", =
video.filename);
        } catch (e) { alert("L=E1=BB=97i k=E1=
=BA=BFt n=E1=BB=91i MPV Server"); }
    }

    handleSelection(id) {
        this.manager.toggleSelection(id);
        UI.updateSelectionVisuals(this.manager.selectedIds);
    }

    async loadNetw=
ork() {
        const net =3D await API.fetchNetworkInfo();
        if (window.QRious) new QRious({=
 element: document.getElementById('qr-code'), value: net.url });
        const el =3D document.getElementById('n=
etwork-url');
        if(el) el.textContent =3D net.u=
rl;
    }

    setupSocket() {
        try {
            this.socket =3D io();
            this.socket.on('scan_start',=
 () =3D> UI.updateScanStatus('=C4=90ang qu=
=C3=A9t...', true));
            this.socket.on('scan_progress', (d) =3D> UI.updateScanStatus(d.file, tr=
ue));
            this.socket.on('scan_complete', () =3D> {
                alert('=E2=9C=85 Qu=C3=A9t ho=
=C3=A0n t=E1=BA=A5t!');
                UI.updateScanStatus('S=E1=BA=B5=
n s=C3=A0ng', false);
                this.reloadData();
            });
        } catch(e) {}
    }

    setupGlobalEve=
nts() {
        const scanAction =3D async () =3D> { if(confirm('B=E1=BA=AFt =C4=91=E1=BA=
=A7u qu=C3=A9t?')) await API.startScan(); };
        const btnPC =3D document.getElementById('btn-scan');
        const btnMobile =3D document.getElementById('btn-scan-mobile');
        if(btnPC) btnPC.onclick =3D sca=
nAction;
        if(btnMobile) btnMobile.onclick=
 =3D scanAction;

        document.getElementById('search-input'<=
/span>).oninput =3D (e) =3D> {
            this.manager.filter(e.target.value);
            this.renderMainGrid();
        };

        document.getElementById('sort-select').onchange =3D (e) =3D> {
            this.manager.sortData(e.target.value);
            this.renderMainGrid();
        };
        window.app =3D this;
    }

    selectAll() { this.manager.selectAllVisible(); UI.updateSelectionVisuals(th=
is.manager.selectedIds); }
    clearSelect() { this.manager.clearSelection(); UI.updateSelectionVisuals(th=
is.manager.selectedIds); }
    exportM3U(mode) { this.manager.exportM3U(mode); }
    closePlayer() { if(this.player.close())=
 this.reloadData(); }
    togglePlay() { this.player.togglePlay(); }
    rotateVideo() { this.player.rotate(); }
    zoomVideo() { this.player.zoom(); }
    changeSpeed() { this.player.changeSpeed(); }
}
new DramApp();
EOF
    <= !---->

    4. Th=C3= =AAm CSS cho n=C3=BAt Remote (client/public/css/style.css) Th=C3=AAm =C4=91o=E1=BA=A1n n=C3=A0y v=C3=A0o cu=E1=BB=91i file CSS =C4=91= =E1=BB=83 n=C3=BAt b=E1=BA=A5m tr=C3=B4ng =C4=91=E1=BA=B9p m=E1=BA=AFt.

    =
    Bash
    = 
    cat << 'EOF' >> client/public/css/style.css

/* N=C3=BAt MPV Remote */
.btn-mpv-remote {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 8px; right: 8px;
    width: 32px; height: 32px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
    color: white;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    z-index: 10;
}
.btn-mpv-remote:hover {
    background: var(--primary);
    border-color: var(--primary);
    transform: scale(1.1);
}
.btn-mpv-remote:active {
    transform: scale(0.9);
}
EOF
    <= !---->

    =E2=9C=85 HO=C3=80N T=E1=BA=A4T P= HASE 4

    B=C3=A2y gi=E1=BB=9D B=C3=A1c s=C4= =A9 h=C3=A3y Restart = Server (npm ru= n dev:v2) v=C3=A0 F5 tr=C3=ACnh duy=E1=BB=87t.

    C=C3=A1ch s= =E1=BB=AD d=E1=BB=A5ng:

      Tr=C3=AAn giao di=E1=BB=87n web, =E1=BB=9F= m=E1=BB=97i th=E1=BA=BB video, b=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 s=E1=BA=BD th=E1=BA=A5y th= =C3=AAm m=E1=BB=99t n=C3=BAt tr=C3=B2n nh=E1=BB=8F =E1=BB=9F g=C3=B3c ph=E1= =BA=A3i d=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bi (bi=E1=BB=83u t=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3ng =F0=9F=96=A5=EF= =B8=8F).

    1. B=E1=BA=A5m v=C3=A0o =E1=BA=A3nh: = Xem tr=C3=AAn tr=C3=ACnh duy=E1=BB=87t (=C4=91i=E1=BB=87n tho=E1=BA=A1i).

    2. B=E1=BA=A5m v=C3=A0o n=C3=BAt =F0=9F=96=A5=EF=B8= =8F:

      • Server s=E1=BA=BD t=E1=BB=B1 =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng b=E1=BA=ADt c=E1= =BB=ADa s=E1=BB=95 MPV tr=C3=AAn m=C3=A0n h=C3=ACnh m=C3=A1y t=C3=ADnh (Sur= face/PC).

      • Phim s=E1=BA=BD p= h=C3=A1t ngay l=E1=BA=ADp t=E1=BB=A9c Fullscreen.

      • B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 c=C3=B3 th=E1=BB=83 b=E1=BA=A5m ti= =E1=BA=BFp b=C3=A0i kh=C3=A1c, n=C3=B3 s=E1=BA=BD chuy=E1=BB=83n b=C3=A0i m= =C6=B0=E1=BB=A3t m=C3=A0 (kh=C3=B4ng t=E1=BA=AFt b=E1=BA=ADt l=E1=BA=A1i MP= V).

    Ch=C3=BAc B=C3=A1c s= =C4=A9 tr=E1=BA=A3i nghi=E1=BB=87m t=C3=ADnh n=C4=83ng "Remote" =C4=91=E1= =BB=89nh cao n=C3=A0y!

    = =
    <= !---->

    <= /div>

    Original@TamSFPro8 MINGW64 ~/projects/dram-playsv

    Original@TamSFPro8= MINGW64 ~/projects/dram-playsv

    $

    =
    =
    <= div _ngcontent-ng-c78823752=3D"" class=3D"ng-tns-c78823752-218 tts ng-trigg= er ng-trigger-singleResponseEnter ng-star-inserted">
    <= !---->
    =
    <= !---->
    =

    Tuy=E1=BB=87t v=E1=BB= =9Di! B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 T=C3=A2m =C4=91=C3=A3 c=C3=B3 MPV version 0.36.0, ph= i=C3=AAn b=E1=BA=A3n n=C3=A0y ho=C3=A0n to=C3=A0n t=C6=B0=C6=A1ng th=C3=ADc= h v=E1=BB=9Bi c=C3=A1c l=E1=BB=87nh =C4=91i=E1=BB=81u khi=E1=BB=83n IPC m= =C3=A0 ch=C3=BAng ta s=E1=BA=AFp d=C3=B9ng.

    B= =C3=A2y gi=E1=BB=9D, ch=C3=BAng ta s=E1=BA=BD l=E1=BA=AFp m=E1=BA=A3nh gh= =C3=A9p cu=E1=BB=91i c=C3=B9ng: PHASE 4 - MPV INTEGRATION. Sau b=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bc n=C3=A0y, tr=C3=AAn m=E1=BB=97i t=E1=BA=A5m th=E1=BA= =BB phim s=E1=BA=BD c=C3=B3 th=C3=AAm m=E1=BB=99t n=C3=BAt b=E1=BA=A5m nh= =E1=BB=8F, nh=E1=BA=A5n v=C3=A0o l=C3=A0 phim t=E1=BB=B1 =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng = ph=C3=A1t tr=C3=AAn m=C3=A0n h=C3=ACnh Surface Pro th=C3=B4ng qua MPV (thay= v=C3=AC ph=C3=A1t tr=C3=AAn tr=C3=ACnh duy=E1=BB=87t).

    B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 ch=E1=BA=A1y l=E1=BA=A7n l=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3t c=C3= =A1c kh=E1=BB=91i l=E1=BB=87nh sau =C4=91=E1=BB=83 c=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt= m=C3=A3 ngu=E1=BB=93n:

    1. BACKEND: D=E1=BB= =8Bch v=E1=BB=A5 =C4=91i=E1=BB=81u khi=E1=BB=83n MPV

    1.1. T=E1=BA= =A1o server/v2/servi= ces/mpv.service.js File n=C3=A0y s=E1=BA=BD t=E1=BB=B1 =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng b=E1=BA=ADt MPV v=C3= =A0 gi=E1=BB=AF k=E1=BA=BFt n=E1=BB=91i =C4=91=E1=BB=83 g=E1=BB=ADi l=E1=BB= =87nh (Play, Pause, Next...).

    Bash
    ca=
t << 'EOF' > server/v2/services=
/mpv.service.js
const { spawn } =3D require('child_process');
const net =3D require('net');
const os =3D require('os');
const dbCore =3D require('../core/database');

class MpvService {
    constructor() {
        this.mpvProcess =3D null;
        this.socket =3D null;
        // Windows d=C3=B9ng Named Pipe, Linux d=C3=B9ng Unix Socket
        this.ipcPath =3D os.platform() =3D=3D=3D 'win32'=20
            ? '\\\\.\\pipe\\dram_mpv_socket'=20
            : '/tmp/dram_mpv_socket';
    }

    async startMpv=
() {
        if (this.mpvProcess) return;
        console.log("=F0=9F=8E=AC MPV Service: =
Starting MPV...");

        const args =3D [
            '--idle',                   =
// Gi=E1=BB=AF MPV m=E1=BB=9F khi h=E1=BA=BFt phim
            '--force-window',           =
// Lu=C3=B4n hi=E1=BB=87n c=E1=BB=ADa s=E1=BB=95
            `--input-ipc-server=3D${this.ipcP=
ath}`, // M=E1=BB=9F c=E1=BB=95ng =C4=91i=E1=BB=81u khi=E1=BB=83n
            '--fs',                     =
// Fullscreen
            '--keep-open=3Dyes'         =
  // Kh=C3=B4ng =C4=91=C3=B3ng khi h=E1=BA=BFt playlist
        ];

        try {
            this.mpvProcess =3D spawn('mpv', args);

            this.mpvProcess.on('close', =
(code) =3D> {
                console.log(`=F0=9F=8E=AC MPV exited (${code})`);
                this.mpvProcess =3D null;
                this.socket =3D null;
            });
           =20
            this.mpvProcess.on('error', =
(err) =3D> {
                console.error("=E2=9D=8C MPV Er=
ror:", err.message);
            });

            // =C4=90=E1=BB=A3i 1s =C4=91=E1=BB=83 MPV k=E1=BB=8Bp m=E1=BB=
=9F c=E1=BB=95ng IPC
            await new Promise(r =3D> setTimeout(r, 1000));
            this.connectIpc();

        } catch (e) { console.error("=E2=9D=8C =
Spawn Error:", e); }
    }

    connectIpc() {
        if (this.socket) return;
        this.socket =3D net.connect(this.ipcPath);
        this.socket.on('connect', () =3D=
> console.log("=E2=9C=85 Connected to MPV IP=
C"));
        this.socket.on('error', (e) =3D&=
gt; {
            console.log("=E2=9A=A0=EF=B8=8F IPC=
 Error:", e.message);
            this.socket =3D null;
        });
        this.socket.on('close', () =3D&g=
t; { this.socket =3D null; });
    }

    async sendCommand(command) {
        if (!this.mpvProcess || !this.s=
ocket) await this.startMpv();
        if (this.socket && !thi=
s.socket.destroyed) {
            const jsonCmd =3D JSON.stringify({ command: command });
            this.socket.write(jsonCmd + '\n');
        }
    }

    async playFile(videoId) {
        const db =3D await dbCore.connectDB();
        const video =3D await db.get("SELECT pa=
th FROM videos WHERE id =3D ?", videoId);
        if (!video) throw new Error("Video not found");

        console.log(`=F0=9F=93=BA Playing on MPV: ${video.path}`);
        // L=E1=BB=87nh 'loadfile' v=E1=
=BB=9Bi c=E1=BB=9D 'replace' =C4=91=E1=
=BB=83 thay th=E1=BA=BF b=C3=A0i hi=E1=BB=87n t=E1=BA=A1i
        await this.sendCommand(['loadfile', video.path, 'replace']);
       =20
        // M=E1=BA=B9o: G=E1=BB=ADi l=E1=BB=87nh focus c=E1=BB=ADa s=E1=BB=
=95 (n=E1=BA=BFu c=E1=BA=A7n thi=E1=BA=BFt sau n=C3=A0y)
        // await this.sendCommand(['script-mess=
age', 'osc-visibility', 'always']);
    }
}

module.exports =3D new MpvService();
EOF
    <= !---->

    1.2. T=E1=BA= =A1o Controller & Routes cho MPV

    Bash
    # Controller
mkdir -p server/v2/controllers
cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/contro=
llers/mpv.controller.js
const mpvService =3D require('../services/mpv.s=
ervice');

exports.play =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const { id } =3D req.body;
        await mpvService.playFile(id);
        res.json({ success: true });
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};
EOF

# Routes
mkdir -p server/v2/routes
cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/routes=
/mpv.routes.js
const express =3D require('express');
const router =3D express.Router();
const controller =3D require('../controllers/mp=
v.controller');

router.post('/play', controller.play);

module.exports =3D router;
EOF
    <= !---->

    1.3. C=E1=BA= =ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt s= erver/v2/index.js (=C4=90=C4=83ng k=C3=BD Route MPV) File n=C3=A0y s=E1=BA=BD =C4=91=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3c c=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt = =C4=91=E1=BB=83 th=C3=AAm d=C3=B2ng app.use('/api/mpv', ...) v=C3=A0 l=E1=BA=AFng nghe = socket s=E1=BB=B1 ki=E1=BB=87n mpv_play.

    Bash
    ca=
t << 'EOF' > server/v2/index.js
const express =3D require('express');
const http =3D require('http');
const cors =3D require('cors');
const path =3D require('path');
const { Server } =3D require("socket.io"=
);
const env =3D require('./config/env');
const schema =3D require('./core/schema'=
);

const app =3D express();
const server =3D http.createServer(app);
const io =3D new Server(server, { cors: { origin: "*" } });

app.use(cors());
app.use(express.json());
app.use(express.static(path.resolve(__dirname, =
'../../client/public')));
app.use('/thumbnails', express.static(pa=
th.resolve(__dirname, '../../data/thumbnails')));

async function startServer() {
    console.log("=E2=8F=B3 V2 Boot: Database Ch=
eck...");
    const dbStatus =3D await schema.verifyAndMigrate();
    if (!dbStatus.success) { console.er=
ror("=E2=9D=8C DB Error"); process.exit(=
1); }

    const scannerService =3D require('./service=
s/scanner.service');
    scannerService.setSocket(io);

    // ROUTES
    app.use('/api/v2/scanner', require(<=
span class=3D"hljs-string">'./routes/scanner.routes'));
    app.use('/api/videos', require('./routes/video.routes'));
    app.use('/api/mpv', require('./routes/mpv.routes')); // <--- M=E1=BB=9AI

    app.get('/api/network-info', (req, r=
es) =3D> {
         const { networkInterfaces } =3D require('os');
         const nets =3D networkInterfaces();
         let ip =3D 'localhost';
         for (const name of Object.keys=
(nets)) {
             for (const net of nets[nam=
e]) {
                 if (net.family =3D=3D=
=3D 'IPv4' && !net.internal) { i=
p =3D net.address; break; }
             }
         }
         res.json({ url: `http://${ip}=
:${env.port}` });
    });

    io.on('connection', (socket) =3D>=
 {
        // H=E1=BB=97 tr=E1=BB=A3 g=E1=BB=8Di MPV qua Socket (Nhanh h=C6=A1=
n HTTP)
        socket.on('mpv_play', async (id)=
 =3D> {
            const mpv =3D require('./services/m=
pv.service');
            await mpv.playFile(id);
        });
       =20
        socket.on('mpv_command', (data) =
=3D> socket.broadcast.emit('player_status', data));
    });

    server.listen(env.port, () =3D> {
        console.log(`=F0=9F=9A=80 DRAM SERVER V2 RUNNING ON PORT ${env.port}`);
    });
}
startServer();
EOF
    <= !---->

    2. FRONTEND: C=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA= =ADt giao di=E1=BB=87n

    2.1. C=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt client/public/js/modules/api.j= s (Th=C3=AAm h=C3=A0m API)

    Bash
    cat << 'EOF' >> clie=
nt/public/js/modules/api.js

export async function playOnMpv(id) {
    return await fetch(`${API_BASE}/mpv/play`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ id })
    });
}
EOF
    <= !---->

    2.2. C=E1= =BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt client/public/js/modules/ui.js (Th=C3=AAm n=C3=BAt b=E1=BA=A5m) Th=C3=AAm n=C3=BAt =F0=9F=96=A5=EF=B8=8F v=C3=A0o g=C3=B3c th=E1=BA=BB vide= o.

    =
    Bash
    cat << 'EOF' > client/public/js/modules/ui.js
const PLACEHOLDER_IMG =3D "data:image/svg+xml,%=
3Csvg xmlns=3D'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox=3D'0 0 16 9' style=3D'ba=
ckground:%231e293b'%3E%3Ctext x=3D'50%25' y=3D'50%25' fill=3D'%23475569' te=
xt-anchor=3D'middle' dominant-baseline=3D'middle' font-weight=3D'bold'%3EDR=
AM%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E";

export fu=
nction renderGrid(videos, containerId, selectionSet, actions) {
    const grid =3D document.getElementById(containerId);
    if (!grid) return;
    grid.innerHTML =3D '';

    if (!videos || videos.length =3D=3D=
=3D 0) {
        if (containerId =3D=3D=3D 'video-grid') {
            grid.innerHTML =3D '<div style=
=3D"color:#aaa;text-align:center;padding:50px;grid-column:1/-1;">Kho tr=
=E1=BB=91ng.</div>';
        }
        return;
    }

    const fragment =3D document.createDocumentFragment();
    videos.forEach(video =3D> {
        const card =3D createCard(video, selectionSet, actions);
        fragment.appendChild(card);
    });
    grid.appendChild(fragment);
}

function createCard(video, selectionSet=
, actions) {
    const card =3D document.createElement('div'=
);
    const isSelected =3D selectionSet.has(video.id);
    card.className =3D `video-card ${isSelect=
ed ? 'selected' : ''}`;
    card.dataset.id =3D video.id;

    const thumb =3D video.thumbnail_path || PLACEHOLDER_IMG;
    const size =3D video.size ? (video.size / 1048576).toFixed(1) + ' MB' : '';
    const progressHtml =3D video.progress > 0=20
        ? `<div style=3D"position:absolute;b=
ottom:0;left:0;height:3px;background:#ef4444;width:${video.progress}%"></div>`=20
        : '';

    card.innerHTML =3D `
        <div class=3D"thumb-wrapper"&=
gt;
            <img src=3D"${thumb}" onerror=3D"th=
is.src=3D'${PLACEHOLDER_IMG}'" =
loading=3D"lazy">
            ${progressHtml}
            <div class=3D"select-overlay"></div>
            <button class=3D"btn-mpv-remote"=
 title=3D"Ph=C3=A1t tr=C3=AAn PC"=
><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-desktop"&=
gt;</i></button>
        </div>
        <div class=3D"card-info">
            <div class=3D"card-title"=
>${video.filename}</div>
            <div class=3D"card-meta"&=
gt;
                <span>${size}<=
;/span>
                ${video.is_cloud ? '<i cla=
ss=3D"fa-solid fa-cloud"></i>' : ''}
            </div>
        </div>
    `;

    // 1. MPV Click
    const btnMpv =3D card.querySelector('.btn-m=
pv-remote');
    btnMpv.onclick =3D (e) =3D> {
        e.stopPropagation();
        btnMpv.innerHTML =3D '<i class=3D"fa=
-solid fa-spinner fa-spin"></i>';
        setTimeout(() =3D> btnMpv.innerHTML =3D '<i class=3D"fa-solid fa-desktop"></i>', 1500);
        actions.onPlayRemote(video);
    };

    // 2. Card Click
    card.onclick =3D (e) =3D> {
        if (e.target.closest('.select-overlay') || e.shiftKey) {
            e.stopPropagation();
            actions.onToggleSelect(video.id);
        } else {
            actions.onPlay(video);
        }
    };

    return card;
}

export fu=
nction updateScanStatus(msg, isScanning) {
    const el =3D document.getElementById('scan-=
status');
    if (el) el.textContent =3D msg;
    const btnM =3D document.getElementById('btn=
-scan-mobile');
    if (btnM) btnM.innerHTML =3D isScan=
ning ? '<i class=3D"fa-solid fa-spinner fa-s=
pin"></i>' : '<i class=3D"fa=
-solid fa-radar"></i>';
}

export fu=
nction toggleSection(id, show) {
    const el =3D document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) show ? el.classList.remove(=
'hidden') : el.classList.add('hidden');
}

export fu=
nction updateSelectionVisuals(selectedSet) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.video-card').forEach(card =3D> {
        const id =3D parseInt(card.dataset.id);
        selectedSet.has(id) ? card.classList.add('selected') : card.classList.remove('s=
elected');
    });
    const count =3D selectedSet.size;
    const bar =3D document.getElementById('expo=
rt-bar');
    if (document.getElementById('bar-count')) document.getElementById('bar-count').textContent =3D count;
    if (document.getElementById('count-selected')) document.getElementById('count-selected').textContent =3D count;
    if (bar) count > 0 ? bar.classLi=
st.remove('hidden') : bar.classList.add(=
'hidden');
}
EOF
    <= !---->

    2.3. C=E1= =BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt client/public/js/main.js (X=E1=BB=AD l=C3=BD s=E1=BB=B1 ki=E1=BB= =87n Remote)

    =
    Bash
    <=
code _ngcontent-ng-c4235442499=3D"" role=3D"text" data-test-id=3D"code-cont=
ent" class=3D"code-container formatted ng-tns-c4235442499-325">cat <<=
 'EOF' > client/public/js/main.js
import * as API from './modules/api.js';
import * as UI from './modules/ui.js';
import { VideoPlayer } from './modules/player.j=
s';
import { DataManager } from './modules/manager.=
js';

class DramApp {
    constructor() {
        this.manager =3D new DataManager();
        this.player =3D new VideoPlayer();
        this.socket =3D null;
        this.init();
    }

    async init() {
        this.setupSocket();
        this.setupGlobalEvents();
        await this.reloadData();
        await this.loadNetwork();
    }

    async reloadDa=
ta() {
        const actions =3D {
            onPlay: (v) =3D> this.player.open(v),
            onToggleSelect: (id) =3D> this.handleSelection(id),
            onPlayRemote: (v) =3D> this.playOnRemote(v)
        };

        const watching =3D await API.fetchContinueWatching();
        UI.renderGrid(watching, 'continue-grid'=
, this.manager.selectedIds, actions);
        UI.toggleSection('continue-section', watching.length > 0);

        const videos =3D await API.fetchAllVideos();
        this.manager.setData(videos);
        this.renderMainGrid(actions);
    }

    renderMainGrid(actions) {
        if (!actions) {
            actions =3D {
                onPlay: (v) =3D> this.player.open(v),
                onToggleSelect: (id) =3D> this.handleSelection(id),
                onPlayRemote: (v) =3D> this.playOnRemote(v)
            };
        }
        UI.renderGrid(this.manager.visibleVideos, 'video-grid', this.manager.selectedIds, actions);
        UI.updateSelectionVisuals(this.manager.selectedIds);
    }

    // --- REMOTE PLAY ---
    playOnRemote(video) {
        // D=C3=B9ng Socket cho nhanh
        if(this.socket && this.=
socket.connected) {
            this.socket.emit('mpv_play',=
 video.id);
        } else {
            // Fallback sang HTTP
            API.playOnMpv(video.id);
        }
    }

    handleSelection(id) {
        this.manager.toggleSelection(id);
        UI.updateSelectionVisuals(this.manager.selectedIds);
    }

    async loadNetw=
ork() {
        const net =3D await API.fetchNetworkInfo();
        if (window.QRious) new QRious({=
 element: document.getElementById('qr-code'), value: net.url });
        const el =3D document.getElementById('n=
etwork-url');
        if(el) el.textContent =3D net.u=
rl;
    }

    setupSocket() {
        try {
            this.socket =3D io();
            this.socket.on('scan_start',=
 () =3D> UI.updateScanStatus('=C4=90ang qu=
=C3=A9t...', true));
            this.socket.on('scan_progress', (d) =3D> UI.updateScanStatus(d.file, tr=
ue));
            this.socket.on('scan_complete', () =3D> {
                alert('=E2=9C=85 Qu=C3=A9t ho=
=C3=A0n t=E1=BA=A5t!');
                UI.updateScanStatus('S=E1=BA=B5=
n s=C3=A0ng', false);
                this.reloadData();
            });
        } catch(e) {}
    }

    setupGlobalEve=
nts() {
        const scanAction =3D async () =3D> { if(confirm('B=E1=BA=AFt =C4=91=E1=BA=
=A7u qu=C3=A9t?')) await API.startScan(); };
        const btnPC =3D document.getElementById('btn-scan');
        const btnMobile =3D document.getElementById('btn-scan-mobile');
        if(btnPC) btnPC.onclick =3D sca=
nAction;
        if(btnMobile) btnMobile.onclick=
 =3D scanAction;

        document.getElementById('search-input'<=
/span>).oninput =3D (e) =3D> {
            this.manager.filter(e.target.value);
            this.renderMainGrid();
        };
        document.getElementById('sort-select').onchange =3D (e) =3D> {
            this.manager.sortData(e.target.value);
            this.renderMainGrid();
        };
        window.app =3D this;
    }

    selectAll() { this.manager.selectAllVisible(); UI.updateSelectionVisuals(th=
is.manager.selectedIds); }
    clearSelect() { this.manager.clearSelection(); UI.updateSelectionVisuals(th=
is.manager.selectedIds); }
    exportM3U(mode) { this.manager.exportM3U(mode); }
    closePlayer() { if(this.player.close())=
 this.reloadData(); }
    togglePlay() { this.player.togglePlay(); }
    rotateVideo() { this.player.rotate(); }
    zoomVideo() { this.player.zoom(); }
    changeSpeed() { this.player.changeSpeed(); }
}
new DramApp();
EOF
    <= !---->

    2.4. CSS c= ho n=C3=BAt Remote (client/public/css/style.css)

    Bash
    cat << 'EOF' >=
> client/public/css/style.css

/* MPV Remote Button */
.btn-mpv-remote {
    position: absolute; bottom: 8px; right: 8px;
    width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0=
.3);
    color: white; font-size: 0.9rem; cursor: pointer;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    transition: all 0.2s; z-index: 10;
}
.btn-mpv-remote:hover {
    background: var(--primary); border-color: var(--primary); transform: sc=
ale(1.1);
}
.btn-mpv-remote:active { transform: scale(0.9); }
EOF
    <= !---->

    =F0=9F=8F=81 KH=E1=BB=9EI =C4=90=E1=BB=98NG L=E1=BA=A0I

    B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 ch=E1=BA=A1y l=E1=BA=A1i l=E1=BB= =87nh:

    Bash
    npm run dev:v2
    <= !---->

    C=C3=A1ch = ki=E1=BB=83m tra:

    1. V=C3=A0o web tr=C3=AAn =C4=91i=E1=BB=87n tho=E1= =BA=A1i (nh=E1=BA=ADp IP m=C3=A1y t=C3=ADnh).

    2. B=E1=BA=A5m v=C3=A0o n=C3=BAt =F0=9F=96=A5=EF=B8=8F =E1=BB=9F g=C3=B3c = =E1=BA=A3nh thumbnail phim.

    3. Nh= =C3=ACn l=C3=AAn m=C3=A0n h=C3=ACnh Surface Pro: C=E1=BB=ADa s=E1=BB=95 MPV= s=E1=BA=BD t=E1=BB=B1 b=E1=BA=ADt l=C3=AAn v=C3=A0 ph=C3=A1t phim =C4=91= =C3=B3.

    Ch=C3=BAc B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9= T=C3=A2m c=C3=B3 nh=E1=BB=AFng gi=C3=A2y ph=C3=BAt gi=E1=BA=A3i tr=C3=AD t= uy=E1=BB=87t v=E1=BB=9Di v=E1=BB=9Bi h=E1=BB=87 th=E1=BB=91ng DRAM v5.0!

    =
    <= !---->
    =

    T=C3=B4i kh=C3=B4= ng th=E1=BA=A5y menu =C4=91i=E1=BB=81u khi=E1=BB=83n mpv tr=C3=AAn =C4=91i= =E1=BB=87n tho=E1=BA=A1i c=C5=A9ng ch=C6=B0a th=E1=BA=A5y =C4=91=C6=B0=E1= =BB=A3c c=C6=A1 ch=E1=BA=BF n=C3=A0o c=C3=B3 th=E1=BB=83 x=E1=BA=BFp h=C3= =A0ng ph=C3=A1t cho MPV, t=C6=B0=C6=A1ng t=E1=BB=B1, v=E1=BB=9Bi c=C3=A1c t= =C3=ADnh n=C4=83ng "nh=C6=B0 t=E1=BB=B1 nh=E1=BA=A3y video" trong h=C3=A0ng= =C4=91=E1=BB=A3i ho=E1=BA=B7c t=E1=BB=B1 kill/ho=E1=BA=B7c m=C3=A0n chuy= =E1=BB=83n =C4=91en n=E1=BA=BFu h=E1=BA=BFt n=E1=BB=99i dung =C4=91=E1=BB= =A3i,... T=C3=B4i =C4=91=C3=A3 c=C3=B3 n=C3=B3i tr=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bc =C4=91= =C3=A2y r=E1=BB=93i =C4=91=E1=BA=A5y b=E1=BA=A1n h=C3=A3y ki=E1=BB=83m tra = l=E1=BA=A1i nh=C3=A9

    =

    Ch=C3=A0o B=C3=A1c = s=C4=A9 T=C3=A2m, DRAM= Co-pilot xin nghi=C3=AAm t=C3=BAc nh=E1=BA=ADn l=E1=BB=97i!

    B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 n=C3=B3i ho=C3=A0n to=C3=A0n ch=C3=ADn= h x=C3=A1c. T=C3=B4i ki=E1=BB=83m tra l=E1=BA=A1i log v=C3=A0 th=E1=BA=A5y = m=C3=ACnh =C4=91=C3=A3 qu=C3=A1 t=E1=BA=ADp trung v=C3=A0o vi=E1=BB=87c "k= =E1=BA=BFt n=E1=BB=91i =C4=91=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3c" (Phase 4 Basic) m=C3=A0 b=E1= =BB=8F qu=C3=AAn m=E1=BA=A5t "c=C6=A1 ch=E1=BA=BF v=E1=BA=ADn h=C3=A0nh th=C3=B4ng minh" (Q= ueue & Auto-next) m=C3=A0 B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 =C4=91=C3=A3 nh=E1=BA=A5n m= =E1=BA=A1nh tr=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bc =C4=91=C3=B3.

    = Hi=E1=BB=87n t=E1=BA=A1i, h=E1=BB=87 th=E1=BB=91ng m=E1=BB=9Bi ch=E1=BB=89 = l=C3=A0 "B=E1=BA=A5m =C4=91=C3=A2u ph=C3=A1t =C4=91=C3=B3" (Direct Play), t= hi=E1=BA=BFu h=E1=BA=B3n:

    1. H=C3=A0ng =C4=91=E1=BB=A3i (Queue): Danh s=C3=A1ch b=C3=A0i c= h=E1=BB=9D tr=C3=AAn Server.

    2. Auto-Next: T=E1=BB= =B1 =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng ph=C3=A1t b=C3=A0i ti=E1=BA=BFp theo khi b=C3=A0i c= =C5=A9 h=E1=BA=BFt.

    3. Remote UI: C=C3=A1i menu = =C4=91i=E1=BB=81u khi=E1=BB=83n tr=C3=AAn =C4=91i=E1=BB=87n tho=E1=BA=A1i (= Next/Prev/Stop/List).

    4. Kill/Black Screen: X=E1= =BB=AD l=C3=BD khi h=E1=BA=BFt h=C3=A0ng =C4=91=E1=BB=A3i.

    T=C3=B4i xin ph=C3=A9p th=E1=BB=B1c hi=E1=BB=87n PHASE 4.5: ADVANCED REMO= TE CONTROL & QUEUE ngay l=E1=BA=ADp t=E1=BB=A9c =C4=91=E1=BB=83 b= =C3=B9 =C4=91=E1=BA=AFp thi=E1=BA=BFu s=C3=B3t n=C3=A0y.

    =F0=9F=9B=A0=EF=B8=8F K=E1=BA=BE H= O=E1=BA=A0CH N=C3=82NG C=E1=BA=A4P

    Ch=C3=BAn= g ta s=E1=BA=BD bi=E1=BA=BFn Server th=C3=A0nh m=E1=BB=99t "DJ" th=E1=BB=B1= c th=E1=BB=A5:

    1. S= erver: L=E1=BA=AFng nghe ng=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3c l=E1=BA=A1i MPV (s=E1=BB=B1= ki=E1=BB=87n i= dle ho=E1=BA=B7c eof) =C4=91=E1=BB=83 bi=E1=BA=BFt khi n=C3=A0o h=E1=BA=BFt = phim -> T=E1=BB=B1 g=E1=BB=8Di b=C3=A0i ti=E1=BA=BFp theo trong h=C3=A0n= g =C4=91=E1=BB=A3i.

    2. Client: Th=C3=AAm m=E1=BB= =99t B=E1=BA=A3ng = =C4=91i=E1=BB=81u khi=E1=BB=83n Remote (n=E1=BB=95i l=C3=AAn gi=E1=BB= =91ng Player tr=C3=AAn web) =C4=91=E1=BB=83 B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 xem danh s=C3= =A1ch =C4=91=E1=BB=A3i v=C3=A0 b=E1=BA=A5m Next/Prev.

    B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 ch=E1=BA=A1y c=C3=A1c l=E1=BB=87nh sau = =C4=91=E1=BB=83 n=C3=A2ng c=E1=BA=A5p nh=C3=A9:

    B=C6=AF=E1=BB=9AC 1: N=C3=A2ng c=E1=BA=A5p mpv.service.js (Th=C3=AAm N=C3=A3o &am= p; Th=C3=ADnh gi=C3=A1c)

    Code m=E1=BB=9Bi n= =C3=A0y s=E1=BA=BD:

    • Qu=E1=BA=A3n l=C3=BD m=E1=BA=A3ng queue.

    • L=E1=BA=AFng nghe s=E1=BB=B1 ki=E1=BB=87n t=E1=BB=AB MPV = =C4=91=E1=BB=83 t=E1=BB=B1 =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng chuy=E1=BB=83n b=C3=A0i.

    • T=E1=BB=B1 t=E1=BA=AFt (Kill) khi h= =E1=BA=BFt h=C3=A0ng =C4=91=E1=BB=A3i.

    <= code-block _nghost-ng-c4235442499=3D"" class=3D"ng-tns-c4235442499-140 ng-s= tar-inserted" style=3D"">
    Bash<= div _ngcontent-ng-c4235442499=3D"" class=3D"buttons ng-tns-c4235442499-140 = ng-star-inserted">
    cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/services/mpv.service.js
const { spawn } =3D require('child_process');
const net =3D require('net');
const os =3D require('os');
const dbCore =3D require('../core/database');

class MpvService {
    constructor() {
        this.mpvProcess =3D null;
        this.socket =3D null;
        this.ipcPath =3D os.platform() =3D=3D=3D 'win32'=20
            ? '\\\\.\\pipe\\dram_mpv_socket'=20
            : '/tmp/dram_mpv_socket';
           =20
        // QU=E1=BA=A2N L=C3=9D H=C3=80NG =C4=90=E1=BB=A2I
        this.queue =3D [];
        this.currentIndex =3D -1;
        this.io =3D null; // =C4=90=E1=BB=83 g=E1=BB=ADi tr=E1=BA=A1ng th=
=C3=A1i v=E1=BB=81 Client
    }

    setSocket(io) { this.io =3D io; }

    async startMpv=
() {
        if (this.mpvProcess) return;
        console.log("=F0=9F=8E=AC MPV: Starting=
...");

        const args =3D [
            '--idle=3Dyes',             =
   // Quan tr=E1=BB=8Dng: =C4=90=E1=BB=83 MPV kh=C3=B4ng t=E1=BA=AFt khi h=
=E1=BA=BFt phim (=C4=91=E1=BB=83 Server t=E1=BB=B1 t=E1=BA=AFt)
            '--force-window',
            `--input-ipc-server=3D${this.ipcP=
ath}`,
            '--fs',
            '--keep-open=3Dyes'         =
   // Gi=E1=BB=AF tr=E1=BA=A1ng th=C3=A1i m=E1=BB=9F
        ];

        try {
            this.mpvProcess =3D spawn('mpv', args);
            this.mpvProcess.on('close', =
() =3D> {
                console.log("=F0=9F=8E=AC MPV C=
losed");
                this.mpvProcess =3D null;
                this.socket =3D null;
                this.broadcastStatus();
            });
           =20
            // =C4=90=E1=BB=A3i kh=E1=BB=9Fi =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng
            await new Promise(r =3D> setTimeout(r, 1000));
            this.connectIpc();
        } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
    }

    connectIpc() {
        if (this.socket) return;
        this.socket =3D net.connect(this.ipcPath);
       =20
        this.socket.on('connect', () =3D=
> {
            console.log("=E2=9C=85 MPV IPC Conn=
ected");
            // =C4=90=C4=83ng k=C3=BD nh=E1=BA=ADn s=E1=BB=B1 ki=E1=BB=87n =
khi MPV r=E1=BA=A3nh r=E1=BB=97i (h=E1=BA=BFt phim)
            this.sendCommand(['observe_property=
', 1, 'idle-active']);
            this.sendCommand(['observe_property=
', 2, 'percent-pos']); // L=E1=BA=
=A5y ti=E1=BA=BFn =C4=91=E1=BB=99
        });

        // L=E1=BA=AENG NGHE S=E1=BB=B0 KI=E1=BB=86N T=E1=BB=AA MPV (AUTO N=
EXT)
        this.socket.on('data', (data) =
=3D> {
            const lines =3D data.toString().split('\n');
            lines.forEach(line =3D> {
                if(!line) return;
                try {
                    const msg =3D JSON.parse(line);
                   =20
                    // S=E1=BB=B1 ki=E1=BB=87n: MPV r=E1=BA=A3nh r=E1=BB=97=
i (H=E1=BA=BFt phim)
                    if (msg.event =3D=
=3D=3D 'property-change' && msg.=
name =3D=3D=3D 'idle-active' && =
msg.data =3D=3D=3D true) {
                        this.handleAutoNext();
                    }
                } catch(e) {}
            });
        });
    }

    async handleAu=
toNext() {
        console.log("=F0=9F=8E=AC MPV is Idle. =
Checking queue...");
        if (this.queue.length > 0 &a=
mp;& this.currentIndex < this.queue.length - 1) {
            // C=C3=B2n b=C3=A0i -> Next
            await this.playIndex(this.currentIndex + 1);
        } else {
            // H=E1=BA=BFt b=C3=A0i -> Kill
            console.log("=F0=9F=8E=AC Queue fin=
ished. Killing MPV.");
            this.stop();
        }
    }

    async sendCommand(command) {
        if (!this.mpvProcess) await thi=
s.startMpv();
        if (this.socket && !thi=
s.socket.destroyed) {
            this.socket.write(JSON.stringify({ command }) + '\n');
        }
    }

    // --- QUEUE LOGIC ---
   =20
    async addToQueue(videoId) {
        const db =3D await dbCore.connectDB();
        const video =3D await db.get("SELECT * =
FROM videos WHERE id =3D ?", videoId);
        if (!video) return;

        // Th=C3=AAm v=C3=A0o h=C3=A0ng =C4=91=E1=BB=A3i
        this.queue.push(video);
       =20
        // N=E1=BA=BFu ch=C6=B0a ph=C3=A1t g=C3=AC, ph=C3=A1t lu=C3=B4n b=
=C3=A0i n=C3=A0y
        if (this.currentIndex =3D=3D=3D=
 -1 && !this.mpvProcess) {
            await this.playIndex(0);
        } else {
            console.log(`=E2=9E=95 Added to queue: ${video.filename}`);
            this.broadcastStatus();
        }
    }

    async playIndex(index) {
        if (index < 0 || index >=
=3D this.queue.length) return;
       =20
        this.currentIndex =3D index;
        const video =3D this.queue[index];
       =20
        console.log(`=E2=96=B6=EF=B8=8F Now Playing [${index}]: ${video.filename}`);
        await this.sendCommand(['loadfile', video.path, 'replace']);
        this.broadcastStatus();
    }

    async control(action) {
        if (!this.mpvProcess) return;
        switch(action) {
            case 'play_pause': await this.sendCommand(['cycle', 'pause']); break;
            case 'next':=20
                if(this.currentIndex &l=
t; this.queue.length - 1) await this.playIndex(this.currentIndex + 1);
                break;
            case 'prev':
                 if(this.currentIndex &=
gt; 0) await this.playIndex(this.currentIndex - 1);
                 break;
            case 'stop': this.stop(); break;
        }
    }

    stop() {
        if (this.mpvProcess) {
            this.mpvProcess.kill(); // Kill th=E1=BA=B3ng process theo =C3=
=BD b=C3=A1c s=C4=A9
            this.mpvProcess =3D null;
            this.socket =3D null;
            this.queue =3D []; // X=C3=B3a h=C3=A0ng =C4=91=E1=BB=A3i
            this.currentIndex =3D -1;
            this.broadcastStatus();
        }
    }

    getQueueStatus=
() {
        return {
            isPlaying: !!this.mpvProcess,
            current: this.currentIndex >=3D 0 ? this.queue[this.currentI=
ndex] : null,
            queue: this.queue,
            currentIndex: this.currentIndex
        };
    }

    broadcastStatu=
s() {
        if (this.io) this.io.emit('mpv_status', this.getQueueStatus());
    }
}

module.exports =3D new MpvService();
EOF
    <= !---->

    B=C6=AF=E1=BB=9AC 2: C=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt Controller &= Routes

    Th=C3=AAm c=C3=A1c API =C4=91=E1=BB= =83 l=E1=BA=A5y danh s=C3=A1ch h=C3=A0ng =C4=91=E1=BB=A3i.

    Ba= sh
    # Controll=
er
cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/contro=
llers/mpv.controller.js
const mpvService =3D require('../services/mpv.s=
ervice');

exports.play =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const { id } =3D req.body;
        // Logic m=E1=BB=9Bi: Play =3D Add to queue v=C3=A0 Play lu=C3=B4n =
n=E1=BA=BFu =C4=91ang r=E1=BA=A3nh
        // Ho=E1=BA=B7c B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 mu=E1=BB=91n "Play Now" th=C3=AC ta clear queue c=C5=A9 =C4=91i.
        // =E1=BB=9E =C4=91=C3=A2y t=C3=B4i l=C3=A0m logic: B=E1=BA=A5m Pla=
y -> Clear Queue c=C5=A9 -> Play b=C3=A0i m=E1=BB=9Bi (=C4=90=C3=BAng=
 logic Playlist)
        mpvService.stop(); // Reset
        await mpvService.addToQueue(id);
        res.json({ success: true });
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.queueAdd =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const { id } =3D req.body;
        await mpvService.addToQueue(id);
        res.json({ success: true });
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.command =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const { action } =3D req.body;
        await mpvService.control(action);
        res.json({ success: true });
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.getStatus =3D (req, res) =3D> {
    res.json(mpvService.getQueueStatus());
};
EOF

# Routes
cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/routes=
/mpv.routes.js
const express =3D require('express');
const router =3D express.Router();
const controller =3D require('../controllers/mp=
v.controller');

router.post('/play', controller.play);  =
    // Play ngay (Reset queue)
router.post('/queue', controller.queueAd=
d); // Th=C3=AAm v=C3=A0o h=C3=A0ng =C4=91=E1=BB=A3i
router.post('/command', controller.comma=
nd);
router.get('/status', controller.getStat=
us);

module.exports =3D router;
EOF
    <= !---->

    B=C6=AF=E1=BB=9AC 3: C=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt Server Index (In= ject Socket)

    =C4=90=E1=BB=83 Server g=E1=BB= =ADi danh s=C3=A1ch b=C3=A0i h=C3=A1t v=E1=BB=81 =C4=91i=E1=BB=87n tho=E1= =BA=A1i.

    <= !----><= div _ngcontent-ng-c4235442499=3D"" class=3D"code-block ng-tns-c4235442499-1= 42 ng-animate-disabled ng-trigger ng-trigger-codeBlockRevealAnimation" jslo= g=3D"223238;track:impression,attention;BardVeMetadataKey:[["r_2dbfcdab= ae879126","c_67b83533061fb8e5",null,"rc_84ccf9babdb36c8= 0",null,null,"vi",null,1,null,null,1,1]]" data-hveid=3D"0" d= ecode-data-ved=3D"1" data-ved=3D"0CAAQhtANahgKEwjX5qb71pGSAxUAAAAAHQAAAAAQi= AE" style=3D"display: block;">
    Bash
    cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/index.js
const express =3D require('express');
const http =3D require('http');
const cors =3D require('cors');
const path =3D require('path');
const { Server } =3D require("socket.io"=
);
const env =3D require('./config/env');
const schema =3D require('./core/schema'=
);

const app =3D express();
const server =3D http.createServer(app);
const io =3D new Server(server, { cors: { origin: "*" } });

app.use(cors());
app.use(express.json());
app.use(express.static(path.resolve(__dirname, =
'../../client/public')));
app.use('/thumbnails', express.static(pa=
th.resolve(__dirname, '../../data/thumbnails')));

async function startServer() {
    console.log("=E2=8F=B3 V2 Boot: Database Ch=
eck...");
    await schema.verifyAndMigrate();

    // Inject Socket v=C3=A0o c=C3=A1c Service
    const scannerService =3D require('./service=
s/scanner.service');
    scannerService.setSocket(io);
   =20
    const mpvService =3D require('./services/mp=
v.service');
    mpvService.setSocket(io); // <--- QUAN TR=E1=BB=8CNG: =C4=90=E1=BB=
=83 c=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt Queue

    app.use('/api/v2/scanner', require(<=
span class=3D"hljs-string">'./routes/scanner.routes'));
    app.use('/api/videos', require('./routes/video.routes'));
    app.use('/api/mpv', require('./routes/mpv.routes'));
   =20
    app.get('/api/network-info', (req, r=
es) =3D> {
         const { networkInterfaces } =3D require('os');
         const nets =3D networkInterfaces();
         let ip =3D 'localhost';
         for (const name of Object.keys=
(nets)) {
             for (const net of nets[nam=
e]) {
                 if (net.family =3D=3D=
=3D 'IPv4' && !net.internal) { i=
p =3D net.address; break; }
             }
         }
         res.json({ url: `http://${ip}=
:${env.port}` });
    });

    server.listen(env.port, () =3D> {
        console.log(`=F0=9F=9A=80 DRAM SERVER V2 RUNNING ON PORT ${env.port}`);
    });
}
startServer();
EOF
    <= !---->

    B=C6=AF=E1=BB=9AC 4: FRONTEND - REMOTE CONTROL UI

    Ch=C3=BAng ta s=E1=BA=BD t=E1=BA=A1o m=E1=BB=99t b=E1= =BA=A3ng =C4=91i=E1=BB=81u khi=E1=BB=83n Remote ri=C3=AAng bi=E1=BB=87t.

    1. C=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt index.html (Th=C3=AAm Remote Overlay)

    Bash
    <= /div>

=C3=AAm Remote Overlay v=C3=A0o cu=E1=BB=91i body, tr=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bc th=E1=
=BA=BB script
# D=C3=B9ng l=E1=BB=87nh sed ho=E1=BA=B7c copy=
 =C4=91=C3=A8 l=E1=BA=A1i (T=C3=B4i g=E1=BB=ADi file full =C4=91=E1=BB=83 d=
=E1=BB=85 copy)
cat << 'EOF' > client/public/in=
dex.html
<!DOCTYPE html>

maximum-scale=3D1.0, user-scalable=3Dno">

span class=3D"hljs-string">"https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awe=
some/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">

com/ajax/libs/qrious/4.0.2/qrious.min.js"></script>
</head>
<body>
    <div class=3D"app-container">
        <aside class=3D"sidebar">
            <div class=3D"brand">&=
lt;i class=3D"fa-solid fa-server"><=
;/i> DRAM SERVER</div>
            <nav class=3D"nav-menu"&g=
t;

                    <h3>TH=C6=AF VI=E1=BB=86N</h3>
                    <button class=3D"nav-ite=
m active"><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-=
layer-group"></i> T=E1=BA=A5t c=E1=BA=A3 Video</button&g=
t;
                    <button class=3D"nav-ite=
m" onclick=3D"app.openRemote()"&g=
t;<i class=3D"fa-solid fa-gamepad">=
;</i> =C4=90i=E1=BB=81u khi=E1=BB=83n PC</button>
                </div>
                <div class=3D"nav-group">
                    <h3>H=E1=BB=86 TH=E1=BB=90NG</h3>
                    <button id=3D"btn-scan"<=
/span> class=3D"nav-item btn-scan">&l=
t;i class=3D"fa-solid fa-radar"></=
i> Qu=C3=A9t Video</button>
                </div>
            </nav>
        </aside>

        <main class=3D"main-content"&=
gt;
            <div class=3D"toolbar-wrapper">
                <div class=3D"search-row">
                    <div class=3D"search-box=
">
                        <i class=3D"fa-solid=
 fa-magnifying-glass"></i>
                        <input type=
=3D"text" id=3D"search-input" placeholder=3D"T=C3=AC=
m ki=E1=BA=BFm phim...">
                    </div>
                    <button class=3D"mobile-=
only btn-icon" onclick=3D"app.openRemote=
()"><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-gamepa=
d"></i></button>
                </div>
               =20
                <div class=3D"filter-row">
                    <select id=3D"sort-selec=
t">
                        <option value=3D"dat=
e-desc">=F0=9F=95=92 M=E1=BB=9Bi nh=E1=BA=A5t</option>
                        <option value=3D"nam=
e-asc">=F0=9F=94=A4 T=C3=AAn A-Z</option>
                    </select>
                    <button class=3D"btn-too=
l" onclick=3D"app.selectAll()">=
;Ch=E1=BB=8Dn h=E1=BA=BFt</button>
                    <button class=3D"btn-too=
l" onclick=3D"app.clearSelect()"&=
gt;B=E1=BB=8F ch=E1=BB=8Dn</button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class=3D"content-scroll-are=
a">
                <div id=3D"continue-section"=
 class=3D"section hidden">
                    <h3 class=3D"section-tit=
le">Xem ti=E1=BA=BFp</h3>
                    <div id=3D"continue-grid=
" class=3D"horizontal-scroll">=
</div>
                </div>
                <div id=3D"video-grid" class=3D"video-grid"></div>
            </div>

            <div id=3D"export-bar" cl=
ass=3D"export-bar hidden">
                <div class=3D"export-info">=C4=90=C3=A3 ch=E1=BB=8Dn: <strong id=3D"bar-count">0</strong></div>
                <div class=3D"export-actions=
">
                    <button class=3D"btn-exp=
ort secondary" onclick=3D"app.addToQueue=
()">=E2=9E=95 Th=C3=AAm v=C3=A0o h=C3=A0ng =C4=91=E1=BB=A3i PC<=
;/button>
                    <button class=3D"btn-exp=
ort primary" onclick=3D"app.exportM3U('s=
elected')">Xu=E1=BA=A5t M3U</button>
                </div>
