        </main>

        <div id=3D"video-player-overlay" class=3D"player-overlay hidden">
            <div class=3D"player-header">
                <h3 id=3D"player-title">Web Player</h3>
                <button onclick=3D"app.close=
Player()" class=3D"btn-close">=
<i class=3D"fa-solid fa-xmark"><=
;/i></button>
            </div>
            <div class=3D"video-wrapper">
                <video id=3D"main-video" controls autoplay></video>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div id=3D"remote-overlay" cl=
ass=3D"player-overlay hidden" style=3D"background: rgba(0,0,0,0.95);">
            <div class=3D"player-header">
                <h3><i class=3D"fa-sol=
id fa-tower-broadcast"></i> PC REMOTE</h3>
                <button onclick=3D"document.=
getElementById('remote-overlay').classList.add('hidden')" class=3D"btn-close"><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-chevron-down"></i></button=
>
            </div>
           =20
            <div style=3D"flex:1; display:fl=
ex; flex-direction:column; padding: 20px; overflow:hidden;">
                <div style=3D"text-align:cen=
ter; margin-bottom:20px;">
                    <div id=3D"remote-status=
" style=3D"color:var(--primary); font-si=
ze:0.9rem; margin-bottom:5px;">=C4=90ANG PH=C3=81T</div>
                    <h2 id=3D"remote-title"<=
/span> style=3D"font-size:1.2rem; line-height:1=
.4;">Ch=C6=B0a c=C3=B3 b=C3=A0i n=C3=A0o</h2>
                </div>

                <div class=3D"remote-control=
s" style=3D"display:flex; justify-conten=
t:center; gap:25px; margin-bottom:30px;">
                    <button onclick=3D"app.r=
emoteControl('prev')" class=3D"btn-remot=
e-big"><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-bac=
kward-step"></i></button>
                    <button onclick=3D"app.r=
emoteControl('play_pause')" class=3D"btn=
-remote-big"><i class=3D"fa-solid =
fa-play"></i></button>
                    <button onclick=3D"app.r=
emoteControl('next')" class=3D"btn-remot=
e-big"><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-for=
ward-step"></i></button>
                    <button onclick=3D"app.r=
emoteControl('stop')" class=3D"btn-remot=
e-big" style=3D"color:#ef4444">=
;<i class=3D"fa-solid fa-power-off"&g=
t;</i></button>
                </div>

                <h3 style=3D"font-size:0.9re=
m; color:#666; margin-bottom:10px; border-bottom:1px solid #333; padding-bo=
ttom:5px;">H=C3=80NG =C4=90=E1=BB=A2I (<span id=3D"queue-count">0</span>)</h3>
                <div id=3D"queue-list" style=3D"flex:1; overflow-y:auto; font-size:0=
.9rem;">
                    </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
   =20
    <script src=3D"/socket.io/socket.io.js"<=
/span>></script>
    <script type=3D"module" src=3D"js/main.js"<=
/span>></script>
</body>
</html>
EOF
    <= !---->

    2. C=E1=BA= =ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt = client/public/js/main.js (Logic Remote)

    Bash
    cat << 'EOF' > client/public/js/main.js
import * as API from './modules/api.js';
import * as UI from './modules/ui.js';
import { VideoPlayer } from './modules/player.j=
s';
import { DataManager } from './modules/manager.=
js';

class DramApp {
    constructor() {
        this.manager =3D new DataManager();
        this.player =3D new VideoPlayer();
        this.socket =3D null;
        this.init();
    }

    async init() {
        this.setupSocket();
        this.setupGlobalEvents();
        await this.reloadData();
    }

    async reloadDa=
ta() {
        const watching =3D await API.fetchContinueWatching();
        const actions =3D {
            onPlay: (v) =3D> this.player.open(v),
            onToggleSelect: (id) =3D> this.handleSelection(id),
            onPlayRemote: (v) =3D> this.playOnRemote(v)
        };

        UI.renderGrid(watching, 'continue-grid'=
, this.manager.selectedIds, actions);
        UI.toggleSection('continue-section', watching.length > 0);

        const videos =3D await API.fetchAllVideos();
        this.manager.setData(videos);
        this.renderMainGrid(actions);
    }

    renderMainGrid(actions) {
        if(!actions) actions =3D {
             onPlay: (v) =3D> this.player.open(v),
             onToggleSelect: (id) =3D> this.handleSelection(id),
             onPlayRemote: (v) =3D> this.playOnRemote(v)
        };
        UI.renderGrid(this.manager.visibleVideos, 'video-grid', this.manager.selectedIds, actions);
        UI.updateSelectionVisuals(this.manager.selectedIds);
    }

    // --- REMOTE LOGIC ---
    openRemote() {
        document.getElementById('remote-overlay=
').classList.remove('hidden');
        this.fetchRemoteStatus();
    }

    async fetchRem=
oteStatus() {
        const res =3D await fetch('/api/mpv/sta=
tus');
        const status =3D await res.json();
        this.updateRemoteUI(status);
    }

    updateRemoteUI(status) {
        const title =3D document.getElementById('remote-title');
        const list =3D document.getElementById(=
'queue-list');
        const count =3D document.getElementById('queue-count');
        const state =3D document.getElementById('remote-status');

        if (!status.isPlaying) {
            state.textContent =3D "OFFLINE";
            title.textContent =3D "MPV =C4=91=
=C3=A3 t=E1=BA=AFt";
        } else {
            state.textContent =3D "=C4=90ANG PH=
=C3=81T";
            title.textContent =3D status.current ? status.current.filename =
: "=C4=90ang ch=E1=BB=9D...";
        }

        count.textContent =3D status.queue.length;
        list.innerHTML =3D status.queue.map((v, i) =3D> `
            <div style=3D"padding:10px; bord=
er-bottom:1px solid #333; color: ${i =3D=3D=
=3D status.currentIndex ? '#6366f1' : '#ccc'}">
                ${i + 1}. ${v.filename}
                ${i =3D=3D=3D status.currentI=
ndex ? '<i class=3D"fa-solid fa-volume-high" style=3D"float:right">&l=
t;/i>' : ''}
            </div>
        `).join('');
    }

    playOnRemote(video) {
        // Play ngay l=E1=BA=ADp t=E1=BB=A9c (Reset queue)
        fetch('/api/mpv/play', { method:=
 'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'<=
/span>}, body:JSON.stringify({id: video.id}) });
        this.openRemote();
    }

    async addToQue=
ue() {
        // Th=C3=AAm c=C3=A1c b=C3=A0i =C4=91ang ch=E1=BB=8Dn v=C3=A0o h=C3=
=A0ng =C4=91=E1=BB=A3i
        const ids =3D Array.from(this.manager.selectedIds);
        if(ids.length =3D=3D=3D 0) return alert("=
Ch=C6=B0a ch=E1=BB=8Dn b=C3=A0i n=C3=A0o!");
       =20
        for (const id of ids) {
            await fetch('/api/mpv/queue'=
, { method: 'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'applica=
tion/json'}, body:JSON.stringify({id}) });
        }
        alert(`=C4=90=C3=A3 th=C3=AAm ${ids.l=
ength} b=C3=A0i v=C3=A0o h=C3=A0ng =C4=91=E1=BB=A3i PC!`);
        this.manager.clearSelection();
        this.renderMainGrid();
        this.openRemote();
    }

    remoteControl(action) {
        fetch('/api/mpv/command', { meth=
od: 'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/jso=
n'}, body:JSON.stringify({action}) });
    }

    // --- SYSTEM ---
    handleSelection(id) {
        this.manager.toggleSelection(id);
        UI.updateSelectionVisuals(this.manager.selectedIds);
    }

    setupSocket() {
        try {
            this.socket =3D io();
            this.socket.on('scan_progress', (d) =3D> UI.updateScanStatus(d.file, tr=
ue));
            this.socket.on('scan_complete', () =3D> { UI.updateScanStatus('S=E1=BA=
=B5n s=C3=A0ng', false); this.re=
loadData(); });
            this.socket.on('mpv_status',=
 (status) =3D> this.updateRemoteUI(status)); // Realtime Update
        } catch(e) {}
    }

    setupGlobalEve=
nts() {
        const scanAction =3D async () =3D> { if(confirm('Qu=C3=A9t?')) await=
 API.startScan(); };
        const b1=3Ddocument.getElementById('btn=
-scan'); if(b1) b1.onclick=3Dsca=
nAction;
       =20
        document.getElementById('search-input'<=
/span>).oninput =3D (e) =3D> { this.manager.filter(e.target.value); this=
.renderMainGrid(); };
        window.app =3D this;
    }

    // Proxies
    selectAll() { this.manager.selectAllVisible(); UI.updateSelectionVisuals(th=
is.manager.selectedIds); }
    clearSelect() { this.manager.clearSelection(); UI.updateSelectionVisuals(th=
is.manager.selectedIds); }
    exportM3U(mode) { this.manager.exportM3U(mode); }
    closePlayer() { if(this.player.close())=
 this.reloadData(); }
    togglePlay() { this.player.togglePlay(); }
    rotateVideo() { this.player.rotate(); }
    zoomVideo() { this.player.zoom(); }
    changeSpeed() { this.player.changeSpeed(); }
}
new DramApp();
EOF
    <= !---->

    3. Th=C3= =AAm CSS (client/p= ublic/css/style.css)

    Bash
    <= /span>
    cat << 'EOF' >> clie=
nt/public/css/style.css
.btn-remote-big {
    width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: #334155; border: none; color: =
white; font-size: 1.5rem;
    cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: c=
enter;
}
.btn-remote-big:active { transform: scale(0.95); background: var(--primary)=
; }
EOF
    <= !---->

    =F0=9F=8F=81 HO=C3=80N T=E1=BA=A4= T & H=C6=AF=E1=BB=9ANG D=E1=BA=AAN S=E1=BB=AC D=E1=BB=A4NG

    1. Restar= t Server: npm = run dev:v2

    2. M=E1=BB=9F we= b tr=C3=AAn =C4=91i=E1=BB=87n tho=E1=BA=A1i.

    3. C=C3= =A1ch 1 (Ph=C3=A1t ngay): B=E1=BA=A5m v=C3=A0o n=C3=BAt =F0=9F=96=A5=EF= =B8=8F tr=C3=AAn th=E1=BA=BB phim -> N=C3=B3 s=E1=BA=BD ph=C3=A1t ngay v= =C3=A0 hi=E1=BB=87n b=E1=BA=A3ng =C4=91i=E1=BB=81u khi=E1=BB=83n.

      4. <= li>

      C=C3=A1ch 2 (X=E1=BA=BFp h=C3=A0ng):

      • Ch=E1=BB=8Dn nhi= =E1=BB=81u phim (gi=E1=BB=AF Shift ho=E1=BA=B7c b=E1=BA=A5m v=C3=A0o g=C3= =B3c).

      • B=E1=BA=A5m n=C3=BAt= "=E2=9E=95 Th= =C3=AAm v=C3=A0o h=C3=A0ng =C4=91=E1=BB=A3i PC" =E1=BB=9F d=C6=B0=E1=BB= =9Bi =C4=91=C3=A1y.

      • M=E1=BB= =9F menu "=C4= =90i=E1=BB=81u khi=E1=BB=83n PC" (icon tay c=E1=BA=A7m game) =C4=91=E1= =BB=83 xem danh s=C3=A1ch.

    4. T=E1=BB=B1 = =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng: Khi h=E1=BA=BFt b=C3=A0i 1, MPV s=E1=BA=BD t=E1=BB= =B1 nh=E1=BA=A3y sang b=C3=A0i 2. Khi h=E1=BA=BFt danh s=C3=A1ch, MPV t=E1= =BB=B1 t=E1=BA=AFt.

    B=C3=A1c s=C4= =A9 ki=E1=BB=83m tra xem =C4=91=C3=A3 =C4=91=C3=BAng =C3=BD ch=C6=B0a nh=C3= =A9!

    <= !---->
    =
    <= /model-response>

    T=C3=B4i c=C5=A9ng ch=C6=B0a th=E1=BA=A5y Bottom navigation

    =
    =
    <= !---->
    <= /div>
    =
    <= div _ngcontent-ng-c604995104=3D"" class=3D"thoughts-content ng-star-inserte= d">

    Ch=C3=A0o B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 T=C3=A2m, DRAM Co-pilot xin nh=E1=BA=ADn thi= =E1=BA=BFu s=C3=B3t n=C3=A0y!

    V=E1=BB=9Bi m= =E1=BB=99t =E1=BB=A9ng d=E1=BB=A5ng PWA ch=E1=BA=A1y tr=C3=AAn =C4=91i=E1= =BB=87n tho=E1=BA=A1i (nh=C6=B0 Oppo Find N3 c=E1=BB=A7a B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9),= thanh =C4=91i=E1=BB=81u h=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bng d=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bi =C4=91=C3=A1y= (Bottom Navigation) l=C3=A0 th=C3=A0nh ph=E1=BA=A7n b=E1=BA=AFt bu=E1=BB=99c =C4=91=E1=BB= =83 thao t=C3=A1c nhanh b=E1=BA=B1ng m=E1=BB=99t tay, thay v=C3=AC ph=E1=BA= =A3i v=E1=BB=9Bi l=C3=AAn tr=C3=AAn t=C3=ACm n=C3=BAt.

    T=C3=B4i s=E1=BA=BD b=E1=BB=95 sung ngay thanh =C4=91i=E1=BB=81u = h=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bng n=C3=A0y. N=C3=B3 s=E1=BA=BD bao g=E1=BB=93m 3 n=C3=BAt = quan tr=E1=BB=8Dng nh=E1=BA=A5t:

    1. =F0=9F=8E=AC Th=C6=B0 vi=E1=BB=87n: V=E1=BB=81 trang c= h=E1=BB=A7 xem phim.

    2. =F0=9F=8E= =AE Remote: M= =E1=BB=9F b=E1=BA=A3ng =C4=91i=E1=BB=81u khi=E1=BB=83n MPV (PC).

      3. =F0=9F=93=A1 Radar: Qu=C3=A9t phim m=E1=BB=9Bi nhanh.

      =

    B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 ch=E1=BA=A1y 3 l=E1= =BB=87nh sau =C4=91=E1=BB=83 c=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt giao di=E1=BB=87n nh= =C3=A9:

    B=C6=AF=E1=BB=9AC 1: C=E1=BA=ADp nh= =E1=BA=ADt index.ht= ml (Th=C3=AAm thanh Nav d=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bi =C4=91=C3=A1y)

    T=C3=B4i s=E1=BA=BD ch=C3=A8n =C4=91o=E1=BA=A1n m=C3=A3= HTML cho thanh =C4=91i=E1=BB=81u h=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bng v=C3=A0o cu=E1=BB=91i = file, ngay tr=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bc c=C3=A1c Overlay.

    <= code-block _nghost-ng-c4235442499=3D"" class=3D"ng-tns-c4235442499-146 ng-s= tar-inserted" style=3D"">
    Bash<= div _ngcontent-ng-c4235442499=3D"" class=3D"buttons ng-tns-c4235442499-146 = ng-star-inserted">
    cat << 'EOF' > client/public/index.html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang=3D"vi">
<head>
    <meta charset=3D"UTF-8">
    <meta name=3D"viewport" content=
=3D"width=3Ddevice-width, initial-scale=3D1.0, =
maximum-scale=3D1.0, user-scalable=3Dno">
    <link rel=3D"manifest" href=3D"manifest.json">
