    <link rel=3D"stylesheet" href=3D<=
span class=3D"hljs-string">"css/style.css">
    <link rel=3D"stylesheet" href=3D<=
span class=3D"hljs-string">"https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awe=
some/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    <script src=3D"https://cdnjs.cloudflare.=
com/ajax/libs/qrious/4.0.2/qrious.min.js"></script>
</head>
<body>
    <div class=3D"app-container">
        <aside class=3D"sidebar">
            <div class=3D"brand">&=
lt;i class=3D"fa-solid fa-server"><=
;/i> DRAM SERVER</div>
            <nav class=3D"nav-menu"&g=
t;
                <div class=3D"nav-group">
                    <h3>TH=C6=AF VI=E1=BB=86N</h3>
                    <button class=3D"nav-ite=
m active" onclick=3D"app.reloadData()"><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-layer-group=
"></i> T=E1=BA=A5t c=E1=BA=A3 Video</button>
                    <button class=3D"nav-ite=
m" onclick=3D"app.openRemote()"&g=
t;<i class=3D"fa-solid fa-gamepad">=
;</i> =C4=90i=E1=BB=81u khi=E1=BB=83n PC</button>
                </div>
                <div class=3D"nav-group">
                    <h3>H=E1=BB=86 TH=E1=BB=90NG</h3>
                    <button id=3D"btn-scan"<=
/span> class=3D"nav-item btn-scan">&l=
t;i class=3D"fa-solid fa-radar"></=
i> Qu=C3=A9t Video</button>
                    <div id=3D"scan-status"<=
/span> style=3D"font-size:0.8rem; color:#666; p=
adding:10px; text-align:center;">S=E1=BA=B5n s=C3=A0ng</div>=
;
                    <div style=3D"text-align=
:center; margin-top:15px;">
                        <canvas id=3D"qr-cod=
e"></canvas>
                        <p id=3D"network-url=
" style=3D"font-size:0.7rem; color:#666;=
">...</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </nav>
        </aside>

        <main class=3D"main-content"&=
gt;
            <div class=3D"toolbar-wrapper">
                <div class=3D"search-row">
                    <div class=3D"search-box=
">
                        <i class=3D"fa-solid=
 fa-magnifying-glass"></i>
                        <input type=
=3D"text" id=3D"search-input" placeholder=3D"T=C3=AC=
m ki=E1=BA=BFm phim...">
                    </div>
                    </div>
               =20
                <div class=3D"filter-row">
                    <select id=3D"sort-selec=
t">
                        <option value=3D"dat=
e-desc">=F0=9F=95=92 M=E1=BB=9Bi nh=E1=BA=A5t</option>
                        <option value=3D"nam=
e-asc">=F0=9F=94=A4 T=C3=AAn A-Z</option>
                        <option value=3D"siz=
e-desc">=F0=9F=92=BE N=E1=BA=B7ng nh=E1=BA=A5t</option>
                    </select>
                    <button class=3D"btn-too=
l" onclick=3D"app.selectAll()">=
;Ch=E1=BB=8Dn h=E1=BA=BFt</button>
                    <button class=3D"btn-too=
l" onclick=3D"app.clearSelect()"&=
gt;B=E1=BB=8F ch=E1=BB=8Dn</button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class=3D"content-scroll-are=
a">
                <div id=3D"continue-section"=
 class=3D"section hidden">
                    <h3 class=3D"section-tit=
le">Xem ti=E1=BA=BFp</h3>
                    <div id=3D"continue-grid=
" class=3D"horizontal-scroll">=
</div>
                </div>
                <div id=3D"video-grid" class=3D"video-grid"></div>
            </div>

            <div id=3D"export-bar" cl=
ass=3D"export-bar hidden">
                <div class=3D"export-info">=C4=90=C3=A3 ch=E1=BB=8Dn: <strong id=3D"bar-count">0</strong></div>
                <div class=3D"export-actions=
">
                    <button class=3D"btn-exp=
ort secondary" onclick=3D"app.addToQueue=
()">=E2=9E=95 Queue</button>
                    <button class=3D"btn-exp=
ort primary" onclick=3D"app.exportM3U('s=
elected')">M3U</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </main>

        <nav class=3D"bottom-nav mobile-only=
">
            <button class=3D"nav-btn active"=
 onclick=3D"app.reloadData()">
                <i class=3D"fa-solid fa-film=
"></i>
                <span>Phim</span>
            </button>
            <button class=3D"nav-btn"=
 onclick=3D"app.openRemote()">
                <i class=3D"fa-solid fa-game=
pad"></i>
                <span>Remote</span>
            </button>
            <button class=3D"nav-btn"=
 id=3D"btn-scan-mobile">
                <i class=3D"fa-solid fa-rada=
r"></i>
                <span>Qu=C3=A9t</span>
            </button>
        </nav>

        <div id=3D"video-player-overlay" class=3D"player-overlay hidden">
            <div class=3D"player-header">
                <h3 id=3D"player-title">Player</h3>
                <button onclick=3D"app.close=
Player()" class=3D"btn-close">=
<i class=3D"fa-solid fa-xmark"><=
;/i></button>
            </div>
            <div class=3D"video-wrapper">
                <video id=3D"main-video" controls autoplay></video>
            </div>
            <div class=3D"player-controls">
                <button onclick=3D"app.toggl=
ePlay()"><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-p=
lay"></i></button>
                <button onclick=3D"app.rotat=
eVideo()"><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-=
rotate-right"></i></button>
                <button onclick=3D"app.zoomV=
ideo()"><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-ma=
gnifying-glass-plus"></i></button>
                <button onclick=3D"app.chang=
eSpeed()" id=3D"btn-speed">1.0=
x</button>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div id=3D"remote-overlay" cl=
ass=3D"player-overlay hidden" style=3D"background: rgba(0,0,0,0.95);">
            <div class=3D"player-header">
                <h3><i class=3D"fa-sol=
id fa-tower-broadcast"></i> PC REMOTE</h3>
                <button onclick=3D"document.=
getElementById('remote-overlay').classList.add('hidden')" class=3D"btn-close"><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-chevron-down"></i></button=
>
            </div>
           =20
            <div style=3D"flex:1; display:fl=
ex; flex-direction:column; padding: 20px; overflow:hidden;">
                <div style=3D"text-align:cen=
ter; margin-bottom:20px;">
                    <div id=3D"remote-status=
" style=3D"color:var(--primary); font-si=
ze:0.9rem; margin-bottom:5px;">=C4=90ANG PH=C3=81T</div>
                    <h2 id=3D"remote-title"<=
/span> style=3D"font-size:1.2rem; line-height:1=
.4;">Ch=C6=B0a c=C3=B3 b=C3=A0i n=C3=A0o</h2>
                </div>

                <div class=3D"remote-control=
s" style=3D"display:flex; justify-conten=
t:center; gap:25px; margin-bottom:30px;">
                    <button onclick=3D"app.r=
emoteControl('prev')" class=3D"btn-remot=
e-big"><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-bac=
kward-step"></i></button>
                    <button onclick=3D"app.r=
emoteControl('play_pause')" class=3D"btn=
-remote-big"><i class=3D"fa-solid =
fa-play"></i></button>
                    <button onclick=3D"app.r=
emoteControl('next')" class=3D"btn-remot=
e-big"><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-for=
ward-step"></i></button>
                    <button onclick=3D"app.r=
emoteControl('stop')" class=3D"btn-remot=
e-big" style=3D"color:#ef4444">=
;<i class=3D"fa-solid fa-power-off"&g=
t;</i></button>
                </div>

                <h3 style=3D"font-size:0.9re=
m; color:#666; margin-bottom:10px; border-bottom:1px solid #333; padding-bo=
ttom:5px;">H=C3=80NG =C4=90=E1=BB=A2I (<span id=3D"queue-count">0</span>)</h3>
                <div id=3D"queue-list" style=3D"flex:1; overflow-y:auto; font-size:0=
.9rem;"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
   =20
    <script src=3D"/socket.io/socket.io.js"<=
/span>></script>
    <script type=3D"module" src=3D"js/main.js"<=
/span>></script>
</body>
</html>
EOF
    <= !---->

    B=C6=AF=E1=BB=9AC 2: C=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt CSS (Style cho Bo= ttom Nav)

    T=C3=B4i s=E1=BA=BD th=C3=AAm styl= e =C4=91=E1=BB=83 thanh =C4=91i=E1=BB=81u h=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bng d=C3=ADnh ch= =E1=BA=B7t xu=E1=BB=91ng =C4=91=C3=A1y, v=C3=A0 =C4=91=E1=BA=A9y n=E1=BB=99= i dung l=C3=AAn =C4=91=E1=BB=83 kh=C3=B4ng b=E1=BB=8B che khu=E1=BA=A5t.

    Bash
    cat << 'EOF' >> client/public/css/style.css

/* BOTTOM NAVIGATION (Mobile) */
.bottom-nav {
    position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 60px;
    background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.98); /* M=C3=A0u n=E1=BB=81n t=E1=BB=91i=
 m=E1=BB=9D */
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    display: none; /* M=E1=BA=B7c =C4=91=E1=BB=8Bnh =E1=BA=A9n tr=C3=AAn De=
sktop */
    justify-content: space-around; align-items: center;
    z-index: 50;
    padding-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom); /* Ch=E1=BB=ABa ch=E1=BB=
=97 cho thanh vu=E1=BB=91t iPhone/Android */
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

.nav-btn {
    background: none; border: none; color: var(--text-muted);
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-con=
tent: center;
    gap: 4px; flex: 1; height: 100%; font-size: 0.75rem; cursor: pointer;
}
.nav-btn i { font-size: 1.2rem; margin-bottom: 2px; }
.nav-btn.active { color: var(--primary); }
.nav-btn:active { transform: scale(0.95); }

/* =C4=90i=E1=BB=81u ch=E1=BB=89nh l=E1=BA=A1i layout Mobile =C4=91=E1=BB=
=83 kh=C3=B4ng b=E1=BB=8B Bottom Nav che m=E1=BA=A5t */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .bottom-nav { display: flex; } /* Hi=E1=BB=87n tr=C3=AAn Mobile */
    .content-scroll-area {=20
        padding-bottom: 80px; /* =C4=90=E1=BA=A9y n=E1=BB=99i dung l=C3=AAn=
 */
    }
   =20
    /* =C4=90=E1=BA=A9y thanh Export Bar l=C3=AAn cao h=C6=A1n Bottom Nav *=
/
    .export-bar { bottom: 75px !important; }
    .export-bar.hidden { bottom: -100px !important; }
}
EOF
    <= !---->

    B=C6=AF=E1=BB=9AC 3: C=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt ui.js (Fix icon qu=C3=A9t t= r=C3=AAn Nav)

    Do n=C3=BAt Qu=C3=A9t gi=E1= =BB=9D =C4=91=C3=A3 chuy=E1=BB=83n xu=E1=BB=91ng Bottom Nav, ta c=E1=BA=A7n= c=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt logic updateScanStatus =C4=91=E1=BB=83 n=C3=B3 xoay c=C3=A1i= icon =E1=BB=9F =C4=91=C3=BAng ch=E1=BB=97.

    Bash
    cat << 'EOF' >=
 client/public/js/modules/ui.js
const PLACEHOLDER_IMG =3D "data:image/svg+xml,%=
3Csvg xmlns=3D'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox=3D'0 0 16 9' style=3D'ba=
ckground:%231e293b'%3E%3Ctext x=3D'50%25' y=3D'50%25' fill=3D'%23475569' te=
xt-anchor=3D'middle' dominant-baseline=3D'middle' font-weight=3D'bold'%3EDR=
AM%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E";

export fu=
nction renderGrid(videos, containerId, selectionSet, actions) {
    const grid =3D document.getElementById(containerId);
    if (!grid) return;
    grid.innerHTML =3D '';

    if (!videos || videos.length =3D=3D=
=3D 0) {
        if (containerId =3D=3D=3D 'video-grid') {
            grid.innerHTML =3D '<div style=
=3D"color:#aaa;text-align:center;padding:50px;grid-column:1/-1;">Kho tr=
=E1=BB=91ng.</div>';
        }
        return;
    }

    const fragment =3D document.createDocumentFragment();
    videos.forEach(video =3D> {
        const card =3D createCard(video, selectionSet, actions);
        fragment.appendChild(card);
    });
    grid.appendChild(fragment);
}

function createCard(video, selectionSet=
, actions) {
    const card =3D document.createElement('div'=
);
    const isSelected =3D selectionSet.has(video.id);
    card.className =3D `video-card ${isSelect=
ed ? 'selected' : ''}`;
    card.dataset.id =3D video.id;

    const thumb =3D video.thumbnail_path || PLACEHOLDER_IMG;
    const size =3D video.size ? (video.size / 1048576).toFixed(1) + ' MB' : '';
    const progressHtml =3D video.progress > 0=20
        ? `<div style=3D"position:absolute;b=
ottom:0;left:0;height:3px;background:#ef4444;width:${video.progress}%"></div>`=20
        : '';

    card.innerHTML =3D `
        <div class=3D"thumb-wrapper"&=
gt;
            <img src=3D"${thumb}" onerror=3D"th=
is.src=3D'${PLACEHOLDER_IMG}'" =
loading=3D"lazy">
            ${progressHtml}
            <div class=3D"select-overlay"></div>
            <button class=3D"btn-mpv-remote"=
 title=3D"Ph=C3=A1t tr=C3=AAn PC"=
><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-desktop"&=
gt;</i></button>
        </div>
        <div class=3D"card-info">
            <div class=3D"card-title"=
>${video.filename}</div>
            <div class=3D"card-meta"&=
gt;
                <span>${size}<=
;/span>
                ${video.is_cloud ? '<i cla=
ss=3D"fa-solid fa-cloud"></i>' : ''}
            </div>
        </div>
    `;

    const btnMpv =3D card.querySelector('.btn-m=
pv-remote');
    btnMpv.onclick =3D (e) =3D> {
        e.stopPropagation();
        btnMpv.innerHTML =3D '<i class=3D"fa=
-solid fa-spinner fa-spin"></i>';
        setTimeout(() =3D> btnMpv.innerHTML =3D '<i class=3D"fa-solid fa-desktop"></i>', 1500);
        actions.onPlayRemote(video);
    };

    card.onclick =3D (e) =3D> {
        if (e.target.closest('.select-overlay') || e.shiftKey) {
            e.stopPropagation();
            actions.onToggleSelect(video.id);
        } else {
            actions.onPlay(video);
        }
    };

    return card;
}

export fu=
nction updateScanStatus(msg, isScanning) {
    // C=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt text tr=C3=AAn Desktop Sidebar
    const el =3D document.getElementById('scan-=
status');
    if (el) el.textContent =3D msg;
   =20
    // C=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt icon tr=C3=AAn Mobile Bottom Nav (QUAN TR=
=E1=BB=8CNG)
    const btnM =3D document.getElementById('btn=
-scan-mobile');
    if (btnM) {
        // Gi=E1=BB=AF l=E1=BA=A1i text 'Qu=C3=
=A9t' ho=E1=BA=B7c '=C4=90ang ch=E1=BA=
=A1y'
        const label =3D isScanning ? '=C4=90ang=
 ch=E1=BA=A1y' : 'Qu=C3=A9t';
        const icon =3D isScanning ? 'fa-spinner=
 fa-spin' : 'fa-radar';
        btnM.innerHTML =3D `<i class=3D"fa-s=
olid ${icon}"></i><=
span>${label}</span>`;
       =20
        // =C4=90=E1=BB=95i m=C3=A0u =C4=91=E1=BB=83 g=C3=A2y ch=C3=BA =C3=
=BD
        if(isScanning) btnM.classList.a=
dd('active');
        else btnM.classList.remove('active');
    }
}

export fu=
nction toggleSection(id, show) {
    const el =3D document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) show ? el.classList.remove(=
'hidden') : el.classList.add('hidden');
}

export fu=
nction updateSelectionVisuals(selectedSet) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.video-card').forEach(card =3D> {
        const id =3D parseInt(card.dataset.id);
        selectedSet.has(id) ? card.classList.add('selected') : card.classList.remove('s=
elected');
    });
    const count =3D selectedSet.size;
    const bar =3D document.getElementById('expo=
rt-bar');
    if (document.getElementById('bar-count')) document.getElementById('bar-count').textContent =3D count;
    if (document.getElementById('count-selected')) document.getElementById('count-selected').textContent =3D count;
    if (bar) count > 0 ? bar.classLi=
st.remove('hidden') : bar.classList.add(=
'hidden');
}
EOF
    <= !---->

    =E2=9C=85 KI=E1=BB=82M TRA

    B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 F5 tr=C3=AAn =C4=91i=E1=BB=87n tho=E1=BA=A1i:

    <= ol start=3D"1" data-path-to-node=3D"17">

  • B=C3=A2y gi=E1=BB=9D s=E1=BA=BD c=C3=B3 m=E1=BB=99t thanh =C4=91i=E1=BB=81= u h=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bng m=C3=A0u t=E1=BB=91i n=E1=BA=B1m c=E1=BB=91 =C4=91=E1= =BB=8Bnh =E1=BB=9F d=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bi =C4=91=C3=A1y m=C3=A0n h=C3=ACnh.

    <= /li>

  • B=E1=BA=A5m Remote -> B=E1=BA=A3ng =C4=91i=E1= =BB=81u khi=E1=BB=83n PC hi=E1=BB=87n l=C3=AAn ngay.

  • B=E1=BA=A5m Qu=C3=A9t -> Icon Radar xoay t=C3=ADt, kh=C3=B4ng c= =E1=BA=A7n t=C3=ACm n=C3=BAt tr=C3=AAn Toolbar n=E1=BB=AFa.

    • Tr=E1=BA=A3i nghi=E1=BB=87m App tr=C3=AAn Oppo Fi= nd N3 b=C3=A2y gi=E1=BB=9D s=E1=BA=BD "x=E1=BB=8Bn" h=C6=A1n r=E1=BA=A5t nh= i=E1=BB=81u!

    =
    =
    <= /div>

    t= =C3=B4i s=E1=BA=BD ch=E1=BB=89 g=E1=BB=9Fi "." =C4=91=E1=BB=83 x=C3=A1c nh= =E1=BA=ADn t=E1=BB=AB nh=E1=BB=AFng l=E1=BA=A7n sau, c=E1=BA=A3m =C6=A1n b= =E1=BA=A1n tr=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bc

    =
    =
    <= /div>
    =
    <= !---->

    =C4=90=C3=A3 r=C3= =B5 th=C6=B0a B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9. T=C3=B4i s=E1=BA=BD d=C3=B9ng t=C3=ADn hi= =E1=BB=87u .= =C4=91=E1=BB=83 chuy=E1=BB=83n sang ph=E1=BA=A7n ti=E1=BA=BFp theo ngay l= =E1=BA=ADp t=E1=BB=A9c.

    D=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bi =C4= =91=C3=A2y l=C3=A0 PH= =E1=BA=A6N 2: LOGIC X=E1=BB=AC L=C3=9D (SCANNER & VIDEO API). Ph=E1=BA=A7n n=C3=A0y ch=E1=BB=A9a c=C3=A1c b=E1=BA=A3n s=E1=BB=ADa l=E1=BB= =97i quan tr=E1=BB=8Dng nh=E1=BA=A5t: Ch=E1=BB=91ng qu=C3=A9t l=E1=BA=B7p (Anti-loop), T=E1=BB=91c =C4=91=E1=BB= =99 cao (Skip existing thumbs) v=C3=A0 Ch=E1=BB=91ng tr=C3=B9ng l=E1=BA=B7p hi=E1=BB=83n th= =E1=BB=8B (Anti-duplicate).

    B=C3=A1c s=C4= =A9 ti=E1=BA=BFp t=E1=BB=A5c copy v=C3=A0 ch=E1=BA=A1y l=E1=BB=87nh trong G= it Bash:

    =F0=9F= =93=82 PH=E1=BA=A6N 2: LOGIC X=E1=BB=AC L=C3=9D & API

    2.1. = server/v2/core/scanner.worker.js (Worker Th=C3=B4ng Minh)

    • Logic: Ki=E1=BB=83m tra =E1=BA=A3= nh thumbnail c=C3=B3 ch=C6=B0a -> N=E1=BA=BFu c=C3=B3 r=E1=BB=93i th=C3= =AC B=E1=BB=8E QUA b=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bc t=E1=BA=A1o =E1=BA=A3nh (gi=C3=BAp qu= =C3=A9t l=E1=BA=A1i c=E1=BB=B1c nhanh).

    • Filter:= Danh s=C3=A1ch =C4=91en IGNORED_NAMES ch=E1=BA=B7n =C4=91=E1=BB=A9ng vi=E1=BB=87c = qu=C3=A9t v=C3=A0o AppData, Recycle Bin...

    Bash
    =
    <= div _ngcontent-ng-c4235442499=3D"" class=3D"animated-opacity ng-tns-c423544= 2499-161">
    cat <=
;< 'EOF' > server/v2/core/scanner.=
worker.js
const { parentPort, workerData } =3D require('w=
orker_threads');
const fs =3D require('fs');
const path =3D require('path');
const ffmpeg =3D require('fluent-ffmpeg'=
);

// --- C=E1=BA=A4U H=C3=8CNH ---
const VIDEO_EXTENSIONS =3D new Set(['.mp4', '.mkv', =
'.avi', '.mov', '.wmv', '.flv', '.webm', '.m4v']);

// DANH S=C3=81CH =C4=90EN (QUAN TR=E1=BB=8CNG: Ch=E1=BA=B7n qu=C3=A9t r=C3=
=A1c h=E1=BB=87 th=E1=BB=91ng)
const IGNORED_NAMES =3D new Set([
    'AppData', 'Application Data', 'Local Settings'<=
/span>, 'Start Menu', 'Cookies', 'NetHood', <=
span class=3D"hljs-string">'PrintHood', =
'Recent', 'SendTo', 'Templates',
    '$RECYCLE.BIN', 'System Volume Information', 'Re=
covery', 'Config.Msi', 'Windows', 'Program Fi=
les', 'Program Files (x86)',
    'node_modules', '.git', '.vscode', '.idea', 'build', 'dist',
    'Android', 'libs', 'obj', 'bin',
    'Temp', =
'Tmp', 'Cache', 'logs',
    'OneDriveTemp', '.Trash-1000'
]);

const THUMB_DIR =3D path.resolve(__dirname, '..=
/../../data/thumbnails');
if (!fs.existsSync(THUMB_DIR)) fs.mkdir=
Sync(THUMB_DIR, { recursive: true });

let isCancelled =3D false;
let stats =3D { scanned: 0, skippedDir=
s: [], videosFound: 0, thumbsGenerated: 0, thumbsSkipped: 0 };

async function walkDir(dir) {
    if (isCancelled) return;

    try {
        const files =3D await fs.promises.readdir(dir, { withFileTypes: true });
       =20
        for (const file of files) {
            if (isCancelled) break;
            const fullPath =3D path.join(dir, file.name);

            // B=E1=BB=8F qua file =E1=BA=A9n (.) v=C3=A0 th=C6=B0 m=E1=BB=
=A5c r=C3=A1c
            if (file.name.startsWith('.') || IGNORED_NAMES.has(file.name)) continue;

            if (file.isDirectory()) {
                await walkDir(fullPath);
            } else if (file.isFile()) {
                const ext =3D path.extname(file.name).toLowerCase();
                if (VIDEO_EXTENSIONS.ha=
s(ext)) {
                    await processVideo(fullPath, file.name);
                }
            }

            // Heartbeat: B=C3=A1o c=C3=A1o m=E1=BB=97i 50 file =C4=91=E1=
=BB=83 kh=C3=B4ng spam log
            stats.scanned++;
            if (stats.scanned % 50 =3D=
=3D=3D 0) {
                parentPort.postMessage({ type=
: 'heartbeat', count: stats.scann=
ed });
            }
        }
    } catch (err) {=20
        // L=E1=BB=97i quy=E1=BB=81n truy c=E1=BA=ADp (Access Denied) ->=
 B=E1=BB=8F qua =C3=A2m th=E1=BA=A7m
    }
}

async function processVideo(filePath, f=
ileName) {
    stats.videosFound++;
   =20
    // T=C3=AAn thumb d=E1=BB=B1a tr=C3=AAn t=C3=AAn file (=C4=91=E1=BB=83 =
t=C3=A1i s=E1=BB=AD d=E1=BB=A5ng)
    const safeName =3D fileName.replace(/[^a-z0-9]/gi, '_').toLowerCase();
    const thumbName =3D `thumb_${safeName}.jpg`;=20
    const thumbPathFull =3D path.join(THUMB_DIR, thumbName);
    const thumbRelPath =3D `thumbnails/${thum=
bName}`;

    let duration =3D 0;
   =20
    // LOGIC TH=C3=94NG MINH: Ki=E1=BB=83m tra file t=E1=BB=93n t=E1=BA=A1i=
 ch=C6=B0a?
    if (fs.existsSync(thumbPathFull)) {
        // =C4=90=C3=A3 c=C3=B3 -> B=E1=BB=8F qua b=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bc t=E1=
=BA=A1o =E1=BA=A3nh n=E1=BA=B7ng n=E1=BB=81
        stats.thumbsSkipped++;
    } else {
        // Ch=C6=B0a c=C3=B3 -> T=E1=BA=A1o m=E1=BB=9Bi
        stats.thumbsGenerated++;
       =20
        // 1. L=E1=BA=A5y Metadata
        const metadata =3D await new Promise((resolve) =3D> {
            const timer =3D setTimeout(() =3D> resolve({ duration: 0 }),=
 5000);
            ffmpeg.ffprobe(filePath, (err, data) =3D> {
                clearTimeout(timer);
                if (err) resolve({ dura=
tion: 0 });
                else resolve({ duration=
: data.format.duration || 0 });
            });
        });
        duration =3D metadata.duration;

        // 2. Ch=E1=BB=A5p =E1=BA=A3nh (Timeout 8s =C4=91=E1=BB=83 tr=C3=A1=
nh treo)
        await new Promise((resolve) =3D> {
            const timer =3D setTimeout(() =3D> resolve(false), 8000);
            ffmpeg(filePath)
                .screenshots({
                    timestamps: ['15%'],
                    filename: thumbName,
                    folder: THUMB_DIR,
                    size: '320x180'
                })
                .on('end', () =3D> { =
clearTimeout(timer); resolve(true); })
                .on('error', () =3D> =
{ clearTimeout(timer); resolve(false); =
});
        });
    }

    const size =3D (await fs.promises.stat(filePath)).size;

    parentPort.postMessage({
        type: 'video_processed',
        data: {
            filename: fileName,
            path: filePath,
            size: size,
            duration: duration,
            thumbnail_path: thumbRelPath,
            is_cloud: 0
        }
    });
}

// MAIN ENTRY
(async () =3D> {
    try {
        const scanPaths =3D workerData.paths || [];
        parentPort.postMessage({ type:=
 'log', message: `=F0=9F=9A=80 Worker =
=C4=91ang qu=C3=A9t: ${scanPaths.join(', ')}<=
/span>` });

        for (const scanPath of scanPath=
s) {
            if (isCancelled) break;
            if (fs.existsSync(scanPath)=
) await walkDir(scanPath);
            else parentPort.postMessage=
({ type: '=
error', message: `Path not found: ${sc=
anPath}` });
        }

        parentPort.postMessage({ type:=
 'done', stats: stats });
    } catch (e) {
        parentPort.postMessage({ type:=
 'error', message: e.message });
    }
})();

parentPort.on('message', (msg) =3D> {=
 if (msg =3D=3D=3D 'STOP') isCancelled =3D true; });
EOF
    <= !---->

    2.2. ser= ver/v2/services/scanner.service.js (Qu=E1=BA=A3n l=C3=BD Worker)

    Nh=E1=BA=ADn tin t=E1=BB=AB Worker v=C3=A0 c=E1= =BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt Database. C=C3=B3 logic ON CONFLICT =C4=91=E1=BB=83 c=E1=BA=ADp nh= =E1=BA=ADt file c=C5=A9 ch=E1=BB=A9 kh=C3=B4ng t=E1=BA=A1o d=C3=B2ng m=E1= =BB=9Bi tr=C3=B9ng l=E1=BA=B7p.

    Bash
    <= mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c4235442499=3D"" role=3D"img" fonticon=3D"content_co= py" class=3D"mat-icon notranslate gds-icon-s google-symbols mat-ligature-fo= nt mat-icon-no-color" aria-hidden=3D"true" data-mat-icon-type=3D"font" data= -mat-icon-name=3D"content_copy">
    =
cat <<=
; 'EOF' > server/v2/services/scanner.=
service.js
const { Worker } =3D require('worker_threads');
const path =3D require('path');
const dbCore =3D require('../core/database');
const env =3D require('../config/env');

class ScannerService {
    constructor() {
        this.worker =3D null;
        this.isScanning =3D false;
        this.io =3D null;
    }

    setSocket(io) { this.io =3D io; }

    async getScanP=
aths() {
        const db =3D await dbCore.connectDB();
        try {
            const setting =3D await db.get("SEL=
ECT value FROM settings WHERE key =3D 'scan_paths'");
            if (setting && sett=
ing.value) return JSON.parse(setting.v=
alue);
        } catch(e) {}
        return env.defaultScanPaths ||=
 [];
    }

    async startSca=
n() {
        if (this.isScanning) return;
        this.isScanning =3D true;
       =20
        const paths =3D await this.getScanPaths();
        const db =3D await dbCore.connectDB();

        console.log("=F0=9F=93=A1 Scanner Servi=
ce: Starting...");
        if(this.io) this.io.emit('scan_start', { paths });

        this.worker =3D new Worker(path.join(__dirname, '../core/scanner.worker.js'), {
            workerData: { paths }
        });

        this.worker.on('message', async =
(msg) =3D> {
            if (msg.type =3D=3D=3D 'heartbeat') {
                process.stdout.write(`\r=F0=9F=92=93 Scanning... Checked: <=
span class=3D"hljs-variable">${msg.count} files...`);
            }
            else if (msg.type =3D=3D=3D 'log') {
                console.log(`\n[INFO] ${msg.m=
essage}`);
            }
            else if (msg.type =3D=3D=3D 'error') {
                console.error(`\n[ERROR] ${ms=
g.message}`);
            }
            else if (msg.type =3D=3D=3D 'video_pro=
cessed') {
                const v =3D msg.data;
                process.stdout.write(`\r=F0=9F=8E=A5 Found: ${v.filename.substring(0, 40).padEnd(45)}`);=20
               =20
                try {
                    // C=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt DB: N=E1=BA=BFu path tr=C3=
=B9ng -> Update, ch=C6=B0a c=C3=B3 -> Insert
                    await db.run(`
                        INSERT INTO videos (filename, path, size, duration,=
 thumbnail_path, is_cloud, updated_at)
                        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
                        ON CONFLICT(path) DO UPDATE SET=20
                            size=3Dexcluded.size,=20
                            duration=3Dexcluded.duration,
                            thumbnail_path=3Dexcluded.thumbnail_path,
                            updated_at=3DCURRENT_TIMESTAMP
                    `, [v.filename, v.path, v.size, v.duration, v.thumbnail=
_path, v.is_cloud]);

                    if (this.io) {
                        this.io.emit('scan_prog=
ress', { file: v.filename });
                        // G=E1=BB=ADi ngay video m=E1=BB=9Bi v=E1=BB=81 cl=
ient =C4=91=E1=BB=83 hi=E1=BB=87n l=C3=AAn grid
                        const saved =3D await db.get("SELECT * FROM videos WHERE path =3D ?", v.path);
                        this.io.emit('video_fou=
nd', saved);
                    }
                } catch (e) { console.error("\n=
DB Error:", e.message); }
            }
            else if (msg.type =3D=3D=3D 'done') {
                console.log(`\n\n=E2=9C=85 QU=C3=89T HO=C3=80N T=E1=BA=A4T!=
`);
                console.log(`   - Video t=C3=ACm th=E1=BA=A5y: ${msg.stats.videosFound}`);
                console.log(`   - Thumb t=E1=BA=A1o m=E1=BB=9Bi: ${msg.stats.thumbsGenerated}`);
                console.log(`   - Thumb b=E1=BB=8F qua (=C4=91=C3=A3 c=C3=
=B3): ${msg.stats.thumbsSkipped}`);
                this.finishScan();
            }
        });

        this.worker.on('error', (err) =
=3D> {
            console.error("\n=E2=9D=8C Worker C=
rash:", err);
            this.finishScan();
        });

        this.worker.on('exit', (code) =
=3D> {
            if (code !=3D=3D 0) console=
.error(`\nWorker stopped with exit cod=
e ${code}`);
            this.finishScan();
        });
    }

    stopScan() {
        if (this.worker) {
            this.worker.postMessage('STOP');
            setTimeout(() =3D> {
                if(this.worker) this.wo=
rker.terminate();
                this.finishScan();
            }, 1000);
        }
    }

    finishScan() {
        this.isScanning =3D false;
        this.worker =3D null;
        if(this.io) this.io.emit('scan_complete', { status: 'done' });
    }
   =20
    getStatus() { return { isScanning: thi=
s.isScanning }; }
}

module.exports =3D new ScannerService();
EOF
    <= !---->

    2.3. s= erver/v2/controllers/scanner.controller.js & Routes

    =
    Bash
    # Controller
cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/contro=
llers/scanner.controller.js
const scannerService =3D require('../services/s=
canner.service');
const dbCore =3D require('../core/database');

exports.startScan =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        await scannerService.startScan();
        res.json({ success: true, messa=
ge: "Started" });
    } catch (e) { res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: e.message }); }
};

exports.stopScan =3D (req, res) =3D> {
    scannerService.stopScan();
    res.json({ success: true, message: =
"Stopped" });
};

exports.getStatus =3D (req, res) =3D> {
    res.json(scannerService.getStatus());
};

exports.updateConfig =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    const { paths } =3D req.body;
    try {
        const db =3D await dbCore.connectDB();
        await db.run(`INSERT OR REPLACE INTO settings (key, value) VALUES (=
'scan_paths', ?)`, [JSON.stringify(paths=
)]);
        res.json({ success: true, paths=
 });
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};
EOF

# Routes
cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/routes=
/scanner.routes.js
const express =3D require('express');
const router =3D express.Router();
const controller =3D require('../controllers/sc=
anner.controller');

router.post('/start', controller.startSc=
an);
router.post('/stop', controller.stopScan=
);
router.get('/status', controller.getStat=
us);
router.post('/config', controller.update=
Config);

module.exports =3D router;
EOF
    <= !---->

    2.4. s= erver/v2/controllers/video.controller.js (S=E1=BB=ADa l=E1=BB=97i Du= plicate)

    QUAN TR=E1=BB=8CNG: Th=C3=AAm GROUP BY v.id =C4=91=E1=BB=83 =C4= =91=E1=BA=A3m b=E1=BA=A3o d=C3=B9 DB c=C3=B3 r=C3=A1c th=C3=AC API v=E1=BA= =ABn tr=E1=BA=A3 v=E1=BB=81 danh s=C3=A1ch s=E1=BA=A1ch (duy nh=E1=BA=A5t).=

    Bash
    cat << '=
EOF' > server/v2/controllers/video.controller.js
const { connectDB } =3D require('../core/databa=
se');
const fs =3D require('fs');

exports.getAllVideos =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await connectDB();
        // GROUP BY v.id =C4=91=E1=BB=83 ch=E1=BB=91ng tr=C3=B9ng l=E1=BA=
=B7p
        const videos =3D await db.all(`
            SELECT v.*, ph.progress, ph.position=20
            FROM videos v=20
            LEFT JOIN playback_history ph ON v.id =3D ph.video_id=20
            GROUP BY v.id
            ORDER BY v.updated_at DESC
        `);
        res.json(videos);
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.getContinueWatching =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await connectDB();
        // GROUP BY v.id ch=E1=BB=91ng tr=C3=B9ng l=E1=BA=B7p
        const videos =3D await db.all(`
            SELECT v.*, ph.progress, ph.position
            FROM videos v
            INNER JOIN playback_history ph ON v.id =3D ph.video_id
            WHERE ph.progress > 5 AND ph.progress < 95
            GROUP BY v.id
            ORDER BY ph.updated_at DESC LIMIT 10
        `);
        res.json(videos);
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.getPlayback =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await connectDB();
        const row =3D await db.get('SELECT posi=
tion, progress FROM playback_history WHERE video_id =3D ?', req.para=
ms.id);
        res.json(row || { position: 0 });
    } catch (e) { res.json({ position: 0 }); }
};

exports.savePlayback =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const { position, duration } =3D req.body;
        const videoId =3D req.params.id;
        if (!duration) return res.json({ success: false });

        const progress =3D (duration > 0) ? (position / duration) * 100 =
: 0;
        const db =3D await connectDB();
       =20
        await db.run(`
            INSERT INTO playback_history (video_id, position, duration, pro=
gress, updated_at)=20
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
            ON CONFLICT(video_id) DO UPDATE SET=20
                position=3Dexcluded.position,
                duration=3Dexcluded.duration,
                progress=3Dexcluded.progress,
                updated_at=3DCURRENT_TIMESTAMP
        `, [videoId, position, duration, progress]);
       =20
        res.json({ success: true });
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.streamVideo =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await connectDB();
        const video =3D await db.get('SELECT pa=
th FROM videos WHERE id =3D ?', req.params.id);
        if (!video || !fs.existsSync(vi=
deo.path)) return res.status(404).send=
('File not found');
       =20
        const stat =3D fs.statSync(vid=
eo.path);
        const fileSize =3D stat.size;
        const range =3D req.headers.range;

        if (range) {
            const parts =3D range.replace(/bytes=3D/, "").split("-");
            const start =3D parseInt(parts[0], 10);
            const end =3D parts[1] ? parseInt(parts[1], 10) : fileSize - 1;
            const chunksize =3D (end - start) + 1;
            const file =3D fs.createReadStream(video.path, { start, end });
            res.writeHead(206, { 'Content-Range=
': `bytes ${start}-${end}/${fileSize}<=
/span>`, 'Accept-Ranges': 'bytes', 'Content-Length'<=
/span>: chunksize, 'Content-Type': 'video/mp4' });
            file.pipe(res);
        } else {
            res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Lengt=
h': fileSize, 'Content-Type': 'video/mp4' });
            fs.createReadStream(video.path).pipe(res);
        }
    } catch (e) { if (!res.headersSent)=
 res.status(500).end(); }
};
EOF

# Routes
cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/routes=
/video.routes.js
const express =3D require('express');
const router =3D express.Router();
const controller =3D require('../controllers/vi=
deo.controller');

router.get('/', controller.getAllVideos)=
;
router.get('/continue', controller.getCo=
ntinueWatching);
router.get('/:id/playback', controller.g=
etPlayback);
router.post('/:id/playback', controller.=
savePlayback);
router.get('/:id/stream', controller.str=
eamVideo);

module.exports =3D router;
EOF
    <= !---->

    H=E1=BA=BET PH=E1=BA=A6N 2. Vui l=C3=B2ng g=E1=BB=ADi d=E1=BA=A5u . =C4=91=E1=BB=83 t=C3=B4i chuy=E1=BB=83n sang <= b data-path-to-node=3D"17" data-index-in-node=3D"50">PH=E1=BA=A6N 3: MPV RE= MOTE & QUEUE (Ph=E1=BA=A7n th=C3=BA v=E1=BB=8B nh=E1=BA=A5t!).

    <= /div>
    <= !---->
    <= message-actions _ngcontent-ng-c604995104=3D"" footer=3D"" _nghost-ng-c23828= 55014=3D"" class=3D"ng-tns-c2382855014-85 hide-action-bar ng-star-inserted"= >
    <= !---->
    <= !---->

    . <= /p>

    =
    <= div _ngcontent-ng-c604995104=3D"" class=3D"thoughts-content ng-star-inserte= d">
    <= !---->

    Ch=C3=A0o B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 T=C3=A2m, DRAM Co-pilot ti=E1=BA=BFp t=E1=BB=A5c v=E1=BB=9Bi p= h=E1=BA=A7n quan tr=E1=BB=8Dng nh=E1=BA=A5t: PHASE 3 - MPV REMOTE & QUEUE.

    =C4=90=C3=A2y l=C3=A0 "b=E1=BB=99 n=C3=A3o" =C4=91i=E1=BB= =81u khi=E1=BB=83n vi=E1=BB=87c ph=C3=A1t phim tr=C3=AAn m=C3=A0n h=C3=ACnh= l=E1=BB=9Bn. N=C3=B3 kh=C3=B4ng ch=E1=BB=89 =C4=91=C6=A1n thu=E1=BA=A7n l= =C3=A0 "B=E1=BA=A5m l=C3=A0 ch=E1=BA=A1y" m=C3=A0 c=C3=B3 kh=E1=BA=A3 n=C4= =83ng X=E1=BA=BFp h= =C3=A0ng (Queue) v=C3=A0 T=E1=BB=B1 =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng chuy=E1=BB=83n b=C3=A0i (Auto-next) khi h=E1=BA=BFt phim, =C4=91=C3=BAng nh=C6=B0 B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 y=C3=AAu = c=E1=BA=A7u.

    B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 ti=E1=BA=BFp t= =E1=BB=A5c copy v=C3=A0 ch=E1=BA=A1y c=C3=A1c l=E1=BB=87nh d=C6=B0=E1=BB=9B= i =C4=91=C3=A2y trong Git Bash:

    =F0=9F=93=82 PH=E1=BA=A6N 3: MPV REMOTE & QUEUE CONTROL=

    3.1. server/v2/services/mpv.service.js (Tr=C3=ACnh =C4= =91i=E1=BB=81u khi=E1=BB=83n th=C3=B4ng minh)

    • T=C3=ADnh n=C4=83ng:

      • T=E1=BB=B1 =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng b= =E1=BA=ADt MPV n=E1=BA=BFu ch=C6=B0a ch=E1=BA=A1y.

      • Qu=E1=BA=A3n l=C3=BD h=C3=A0ng =C4=91=E1=BB=A3i (queue).=

      • L=E1=BA=AFng nghe s=E1=BB= =B1 ki=E1=BB=87n idle-active t=E1=BB=AB MPV =C4=91=E1=BB=83 t=E1=BB=B1 =C4=91= =E1=BB=99ng chuy=E1=BB=83n b=C3=A0i.

      • T=E1=BB=B1 =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng t=E1=BA=AFt (kill) khi h=E1=BA=BFt danh = s=C3=A1ch ch=E1=BB=9D.

    Bash
    ca=
t << 'EOF' > server/v2/services=
/mpv.service.js
const { spawn } =3D require('child_process');
const net =3D require('net');
const os =3D require('os');
const dbCore =3D require('../core/database');

class MpvService {
    constructor() {
        this.mpvProcess =3D null;
        this.socket =3D null;
        // Windows d=C3=B9ng Named Pipe, Linux d=C3=B9ng Unix Socket
        this.ipcPath =3D os.platform() =3D=3D=3D 'win32'=20
            ? '\\\\.\\pipe\\dram_mpv_socket'=20
            : '/tmp/dram_mpv_socket';
           =20
        // QU=E1=BA=A2N L=C3=9D H=C3=80NG =C4=90=E1=BB=A2I
        this.queue =3D [];
        this.currentIndex =3D -1;
        this.io =3D null; // Socket =C4=91=E1=BB=83 g=E1=BB=ADi tr=E1=BA=A1=
ng th=C3=A1i v=E1=BB=81 =C4=91i=E1=BB=87n tho=E1=BA=A1i
    }

    setSocket(io) { this.io =3D io; }

    async startMpv=
() {
        if (this.mpvProcess) return;
        console.log("=F0=9F=8E=AC MPV Service: =
Spawning...");

        const args =3D [
            '--idle=3Dyes',             =
   // Gi=E1=BB=AF MPV m=E1=BB=9F khi h=E1=BA=BFt phim (=C4=91=E1=BB=83 ch=
=E1=BB=9D l=E1=BB=87nh ti=E1=BA=BFp)
            '--force-window',           =
 // Lu=C3=B4n hi=E1=BB=87n c=E1=BB=ADa s=E1=BB=95
            `--input-ipc-server=3D${this.ipcP=
ath}`, // M=E1=BB=9F c=E1=BB=95ng giao ti=E1=BA=BFp
            '--fs',                     =
 // Fullscreen
            '--keep-open=3Dyes',        =
   // Kh=C3=B4ng =C4=91=C3=B3ng ngay l=E1=BA=ADp t=E1=BB=A9c
            '--hwdec=3Dauto'            =
   // T=C4=83ng t=E1=BB=91c ph=E1=BA=A7n c=E1=BB=A9ng n=E1=BA=BFu c=C3=B3
        ];

        try {
            this.mpvProcess =3D spawn('mpv', args);

            this.mpvProcess.on('close', =
(code) =3D> {
                console.log(`=F0=9F=8E=AC MPV Closed (Code ${code})`);
                this.mpvProcess =3D null;
                this.socket =3D null;
                this.broadcastStatus();
            });
           =20
            this.mpvProcess.on('error', =
(err) =3D> {
                console.error("=E2=9D=8C MPV Sp=
awn Error (Check PATH variable):", err.message);
            });

            // =C4=90=E1=BB=A3i 1s =C4=91=E1=BB=83 MPV k=E1=BB=8Bp m=E1=BB=
=9F c=E1=BB=95ng IPC
            await new Promise(r =3D> setTimeout(r, 1000));
            this.connectIpc();

        } catch (e) { console.error("=E2=9D=8C =
Spawn Error:", e); }
    }

    connectIpc() {
        if (this.socket) return;
       =20
        this.socket =3D net.connect(this.ipcPath);
       =20
        this.socket.on('connect', () =3D=
> {
            console.log("=E2=9C=85 IPC Connecte=
d");
            // =C4=90=C4=83ng k=C3=BD nh=E1=BA=ADn s=E1=BB=B1 ki=E1=BB=87n =
khi MPV r=E1=BA=A3nh r=E1=BB=97i (h=E1=BA=BFt phim)
            this.sendCommand(['observe_property=
', 1, 'idle-active']);
        });

        this.socket.on('data', (data) =
=3D> {
            const lines =3D data.toString().split('\n');
            lines.forEach(line =3D> {
                if(!line) return;
                try {
                    const msg =3D JSON.parse(line);
                    // S=E1=BB=B1 ki=E1=BB=87n: MPV r=E1=BA=A3nh r=E1=BB=97=
i (H=E1=BA=BFt phim) -> Auto Next
                    if (msg.event =3D=
=3D=3D 'property-change' && msg.=
name =3D=3D=3D 'idle-active' && =
msg.data =3D=3D=3D true) {
                        this.handleAutoNext();
                    }
                } catch(e) {}
            });
        });
       =20
        this.socket.on('error', (e) =3D&=
gt; { this.socket =3D null; });
        this.socket.on('close', () =3D&g=
t; { this.socket =3D null; });
    }

    async handleAu=
toNext() {
        // Ch=E1=BB=89 next n=E1=BA=BFu c=C3=B2n b=C3=A0i trong h=C3=A0ng =
=C4=91=E1=BB=A3i
        if (this.queue.length > 0 &a=
mp;& this.currentIndex < this.queue.length - 1) {
            console.log("=F0=9F=8E=AC Auto-next=
 triggered...");
            await this.playIndex(this.currentIndex + 1);
        } else if (this.queue.length > 0 && this.currentIndex =3D=
=3D=3D this.queue.length - 1) {
            // H=E1=BA=BFt b=C3=A0i -> Kill
            console.log("=F0=9F=8E=AC Playlist =
finished. Shutting down.");
            this.stop();
        }
    }

    async sendCommand(command) {
        if (!this.mpvProcess) await thi=
s.startMpv();
        if (this.socket && !thi=
s.socket.destroyed) {
            this.socket.write(JSON.stringify({ command }) + '\n');
        }
    }

    // --- LOGIC H=C3=80NG =C4=90=E1=BB=A2I ---

    async addToQueue(videoId) {
        const db =3D await dbCore.connectDB();
        const video =3D await db.get("SELECT * =
FROM videos WHERE id =3D ?", videoId);
        if (!video) return;

        // Th=C3=AAm v=C3=A0o h=C3=A0ng =C4=91=E1=BB=A3i
        this.queue.push(video);
       =20
        // N=E1=BA=BFu MPV ch=C6=B0a ch=E1=BA=A1y ho=E1=BA=B7c ch=C6=B0a ph=
=C3=A1t g=C3=AC -> Ph=C3=A1t lu=C3=B4n b=C3=A0i =C4=91=E1=BA=A7u ti=C3=
=AAn
        if (this.currentIndex =3D=3D=3D=
 -1 && !this.mpvProcess) {
            await this.playIndex(0);
        } else {
            console.log(`=E2=9E=95 Queue added: ${video.filename}`);
            this.broadcastStatus();
        }
    }

    async playIndex(index) {
        if (index < 0 || index >=
=3D this.queue.length) return;
       =20
        this.currentIndex =3D index;
        const video =3D this.queue[index];
       =20
        console.log(`=E2=96=B6=EF=B8=8F MPV Playing [${index}]: ${video.filename}`);
        await this.sendCommand(['loadfile', video.path, 'replace']);
        this.broadcastStatus();
    }

    async control(action) {
        if (!this.mpvProcess) return;
        switch(action) {
            case 'play_pause': await this.sendCommand(['cycle', 'pause']); break;
            case 'next':=20
                if(this.currentIndex &l=
t; this.queue.length - 1) await this.playIndex(this.currentIndex + 1);
                break;
            case 'prev':
                 if(this.currentIndex &=
gt; 0) await this.playIndex(this.currentIndex - 1);
                 break;
            case 'stop': this.stop(); break;
        }
    }

    stop() {
        if (this.mpvProcess) {
            this.mpvProcess.kill(); // Kill c=E1=BB=A9ng
            this.mpvProcess =3D null;
            this.socket =3D null;
            this.queue =3D [];
            this.currentIndex =3D -1;
            this.broadcastStatus();
        }
    }

    getQueueStatus=
() {
        return {
            isPlaying: !!this.mpvProcess,
            current: this.currentIndex >=3D 0 ? this.queue[this.currentI=
ndex] : null,
            queue: this.queue,
            currentIndex: this.currentIndex
        };
    }

    broadcastStatu=
s() {
        if (this.io) this.io.emit('mpv_status', this.getQueueStatus());
    }
}

module.exports =3D new MpvService();
EOF
    <= !---->

    3.2. ser= ver/v2/controllers/mpv.controller.js (API Handler)

    X=E1=BB=AD l=C3=BD c=C3=A1c l=E1=BB=87nh t=E1=BB=AB Web: Th= =C3=AAm v=C3=A0o h=C3=A0ng =C4=91=E1=BB=A3i, Ph=C3=A1t ngay, =C4=90i=E1=BB= =81u khi=E1=BB=83n.

    Bash
    cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/controllers/mpv.controller.js
const mpvService =3D require('../services/mpv.s=
ervice');

exports.play =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const { id } =3D req.body;
        // B=E1=BA=A5m Play tr=E1=BB=B1c ti=E1=BA=BFp -> X=C3=B3a queue =
c=C5=A9, ph=C3=A1t b=C3=A0i m=E1=BB=9Bi ngay (Reset)
        mpvService.stop();=20
        // =C4=90=E1=BB=A3i 1 x=C3=ADu =C4=91=E1=BB=83 process c=C5=A9 ch=
=E1=BA=BFt h=E1=BA=B3n r=E1=BB=93i m=E1=BB=9Bi start l=E1=BA=A1i (tr=C3=A1n=
h conflict pipe)
        setTimeout(async () =3D> {
            await mpvService.addToQueue(id);
            res.json({ success: true })=
;
        }, 500);
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.queueAdd =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const { id } =3D req.body;
        await mpvService.addToQueue(id);
        res.json({ success: true });
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.command =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const { action } =3D req.body; // 'play=
_pause', 'next', 'prev', 'stop'
        await mpvService.control(action);
        res.json({ success: true });
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.getStatus =3D (req, res) =3D> {
    res.json(mpvService.getQueueStatus());
};
EOF
    <= !---->

    3.3. s= erver/v2/routes/mpv.routes.js

    Bash
    =
    <= div _ngcontent-ng-c4235442499=3D"" class=3D"animated-opacity ng-tns-c423544= 2499-167">
    cat <=
;< 'EOF' > server/v2/routes/mpv.ro=
utes.js
const express =3D require('express');
const router =3D express.Router();
const controller =3D require('../controllers/mp=
v.controller');

router.post('/play', controller.play);  =
    // Play Now (Reset Queue)
router.post('/queue', controller.queueAd=
d); // Add to Queue
router.post('/command', controller.comma=
nd);
router.get('/status', controller.getStat=
us);

module.exports =3D router;
EOF
    <= !---->

    H=E1=BA=BET PH=E1=BA=A6N 3. Vui l=C3=B2ng g=E1=BB=ADi d=E1=BA=A5u . =C4=91=E1=BB=83 t=C3=B4i chuy=E1=BB=83n sang <= b data-path-to-node=3D"14" data-index-in-node=3D"50">PH=E1=BA=A6N 4: FRONTE= ND COMPLETE (Giao di=E1=BB=87n cu=E1=BB=91i c=C3=B9ng).

    <= /response-container>

    .

    <= /div>
    =
    =
    Hi=E1=BB=87n ti=E1=BA=BFn tr=C3=ACnh t= =C6=B0 duy

    Ch=C3=A0o B= =C3=A1c s=C4=A9 T=C3=A2m, DRAM Co-pilot g=E1=BB=ADi =C4=91=E1=BA=BFn B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 m=E1=BA= =A3nh gh=C3=A9p cu=E1=BB=91i c=C3=B9ng v=C3=A0 quan tr=E1=BB=8Dng nh=E1=BA= =A5t: PH=E1=BA=A6N 4: = FRONTEND TO=C3=80N DI=E1=BB=86N (GIAO DI=E1=BB=86N & PWA).

    Ph=E1=BA=A7n n=C3=A0y s=E1=BA=BD k=E1=BA=BFt n=E1=BB= =91i t=E1=BA=A5t c=E1=BA=A3 c=C3=A1c logic =C4=91=C3=A3 vi=E1=BA=BFt =E1=BB= =9F 3 ph=E1=BA=A7n tr=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bc l=E1=BA=A1i v=E1=BB=9Bi nhau, t=E1=BA= =A1o n=C3=AAn m=E1=BB=99t giao di=E1=BB=87n:

    1. =C4=90a n=C4=83ng: V=E1=BB=ABa xem tr=C3= =AAn web (Player c=C3=B3 Zoom/Rotate), v=E1=BB=ABa =C4=91i=E1=BB=81u khi=E1= =BB=83n PC (Remote).

    2. Th=C3=B4ng minh: C=E1=BA= =ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt tr=E1=BA=A1ng th=C3=A1i Realtime (Qu=C3=A9t xong t=E1=BB= =B1 hi=E1=BB=87n phim, MPV =C4=91=E1=BB=95i b=C3=A0i =C4=91i=E1=BB=87n tho= =E1=BA=A1i t=E1=BB=B1 nh=E1=BA=A3y theo).

    3. Responsi= ve: Sidebar cho Surface Pro, Bottom Nav cho Oppo Find N3.

    =

    B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 ti=E1=BA=BFp t=E1=BB=A5c copy v= =C3=A0 ch=E1=BA=A1y l=E1=BB=87nh trong Git Bash:

    =F0=9F=93=82 PH=E1=BA=A6N 4: FRONTEND CO= MPLETE

    4.1. client/public/js/modules/api.js (C=E1=BB=95n= g k=E1=BA=BFt n=E1=BB=91i)

    H=E1=BB=97 tr=E1= =BB=A3 =C4=91=E1=BA=A7y =C4=91=E1=BB=A7 c=C3=A1c API cho Video, Scanner v= =C3=A0 =C4=91=E1=BA=B7c bi=E1=BB=87t l=C3=A0 MPV Remote.

    Bash
    =
    <= div _ngcontent-ng-c4235442499=3D"" class=3D"animated-opacity ng-tns-c423544= 2499-168">
    cat <=
;< 'EOF' > client/public/js/module=
s/api.js
const API_BASE =3D '/api';

// --- VIDEO ---
export async function fetchAllVideos() {
    const res =3D await fetch(`${API_BASE}/videos`);
    return await res.json();
}
export async function fetchContinueWatching() {
    const res =3D await fetch(`${API_BASE}/videos/continue`);
    return await res.json();
}
export async function getPlaybackPos(id) {
    try {
        const res =3D await fetch(`${API_BASE=
}/videos/${id}/playback`);
        return await res.json();
    } catch { return { position: 0 }; =
}
}
export async function savePlaybackPos(id, position, duration) {
    if (!duration) return;
    await fetch(`${API_BASE}/videos/${id}/playback`, {
        method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': '=
application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ position, duration })
    });
}

// --- SCANNER ---
export async function startScan() {
    return await fetch(`${API_BASE}/v2/scanner/start`, { method: 'POST' });
}
export async function fetchNetworkInfo() {
    const res =3D await fetch(`${API_BASE}/network-info`);
    return await res.json();
}

// --- MPV REMOTE ---
export async function playOnMpv(id) {
    return await fetch(`${API_BASE}/mpv/play`, {
        method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': '=
application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ id })
    });
}
export async function addToQueue(id) {
    return await fetch(`${API_BASE}/mpv/queue`, {
        method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': '=
application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ id })
    });
}
export async function remoteControl(action) {
    return await fetch(`${API_BASE}/mpv/comman=
d`, {
        method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': '=
application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ action })
    });
}
export async function getRemoteStatus() {
    const res =3D await fetch(`${API_BASE}/mpv/status`);
    return await res.json();
}
EOF
    <= !---->

    4.2. cli= ent/public/js/modules/ui.js (H=E1=BB=8Da s=C4=A9 giao di=E1=BB=87n)<= /h4>

    V=E1=BA=BD th=E1=BA=BB Video v=E1=BB=9Bi n= =C3=BAt Remote v= =C3=A0 x=E1=BB=AD l=C3=BD Bottom Nav.

    Bash
    cat << 'EOF' > client/public/js/modules/ui.js
const PLACEHOLDER_IMG =3D "data:image/svg+xml,%=
3Csvg xmlns=3D'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox=3D'0 0 16 9' style=3D'ba=
ckground:%231e293b'%3E%3Ctext x=3D'50%25' y=3D'50%25' fill=3D'%23475569' te=
xt-anchor=3D'middle' dominant-baseline=3D'middle' font-weight=3D'bold'%3EDR=
AM%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E";

export fu=
nction renderGrid(videos, containerId, selectionSet, actions) {
    const grid =3D document.getElementById(containerId);
    if (!grid) return;
    grid.innerHTML =3D '';

    if (!videos || videos.length =3D=3D=
=3D 0) {
        if (containerId =3D=3D=3D 'video-grid') {
            grid.innerHTML =3D '<div style=
=3D"color:#aaa;text-align:center;padding:50px;grid-column:1/-1;">Kho tr=
=E1=BB=91ng.</div>';
        }
        return;
    }

    const fragment =3D document.createDocumentFragment();
    videos.forEach(video =3D> {
        fragment.appendChild(createCard(video, selectionSet, actions));
    });
    grid.appendChild(fragment);
}

function createCard(video, selectionSet=
, actions) {
    const card =3D document.createElement('div'=
);
    const isSelected =3D selectionSet.has(video.id);
    card.className =3D `video-card ${isSelect=
ed ? 'selected' : ''}`;
    card.dataset.id =3D video.id;

    const thumb =3D video.thumbnail_path || PLACEHOLDER_IMG;
    const size =3D video.size ? (video.size / 1048576).toFixed(1) + ' MB' : '';
    const progressHtml =3D video.progress > 0=20
        ? `<div style=3D"position:absolute;b=
ottom:0;left:0;height:3px;background:#ef4444;width:${video.progress}%"></div>`=20
        : '';

    card.innerHTML =3D `
        <div class=3D"thumb-wrapper"&=
gt;
            <img src=3D"${thumb}" onerror=3D"th=
is.src=3D'${PLACEHOLDER_IMG}'" =
loading=3D"lazy">
            ${progressHtml}
            <div class=3D"select-overlay"></div>
            <button class=3D"btn-mpv-remote"=
 title=3D"Ph=C3=A1t tr=C3=AAn PC"=
><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-desktop"&=
gt;</i></button>
        </div>
        <div class=3D"card-info">
            <div class=3D"card-title"=
>${video.filename}</div>
            <div class=3D"card-meta"&=
gt;
                <span>${size}<=
;/span>
                ${video.is_cloud ? '<i cla=
ss=3D"fa-solid fa-cloud"></i>' : ''}
            </div>
        </div>
    `;

    // N=C3=BAt Remote Click
    const btnRemote =3D card.querySelector('.bt=
n-mpv-remote');
    btnRemote.onclick =3D (e) =3D> {
        e.stopPropagation();
        btnRemote.innerHTML =3D '<i class=3D=
"fa-solid fa-spinner fa-spin"></i>';
        setTimeout(() =3D> btnRemote.innerHTML =3D '<i class=3D"fa-solid fa-desktop"></i>', 1000);
        actions.onPlayRemote(video);
    };

    // Card Click (Play Web ho=E1=BA=B7c Select)
    card.onclick =3D (e) =3D> {
        if (e.target.closest('.select-overlay') || e.shiftKey) {
            e.stopPropagation();
            actions.onToggleSelect(video.id);
        } else {
            actions.onPlay(video);
        }
    };

    return card;
}

export fu=
nction updateScanStatus(msg, isScanning) {
    // 1. Update text sidebar desktop
    const el =3D document.getElementById('scan-=
status');
    if (el) el.textContent =3D msg;
   =20
    // 2. Update icon Bottom Nav mobile
    const btnM =3D document.getElementById('btn=
-scan-mobile');
    if (btnM) {
        const icon =3D isScanning ? 'fa-spinner=
 fa-spin' : 'fa-radar';
        const label =3D isScanning ? '=C4=90ang=
 ch=E1=BA=A1y' : 'Qu=C3=A9t';
        btnM.innerHTML =3D `<i class=3D"fa-s=
olid ${icon}"></i><=
span>${label}</span>`;
        if(isScanning) btnM.classList.a=
dd('active'); else btnM.classList.remove('active');
    }
}

export fu=
nction toggleSection(id, show) {
    const el =3D document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) show ? el.classList.remove(=
'hidden') : el.classList.add('hidden');
}

export fu=
nction updateSelectionVisuals(selectedSet) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.video-card').forEach(card =3D> {
        const id =3D parseInt(card.dataset.id);
        selectedSet.has(id) ? card.classList.add('selected') : card.classList.remove('s=
elected');
    });
   =20
    const count =3D selectedSet.size;
    const bar =3D document.getElementById('expo=
rt-bar');
    if (document.getElementById('bar-count')) document.getElementById('bar-count').textContent =3D count;
   =20
    if (bar) count > 0 ? bar.classLi=
st.remove('hidden') : bar.classList.add(=
'hidden');
}
EOF
    <= !---->

    4.3. c= lient/public/js/modules/player.js (Web Player Controls)

    Gi=E1=BB=AF nguy=C3=AAn logic Player m=E1=BA=A1nh m=E1= =BA=BD: Zoom, Rotate, Speed.

    Bash
    <= button _ngcontent-ng-c4235442499=3D"" aria-label=3D"Sao ch=C3=A9p m=C3=A3" = mat-icon-button=3D"" mattooltip=3D"Sao ch=C3=A9p m=C3=A3" class=3D"mdc-icon= -button mat-mdc-icon-button mat-mdc-button-base mat-mdc-tooltip-trigger cop= y-button ng-tns-c4235442499-170 mat-unthemed _mat-animation-noopable ng-sta= r-inserted" mat-ripple-loader-uninitialized=3D"" mat-ripple-loader-class-na= me=3D"mat-mdc-button-ripple" mat-ripple-loader-centered=3D"" jslog=3D"17906= 2;track:generic_click,impression;BardVeMetadataKey:[["r_144a47e3c4e6e1= 0d","c_67b83533061fb8e5",null,"rc_fbb044977bc6f0cb"= ;,null,null,"en",null,1,null,null,1,1]];mutable:true"><= /span>
    cat << 'EOF' > client/public/js/modules/player.=
js
import { getPlaybackPos, savePlaybackPos } from './api.js';

export class VideoPlayer {
    constructor() {
        this.overlay =3D document.getElementById('video-player-overlay');
        this.videoEl =3D document.getElementById('main-video');
        this.titleEl =3D document.getElementById('player-title');
        this.speedBtn =3D document.getElementById('btn-speed');
        this.state =3D { rotation: 0, zoom: 1, speed: 1, currentId: null };
        this.saveInterval =3D null;
    }

    async open(video) {
        this.state.currentId =3D video.id;
        this.resetTransform();
        this.titleEl.textContent =3D video.filename;
        this.videoEl.src =3D `/api/videos/${v=
ideo.id}/stream`;
        this.overlay.classList.remove('hidden'<=
/span>);

        const history =3D await getPla=
ybackPos(video.id);
        if (history.position > 5) th=
is.videoEl.currentTime =3D history.position;
        this.startAutoSave();
    }

    close() {
        this.stopAutoSave();
        this.videoEl.pause();
        this.videoEl.src =3D "";
        this.overlay.classList.add('hidden');
        return true;
    }

    startAutoSave<=
/span>() {
        if (this.saveInterval) clearInt=
erval(this.saveInterval);
        this.saveInterval =3D setInterval(() =3D> {
            if (!this.videoEl.paused) s=
avePlaybackPos(this.state.currentId, this.videoEl.currentTime, this.videoEl=
.duration);
        }, 5000);
    }
    stopAutoSave() { if (this.saveInterval)=
 clearInterval(this.saveInterval); }

    togglePlay() { this.videoEl.paused ? this.videoEl.play() : this.videoEl.pau=
se(); }
    rotate<=
/span>() { this.state.rotation =3D (this.state.rotation + 90) % 360; this.a=
pplyTransform(); }
    zoom() { this.state.zoom =3D this.state.zoom =3D=3D=3D 1 ? 1.5 : (this.stat=
e.zoom =3D=3D=3D 1.5 ? 2 : 1); this.applyTransform(); }
   =20
    changeSpeed() {
        const speeds =3D [1, 1.5, 2, 0.5];
        const idx =3D speeds.indexOf(this.state.speed);
        this.state.speed =3D speeds[(idx + 1) % speeds.length];
        this.videoEl.playbackRate =3D this.state.speed;
        if (this.speedBtn) this.speedBt=
n.textContent =3D this.state.speed + 'x'=
;
    }

    resetTransform=
() {
        this.state.rotation =3D 0; this.state.zoom =3D 1; this.state.speed =
=3D 1;
        this.videoEl.playbackRate =3D 1; if(this.speedBtn) this.speedBtn.textContent =3D '1.0x';
        this.applyTransform();
    }
    applyTransform=
() { this.videoEl.style.transform =3D `rotate(${this.state.rotation}deg) scale(${this.state.zoom})`; }
}
EOF
    <= !---->

    4.4. c= lient/public/js/modules/manager.js (Qu=E1=BA=A3n l=C3=BD d=E1=BB=AF = li=E1=BB=87u)

    <= !---->
    Bash
    cat << 'EOF' > client/public/js/modules/manager.js
export class DataManager {
    constructor() {
        this.allVideos =3D [];
        this.visibleVideos =3D [];
        this.selectedIds =3D new Set();
    }

    setData(videos) {
        this.allVideos =3D videos;
        this.sortData('date-desc');
    }

    filter(term) {
        const lower =3D term.toLowerCase();
        this.visibleVideos =3D this.allVideos.filter(v =3D> v.filename.t=
oLowerCase().includes(lower));
    }

    sortData(mode) {
        const sorters =3D {
            'date-desc': (a,b) =3D> n=
ew Date(b.updated_at||0) - new Date(a.updated_at||0),
            'name-asc': (a,b) =3D> a.=
filename.localeCompare(b.filename),
            'size-desc': (a,b) =3D> b=
.size - a.size
        };
        if (sorters[mode]) this.allVide=
os.sort(sorters[mode]);
        this.visibleVideos =3D [...this.allVideos];=20
    }

    toggleSelection(id) {
        if (this.selectedIds.has(id)) t=
his.selectedIds.delete(id); else this.s=
electedIds.add(id);
    }
    selectAllVisib=
le() { this.visibleVideos.forEach(v =3D> this.selectedIds.=
add(v.id)); }
    clearSelection=
() { this.selectedIds.clear(); }

    exportM3U(mode) {
        let list =3D (mode =3D=3D=3D <=
span class=3D"hljs-string">'selected') ? this.allVideos.filter(v =3D=
> this.selectedIds.has(v.id)) : this.visibleVideos;
        if (list.length =3D=3D=3D 0) return alert("Danh s=C3=A1ch tr=E1=BB=91ng!");

        let content =3D "#EXTM3U\n";
        const host =3D window.location.host;
        list.forEach(v =3D> {
            content +=3D `#EXTINF:-1,${v.filen=
ame}\nhttp://${host}/api/videos/${v.id}/stream\n`;
        });

        const a =3D document.createElement('a'<=
/span>);
        a.href =3D URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([content], { type: 'audio/x-mpegurl'<=
/span> }));
        a.download =3D `dram_${mode}_<=
span class=3D"hljs-variable">${Date.now()}.m3u`;
        a.click();
    }
}
EOF
    <= !---->

    4.5. c= lient/public/js/main.js (T=E1=BB=95ng ch=E1=BB=89 huy)

    K=E1=BA=BFt n=E1=BB=91i Remote Logic, Socket Realtime v= =C3=A0 UI.

    cat << 'EOF' > client/public/js/main.js
import * as API from './modules/api.js';
import * as UI from './modules/ui.js';
import { VideoPlayer } from './modules/player.j=
s';
import { DataManager } from './modules/manager.=
js';

class DramApp {
    constructor() {
        this.manager =3D new DataManager();
        this.player =3D new VideoPlayer();
        this.socket =3D null;
        this.init();
    }

    async init() {
        this.setupSocket();
        this.setupGlobalEvents();
        await this.reloadData();
        await this.loadNetwork();
    }

    async reloadDa=
ta() {
        const actions =3D this.getActions();
       =20
        // 1. Continue Watching
        const watching =3D await API.fetchContinueWatching();
        UI.renderGrid(watching, 'continue-grid'=
, this.manager.selectedIds, actions);
        UI.toggleSection('continue-section', watching.length > 0);

        // 2. All Videos
        const videos =3D await API.fetchAllVideos();
        this.manager.setData(videos);
        this.renderMainGrid();
    }

    renderMainGrid=
() {
        UI.renderGrid(this.manager.visibleVideos, 'video-grid', this.manager.selectedIds, this.getActions());
        UI.updateSelectionVisuals(this.manager.selectedIds);
    }

    getActions() {
        return {
            onPlay: (v) =3D> this.player.open(v),
            onToggleSelect: (id) =3D> this.handleSelection(id),
            onPlayRemote: (v) =3D> this.playOnRemote(v)
        };
    }

    // --- REMOTE LOGIC ---
    async playOnRemote(video) {
        // =C6=AFu ti=C3=AAn Socket cho nhanh
        if(this.socket && this.=
socket.connected) this.socket.emit('mpv_play', video.id);
        else await API.playOnMpv(video.=
id);
        this.openRemote();
    }

    async addToQue=
ue() {
        const ids =3D Array.from(this.manager.selectedIds);
        if(ids.length =3D=3D=3D 0) return alert("=
Ch=C6=B0a ch=E1=BB=8Dn b=C3=A0i n=C3=A0o!");
        for (const id of ids) await API=
.addToQueue(id);
       =20
        alert(`=C4=90=C3=A3 th=C3=AAm ${ids.l=
ength} b=C3=A0i v=C3=A0o h=C3=A0ng =C4=91=E1=BB=A3i PC!`);
        this.manager.clearSelection();
        this.renderMainGrid();
        this.openRemote();
    }

    openRemote() {
        document.getElementById('remote-overlay=
').classList.remove('hidden');
        API.getRemoteStatus().then(s =
=3D> this.updateRemoteUI(s));
    }
   =20
    remoteControl(action) { API.remoteControl(action); }

    updateRemoteUI(status) {
        const title =3D document.getElementById('remote-title');
        const list =3D document.getElementById(=
'queue-list');
        const count =3D document.getElementById('queue-count');
        const state =3D document.getElementById('remote-status');

        if (!status.isPlaying) {
            state.textContent =3D "OFFLINE";
            title.textContent =3D "MPV =C4=91=
=C3=A3 t=E1=BA=AFt";
        } else {
            state.textContent =3D "=C4=90ANG PH=
=C3=81T";
            title.textContent =3D status.current ? status.current.filename =
: "=C4=90ang ch=E1=BB=9D...";
        }

        count.textContent =3D status.queue.length;
        list.innerHTML =3D status.queue.map((v, i) =3D> `
            <div style=3D"padding:10px; bord=
er-bottom:1px solid #333; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; colo=
r:${i =3D=3D=3D status.currentIndex ? '#6366f=
1' : '#ccc'}">
                <span style=3D"white-space:n=
owrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; max-width:90%">${i + 1}. =
${v.filename}</span>
                ${i =3D=3D=3D status.currentI=
ndex ? '<i class=3D"fa-solid fa-volume-high"></i>' : ''}
            </div>
        `).join('');
    }

    // --- SYSTEM ---
    handleSelection(id) {
        this.manager.toggleSelection(id);
        UI.updateSelectionVisuals(this.manager.selectedIds);
    }

    async loadNetw=
ork() {
        const net =3D await API.fetchNetworkInfo();
        if (window.QRious) new QRious({=
 element: document.getElementById('qr-code'), value: net.url });
        const el =3D document.getElementById('n=
etwork-url');
        if(el) el.textContent =3D net.u=
rl;
    }

    setupSocket() {
        try {
            this.socket =3D io();
            this.socket.on('scan_start',=
 () =3D> UI.updateScanStatus('=C4=90ang qu=
=C3=A9t...', true));
            this.socket.on('scan_progress', (d) =3D> UI.updateScanStatus(d.file, tr=
ue));
            this.socket.on('video_found'=
, () =3D> this.reloadData()); // Live update
            this.socket.on('scan_complete', () =3D> { UI.updateScanStatus('S=E1=BA=
=B5n s=C3=A0ng', false); this.re=
loadData(); });
            this.socket.on('mpv_status',=
 (s) =3D> this.updateRemoteUI(s)); // Realtime Remote
        } catch(e) {}
    }

    setupGlobalEve=
nts() {
        const scanAction =3D async () =3D> { if(confirm('Qu=C3=A9t l=E1=BA=A1i to=
=C3=A0n b=E1=BB=99?')) await API.startScan(); };
        const btnPC =3D document.getElementById('btn-scan'); if(btnPC) btnPC.on=
click=3DscanAction;
        const btnMob =3D document.getElementById('btn-scan-mobile'); if(btnMob)=
 btnMob.onclick=3DscanAction;

        document.getElementById('search-input'<=
/span>).oninput =3D (e) =3D> { this.manager.filter(e.target.value); this=
.renderMainGrid(); };
        document.getElementById('sort-select').onchange =3D (e) =3D> { this.manager.sortData(e.target.value); th=
is.renderMainGrid(); };
        window.app =3D this;
    }

    // Proxies for HTML
    selectAll() { this.manager.selectAllVisible(); UI.updateSelectionVisuals(th=
is.manager.selectedIds); }
    clearSelect() { this.manager.clearSelection(); UI.updateSelectionVisuals(th=
is.manager.selectedIds); }
    exportM3U(mode) { this.manager.exportM3U(mode); }
    closePlayer() { if(this.player.close())=
 this.reloadData(); }
    togglePlay() { this.player.togglePlay(); }
    rotateVideo() { this.player.rotate(); }
    zoomVideo() { this.player.zoom(); }
    changeSpeed() { this.player.changeSpeed(); }
}

new DramApp();
EOF
    <= !---->

    4.6. c= lient/public/css/style.css (Style ho=C3=A0n ch=E1=BB=89nh)

    Responsive chu=E1=BA=A9n, s=E1=BB=ADa l=E1=BB=97i s= =E1=BB=8Dc ngang grid, Bottom Nav d=C3=ADnh =C4=91=C3=A1y.

    Ba= sh
    cat << 'EOF' >=
 client/public/css/style.css
:root {
    --bg-dark: #0f172a; --bg-sidebar: #1e293b;=
 --bg-card: #1e293b; --bg-hover: #334155;
    --primary: #6366f1; --success: #10b981; --=
text-main: #f8fafc; --text-muted: #94a3b8;
    --sidebar-width: 260px; --header-height: 64px;
}
* { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; -webkit-tap-highlight-co=
lor: transparent; }
body { font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-u=
i, sans-serif; background: var(--bg-dark); color: var(--text-main); height:=
 100vh; overflow: hidden; }

.app-container { display: flex; height: 100%; width: 100%; }

/* SIDEBAR */
.sidebar { width: var(--sidebar-width); background: var(--bg-sidebar); disp=
lay: flex; flex-direction: column; border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255=
,0.05); flex-shrink: 0; z-index: 50; }
.brand { height: var(--header-height); display: flex; align-items: center; =
padding: 0 20px; font-weight: bold; color: var(--primary); gap: 10px; borde=
r-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); }
.nav-menu { flex: 1; padding: 15px; overflow-y: auto; }
.nav-group h3 { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-muted); text-transfor=
m: uppercase; margin: 20px 0 10px 10px; }
.nav-item { width: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; pad=
ding: 12px; margin-bottom: 4px; background: none; border: none; border-radi=
us: 8px; color: var(--text-main); text-align: left; cursor: pointer; transi=
tion: background 0.2s; }
.nav-item:hover { background: var(--bg-hover); }
.nav-item.active { background: rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.15); color: var(--prima=
ry); font-weight: 500; }

/* MAIN */
.main-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; position: r=
elative; width: 100%; min-width: 0; }
.toolbar-wrapper { background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.95); padding: 10px 16px; =
display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; z-index: 20; backdrop-fil=
ter: blur(10px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); }
.search-row { display: flex; gap: 10px; height: 40px; }
.search-box { flex: 1; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding: 0 15px; =
border-radius: 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
.search-box input { background: none; border: none; color: white; width: 10=
0%; outline: none; }
.filter-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; overflow-x: auto; padding-bottom: 2p=
x; }
.filter-row::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
#sort-select, .btn-tool { background: var(--bg=
-hover); color: white; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding: 6p=
x 12px; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.85rem; white-spac=
e: nowrap; }

/* CONTENT */
.content-scroll-area { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 20px; padding-bo=
ttom: 80px; }
.section { margin-bottom: 30px; }
.section.hidden { display: none; }
.section-title { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--text-muted); text-transfor=
m: uppercase; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.horizontal-scroll { display: flex; gap: 15px; overflow-x: auto; padding-bo=
ttom: 15px; }
.horizontal-scroll .video-card { min-width: 200px; max-width: 200px; height=
: 190px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.video-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minma=
x(160px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; }

/* CARD */
.video-card { background: var(--bg-card); border-radius: 10px; overflow: hi=
dden; position: relative; cursor: pointer; border: 2px solid transparent; t=
ransition: transform 0.2s; display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 2=
30px; }
.video-card.selected { border-color: var(--success); background: rgba(16, 1=
85, 129, 0.1); }
.video-card.selected .select-overlay { opacity: 1; background: var(--succes=
s); border-color: var(--success); }
.thumb-wrapper { width: 100%; height: 140px; background: #000; position: relative; }
.thumb-wrapper img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
.select-overlay { position: absolute; top: 8px; right: 8px; width: 22px; he=
ight: 22px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.8); ba=
ckground: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s; }
.video-card:hover .select-overlay { opacity: 1; }
.card-info { padding: 10px; flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column;=
 justify-content: space-between; }
.card-title { font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; overflow: hidden; displ=
ay: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; margi=
n-bottom: 4px; }
.card-meta { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-muted); display: flex; j=
ustify-content: space-between; }

/* MPV BUTTON */
.btn-mpv-remote { position: absolute; bottom: 8px; right: 8px; width: 32px;=
 height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6); border: 1px=
 solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3); color: white; cursor: pointer; display: flex;=
 align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: transform 0.2s; =
}
.btn-mpv-remote:hover { background: var(--primary); transform: scale(1.1); =
}

/* BOTTOM NAV (MOBILE) */
.bottom-nav { position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 60p=
x; background: rgba(30,41,59,0.98); border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,=
0.1); display: none; justify-content: space-around; align-items: center; z-=
index: 100; padding-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom); backdrop-filter: b=
lur(10px); }
.nav-btn { background: none; border: none; color: var(--text-muted); displa=
y: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: cent=
er; gap: 4px; flex: 1; height: 100%; font-size: 0.75rem; cursor: pointer; }
.nav-btn.active { color: var(--primary); }
.nav-btn i { font-size: 1.2rem; }

/* EXPORT BAR */
.export-bar { position: absolute; bottom: 20px; left: 50%; transform: trans=
lateX(-50%); width: 90%; max-width: 500px; background: rgba(30,41,59,0.95);=
 backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); bord=
er-radius: 50px; padding: 10px 20px; display: flex; justify-content: space-=
between; align-items: center; box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); z-in=
dex: 90; transition: bottom 0.3s; }
.export-bar.hidden { bottom: -100px; }
.btn-export { border: none; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-we=
ight: 600; cursor: pointer; }
.btn-export.primary { background: var(--primary); color: white; }
.btn-export.secondary { background: var(--bg-hover); color: white; }

/* OVERLAYS */
.player-overlay { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 10=
0%; background: black; z-index: 9999; display: flex; flex-direction: column=
; }
.player-overlay.hidden { display: none !important; }
.player-header { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: =
60px; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0,0,0,0.8), transparent);=
 display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; paddin=
g: 0 20px; z-index: 10; }
.btn-close { background: none; border: none; color: white; font-size: 1.5re=
m; cursor: pointer; padding: 10px; }
.video-wrapper { flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-conte=
nt: center; background: #000; width: 100%; }
video { max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%; }
.player-controls { height: 80px; background: rgba(20,20,20,0.95); display: =
flex; justify-content: space-around; align-items: center; border-top: 1px s=
olid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom); }
.player-controls button { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border: none; =
color: white; width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%; font-size: 1.2=
rem; cursor: pointer; }

/* REMOTE UI */
.btn-remote-big { width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 50%; background=
: #334155; border: none; color: white; font-si=
ze: 1.5rem; cursor: pointer; }

@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .sidebar { display: none !important; }
    .bottom-nav { display: flex; }
    .video-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 10px; }
    .export-bar { bottom: 75px !important; }
    .export-bar.hidden { bottom: -100px !important; }
}
EOF
    <= !---->

    4.7. c= lient/public/index.html (Final HTML)

    Ch=E1=BB=A9a =C4=91=E1=BA=A7y =C4=91=E1=BB=A7 c=C3=A1c th=C3=A0nh ph=E1=BA= =A7n: Sidebar, Bottom Nav, Remote Overlay, Player Overlay.

    Ba= sh
    cat << 'EOF' >=
 client/public/index.html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang=3D"vi">
<head>
    <meta charset=3D"UTF-8">
    <meta name=3D"viewport" content=
=3D"width=3Ddevice-width, initial-scale=3D1.0, =
maximum-scale=3D1.0, user-scalable=3Dno">
    <link rel=3D"manifest" href=3D"manifest.json">
    <title>DRAM PLAYSV V5</title>
    <link rel=3D"stylesheet" href=3D<=
span class=3D"hljs-string">"css/style.css">
