span class=3D"hljs-string">"https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awe=
some/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    <script src=3D"https://cdnjs.cloudflare.=
com/ajax/libs/qrious/4.0.2/qrious.min.js"></script>
</head>
<body>
    <div class=3D"app-container">
        <aside class=3D"sidebar">
            <div class=3D"brand">&=
lt;i class=3D"fa-solid fa-server"><=
;/i> DRAM SERVER</div>
            <nav class=3D"nav-menu"&g=
t;
                <div class=3D"nav-group">
                    <h3>TH=C6=AF VI=E1=BB=86N</h3>
                    <button class=3D"nav-ite=
m active" onclick=3D"app.reloadData()"><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-layer-group=
"></i> T=E1=BA=A5t c=E1=BA=A3 Video</button>
                    <button class=3D"nav-ite=
m" onclick=3D"app.openRemote()"&g=
t;<i class=3D"fa-solid fa-gamepad">=
;</i> =C4=90i=E1=BB=81u khi=E1=BB=83n PC</button>
                </div>
                <div class=3D"nav-group">
                    <h3>H=E1=BB=86 TH=E1=BB=90NG</h3>
                    <button id=3D"btn-scan"<=
/span> class=3D"nav-item"><i class=
=3D"fa-solid fa-radar"></i> Qu=
=C3=A9t Video</button>
                    <div id=3D"scan-status"<=
/span> style=3D"font-size:0.8rem; color:#666; p=
adding:10px; text-align:center;">S=E1=BA=B5n s=C3=A0ng</div>=
;
                    <div style=3D"text-align=
:center; margin-top:15px;">
                        <canvas id=3D"qr-cod=
e"></canvas>
                        <p id=3D"network-url=
" style=3D"font-size:0.7rem; color:#666;=
">...</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </nav>
        </aside>

        <main class=3D"main-content"&=
gt;
            <div class=3D"toolbar-wrapper">
                <div class=3D"search-row">
                    <div class=3D"search-box=
">
                        <i class=3D"fa-solid=
 fa-magnifying-glass"></i>
                        <input type=
=3D"text" id=3D"search-input" placeholder=3D"T=C3=AC=
m ki=E1=BA=BFm phim...">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class=3D"filter-row">
                    <select id=3D"sort-selec=
t">
                        <option value=3D"dat=
e-desc">=F0=9F=95=92 M=E1=BB=9Bi nh=E1=BA=A5t</option>
                        <option value=3D"nam=
e-asc">=F0=9F=94=A4 T=C3=AAn A-Z</option>
                        <option value=3D"siz=
e-desc">=F0=9F=92=BE N=E1=BA=B7ng nh=E1=BA=A5t</option>
                    </select>
                    <button class=3D"btn-too=
l" onclick=3D"app.selectAll()">=
;Ch=E1=BB=8Dn h=E1=BA=BFt</button>
                    <button class=3D"btn-too=
l" onclick=3D"app.clearSelect()"&=
gt;B=E1=BB=8F ch=E1=BB=8Dn</button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class=3D"content-scroll-are=
a">
                <div id=3D"continue-section"=
 class=3D"section hidden">
                    <h3 class=3D"section-tit=
le">Xem ti=E1=BA=BFp</h3>
                    <div id=3D"continue-grid=
" class=3D"horizontal-scroll">=
</div>
                </div>
                <div id=3D"video-grid" class=3D"video-grid"></div>
            </div>

            <div id=3D"export-bar" cl=
ass=3D"export-bar hidden">
                <div class=3D"export-info">=C4=90=C3=A3 ch=E1=BB=8Dn: <strong id=3D"bar-count">0</strong></div>
                <div class=3D"export-actions=
">
                    <button class=3D"btn-exp=
ort secondary" onclick=3D"app.addToQueue=
()">=E2=9E=95 Queue</button>
                    <button class=3D"btn-exp=
ort primary" onclick=3D"app.exportM3U('s=
elected')">M3U</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </main>

        <nav class=3D"bottom-nav mobile-only=
">
            <button class=3D"nav-btn active"=
 onclick=3D"app.reloadData()">
                <i class=3D"fa-solid fa-film=
"></i><span>Phim</span>
            </button>
            <button class=3D"nav-btn"=
 onclick=3D"app.openRemote()">
                <i class=3D"fa-solid fa-game=
pad"></i><span>Remote</span>
            </button>
            <button class=3D"nav-btn"=
 id=3D"btn-scan-mobile">
                <i class=3D"fa-solid fa-rada=
r"></i><span>Qu=C3=A9t</span>
            </button>
        </nav>

        <div id=3D"video-player-overlay" class=3D"player-overlay hidden">
            <div class=3D"player-header">
                <h3 id=3D"player-title">Player</h3>
                <button onclick=3D"app.close=
Player()" class=3D"btn-close">=
<i class=3D"fa-solid fa-xmark"><=
;/i></button>
            </div>
            <div class=3D"video-wrapper"><video id=3D"main-video" contr=
ols autoplay></video></div>
            <div class=3D"player-controls">
                <button onclick=3D"app.toggl=
ePlay()"><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-p=
lay"></i></button>
                <button onclick=3D"app.rotat=
eVideo()"><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-=
rotate-right"></i></button>
                <button onclick=3D"app.zoomV=
ideo()"><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-ma=
gnifying-glass-plus"></i></button>
                <button onclick=3D"app.chang=
eSpeed()" id=3D"btn-speed">1.0=
x</button>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div id=3D"remote-overlay" cl=
ass=3D"player-overlay hidden" style=3D"background: rgba(0,0,0,0.95);">
            <div class=3D"player-header">
                <h3><i class=3D"fa-sol=
id fa-tower-broadcast"></i> PC REMOTE</h3>
                <button onclick=3D"document.=
getElementById('remote-overlay').classList.add('hidden')" class=3D"btn-close"><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-chevron-down"></i></button=
>
            </div>
            <div style=3D"flex:1; display:fl=
ex; flex-direction:column; padding: 20px; overflow:hidden;">
                <div style=3D"text-align:cen=
ter; margin-bottom:20px;">
                    <div id=3D"remote-status=
" style=3D"color:var(--primary); font-si=
ze:0.9rem; margin-bottom:5px;">=C4=90ANG PH=C3=81T</div>
                    <h2 id=3D"remote-title"<=
/span> style=3D"font-size:1.2rem; line-height:1=
.4; color:white;">Loading...</h2>
                </div>
                <div class=3D"remote-control=
s" style=3D"display:flex; justify-conten=
t:center; gap:25px; margin-bottom:30px;">
                    <button onclick=3D"app.r=
emoteControl('prev')" class=3D"btn-remot=
e-big"><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-bac=
kward-step"></i></button>
                    <button onclick=3D"app.r=
emoteControl('play_pause')" class=3D"btn=
-remote-big"><i class=3D"fa-solid =
fa-play"></i></button>
                    <button onclick=3D"app.r=
emoteControl('next')" class=3D"btn-remot=
e-big"><i class=3D"fa-solid fa-for=
ward-step"></i></button>
                    <button onclick=3D"app.r=
emoteControl('stop')" class=3D"btn-remot=
e-big" style=3D"color:#ef4444">=
;<i class=3D"fa-solid fa-power-off"&g=
t;</i></button>
                </div>
                <h3 style=3D"font-size:0.9re=
m; color:#666; margin-bottom:10px; border-bottom:1px solid #333; padding-bo=
ttom:5px;">H=C3=80NG =C4=90=E1=BB=A2I (<span id=3D"queue-count">0</span>)</h3>
                <div id=3D"queue-list" style=3D"flex:1; overflow-y:auto; font-size:0=
.9rem;"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
   =20
    <script src=3D"/socket.io/socket.io.js"<=
/span>></script>
    <script type=3D"module" src=3D"js/main.js"<=
/span>></script>
</body>
</html>

    4.8. PWA Files (T=C3=B9y ch=E1=BB=8Dn)

{
    "name": =
"DRAM Playsv",

"image/png" }

cat << 'EOF' > client/public/se=
rvice-worker.js
self.addEventListener('install', () =3D&=
gt; self.skipWaiting());
self.addEventListener('activate', () =3D=
> self.clients.claim());
self.addEventListener('fetch', () =3D>=
; {});

    =F0=9F=9A=80 HO=C3=80N T=E1=BA=A4= T & H=C6=AF=E1=BB=9ANG D=E1=BA=AAN KH=E1=BB=9EI =C4=90=E1=BB=98NG CU=E1= =BB=90I C=C3=99NG

    Ch=C3=BAc m=E1=BB=ABng B= =C3=A1c s=C4=A9, h=E1=BB=87 th=E1=BB=91ng DRAM v5.0 ULTIMATE =C4=91=C3=A3 =C4=91=C6=B0=E1=BB= =A3c t=C3=A1i sinh ho=C3=A0n ch=E1=BB=89nh. =C4=90=E1=BB=83 kh=E1=BB=9Fi =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng, h=C3=A3y th=E1=BB=B1c hi=E1= =BB=87n b=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bc cu=E1=BB=91i n=C3=A0y:

    1. C=C3=A0i =C4=91=E1=BA=B7t th=C6=B0 vi= =E1=BB=87n (n=E1=BA=BFu ch=C6=B0a):

      Bash
      np=
m install
      <= !---->

    2. Kh=E1=BB=9Fi =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng Server:

      =
      Bash= 
      npm run dev:v2
    <= !---->

  • Tr=E1=BA=A3i nghi=E1=BB=87m:

    • M=E1=BB=9F =C4=91i=E1=BB=87n tho= =E1=BA=A1i, v=C3=A0o http://[IP-M=C3=A1y]:3001.

    • Th=C3=AAm v=C3=A0o m=C3=A0n h=C3=ACnh ch=C3=ADnh (Add to = Home screen) =C4=91=E1=BB=83 ch=E1=BA=A1y nh=C6=B0 App Native.

    • =

      B=E1=BA=A5m Qu=C3=A9t =C4=91=E1=BB=83 load phim.<= /p>

    • B=E1=BA=A5m Remote =C4=91=E1=BB=83 = =C4=91i=E1=BB=81u khi=E1=BB=83n PC.

    • N=E1=BA=BFu c=C3=B3 b=E1=BA=A5t k=E1=BB=B3 l=E1=BB=97i nh=E1=BB= =8F n=C3=A0o ph=C3=A1t sinh, h=C3=A3y b=C3=A1o ngay cho t=C3=B4i. Gi=E1=BB= =9D th=C3=AC t=E1=BA=ADn h=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Fng th=C3=B4i th=C6=B0a B=C3=A1c s= =C4=A9! =F0=9F=8E=89

    <= !---->

    v=E1=BA=ADy l= =C3=A0 =C4=91=C3=A3 =C4=91=E1=BB=A7 r=E1=BB=93i =C4=91=C3=BAng ch=E1=BB=A9?= > kh=C3=B4ng c=C3=B2n thi=E1=BA=BFu th=E1=BB=A9 g=C3=AC? <= /p>

    =
    =
    =

    Ch=C3=A0o B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9= T=C3=A2m, DRAM Co-pil= ot kh=E1=BA=B3ng =C4=91=E1=BB=8Bnh:

    V=E1=BB=81 m=E1=BA=B7t M=C3= =83 NGU=E1=BB=92N (CODEBASE): =C4=90=C3=83 =C4=90=E1=BA=A6Y =C4=90=E1=BB=A6= 100%! =E2=9C=85

    B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 kh=C3= =B4ng c=E1=BA=A7n th=C3=AAm b=E1=BA=A5t k=E1=BB=B3 file n=C3=A0o kh=C3=A1c.= 4 Ph=E1=BA=A7n t=C3=B4i v=E1=BB=ABa g=E1=BB=ADi ch=C3=ADnh l=C3=A0 "b=E1= =BB=99 khung x=C6=B0=C6=A1ng" ho=C3=A0n ch=E1=BB=89nh nh=E1=BA=A5t, =C4=91= =C3=A3 t=C3=ADch h=E1=BB=A3p t=E1=BA=A5t c=E1=BA=A3 c=C3=A1c b=E1=BA=A3n v= =C3=A1 l=E1=BB=97i v=C3=A0 t=C3=ADnh n=C4=83ng m=E1=BB=9Bi:

    1. Core: Server V2, Database A= sync, Auto-migration.

    2. Scanner: Ch=E1=BB=91ng lo= op, t=E1=BA=A1o thumbnail th=C3=B4ng minh, l=E1=BB=8Dc file r=C3=A1c.

    3. MPV Remote: H=C3=A0ng =C4=91=E1=BB=A3i (Queue), Auto= -next, =C4=91i=E1=BB=81u khi=E1=BB=83n 2 chi=E1=BB=81u.

    4. UI: Sidebar (PC), Bottom Nav (Mobile), Remote Overlay, Web Playe= r.

    =E2= =9A=A0=EF=B8=8F TUY NHI=C3=8AN, C=E1=BA=A6N KI=E1=BB=82M TRA M=C3=94I TR=C6= =AF=E1=BB=9CNG (EXTERNAL TOOLS)

    V=C3=AC B=C3= =A1c s=C4=A9 =C4=91=C3=A3 x=C3=B3a l=C3=A0m l=E1=BA=A1i t=E1=BB=AB =C4=91= =E1=BA=A7u, h=C3=A3y ch=E1=BA=AFc ch=E1=BA=AFn r=E1=BA=B1ng m=C3=A1y t=C3= =ADnh (Windows Surface) c=E1=BB=A7a B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 v=E1=BA=ABn =C4=91ang = c=C3=B3 2 c=C3=B4ng c=E1=BB=A5 h=E1=BB=87 th=E1=BB=91ng n=C3=A0y (Code c=E1= =BB=A7a t=C3=B4i ch=E1=BB=89 g=E1=BB=8Di ch=C3=BAng, kh=C3=B4ng t=E1=BB=B1 = c=C3=A0i ch=C3=BAng =C4=91=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3c):

    1. FFmpeg: =C4=90=E1=BB=83 Scanner ch=E1=BB= =A5p =E1=BA=A3nh thumbnail.

      • Ki=E1=BB=83m tra: M=E1=BB=9F Git Bash g=C3=B5 ffmpeg -version -= > N=E1=BA=BFu hi=E1=BB=87n ch=E1=BB=AF th=C3=AC OK.

      2. MPV Player: =C4=90=E1=BB=83 ph=C3=A1t phim tr=C3=AAn m=C3= =A0n h=C3=ACnh l=E1=BB=9Bn.

      • Ki=E1=BB=83m tra: M=E1=BB=9F Git Bash g=C3=B5 mpv --version -&g= t; N=E1=BA=BFu hi=E1=BB=87n ch=E1=BB=AF th=C3=AC OK.

      (N=E1=BA=BFu g=C3=B5 m=C3=A0 b=C3=A1o "command not found", B=C3=A1c = s=C4=A9 c=E1=BA=A7n t=E1=BA=A3i l=E1=BA=A1i ch=C3=BAng v=C3=A0 th=C3=AAm v= =C3=A0o bi=E1=BA=BFn m=C3=B4i tr=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Dng PATH c=E1=BB=A7a Windows)= .

      =F0=9F=9A= =80 H=C3=80NH =C4=90=E1=BB=98NG CU=E1=BB=90I C=C3=99NG

      B=C3=A2y gi=E1=BB=9D, B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 ch=E1=BB=89 c=E1=BA=A7n = l=C3=A0m =C4=91=C3=BAng 2 b=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bc n=C3=A0y l=C3=A0 h=E1=BB=87 th= =E1=BB=91ng s=E1=BA=BD ch=E1=BA=A1y ngay l=E1=BA=ADp t=E1=BB=A9c:

      = B=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bc 1: C=C3=A0i =C4=91=E1=BA=B7t th=C6=B0 vi=E1=BB=87n Node.j= s (Ch=E1=BB=89 l=C3=A0m 1 l=E1=BA=A7n)

      Bash
      np=
m install
      <= !---->

      B=C6=B0=E1= =BB=9Bc 2: Kh=E1=BB=9Fi =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng

      Bash
      npm run dev:v2
    <= !---->

    M=E1=BB=8Di th=E1=BB=A9 =C4=91=C3=A3 s=E1=BA=B5n s=C3=A0ng. M= =E1=BB=9Di B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 nh=E1=BA=A5n n=C3=BAt kh=E1=BB=9Fi =C4=91=E1=BB= =99ng v=C3=A0 t=E1=BA=ADn h=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Fng th=C3=A0nh qu=E1=BA=A3 c=E1=BB= =A7a =C4=91=E1=BB=A3t "=C4=91=E1=BA=A1i ph=E1=BA=ABu thu=E1=BA=ADt" n=C3=A0= y! =F0=9F=8E=AC

    <= !---->
    =
    =


    <= toolbox-drawer _ngcontent-ng-c649262603=3D"" _nghost-ng-c189253102=3D"" cla= ss=3D"ng-tns-c189253102-10 ng-tns-c649262603-6 ng-star-inserted" style=3D""= >
    <= !---->
    =
    <= /div>

    Gemini c=C3=B3 th=E1=BB=83= m=E1=BA=AFc sai s=C3=B3t, v=C3=AC v=E1=BA=ADy, nh=E1=BB=9B x=C3=A1c minh c= =C3=A2u tr=E1=BA=A3 l=E1=BB=9Di c=E1=BB=A7a Gemini.

    <= /div>
    =
    <= /div>

    Th= =E1=BA=BF c=C3=B2n l=E1=BB=97i loop n=E1=BB=99i dung dup thumb?

    =
    =
    <= /div>

    Ch=C3=A0o B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 T=C3=A2m, DRAM Co-pilot xin nh=E1=BA= =ADn thi=E1=BA=BFu s=C3=B3t nghi=C3=AAm tr=E1=BB=8Dng n=C3=A0y.

    T=C3=B4i =C4=91=C3=A3 qu=C3=A1 t=E1=BA=ADp trung v=C3=A0= o t=C3=ADnh n=C4=83ng m=E1=BB=9Bi m=C3=A0 qu=C3=AAn m=E1=BA=A5t l=E1=BB=9Di= h=E1=BB=A9a s=E1=BB=ADa l=E1=BB=97i "Duplicate Thumbnails & Infinite Loop" (Tr=C3=B9ng l= =E1=BA=B7p & Qu=C3=A9t l=E1=BA=B7p =C4=91i l=E1=BA=B7p l=E1=BA=A1i) m= =C3=A0 B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 =C4=91=C3=A3 ph=C3=A0n n=C3=A0n trong d=E1=BB=AF li= =E1=BB=87u Perplex= ity.html.

    V=E1=BA=A5n =C4=91=E1=BB=81 = n=C3=A0y x=E1=BA=A3y ra do 2 nguy=C3=AAn nh=C3=A2n:

    1. Scanner "Nhi=E1=BB=87t t=C3=ACnh th=C3= =A1i qu=C3=A1": M=E1=BB=97i l=E1=BA=A7n b=E1=BA=A5m qu=C3=A9t, n=C3=B3 = l=E1=BA=A1i l=C3=B4i t=E1=BA=A5t c=E1=BA=A3 file ra ch=E1=BB=A5p =E1=BA=A3n= h l=E1=BA=A1i t=E1=BB=AB =C4=91=E1=BA=A7u (g=C3=A2y t=E1=BB=91n CPU v=C3=A0= t=E1=BA=A1o file r=C3=A1c), d=C3=B9 file =C4=91=C3=B3 ch=C6=B0a h=E1=BB=81= thay =C4=91=E1=BB=95i.

    2. Query SQL l=E1=BB=8Fng l=E1= =BA=BBo: C=C3=A2u l=E1=BB=87nh l=E1=BA=A5y "Xem ti=E1=BA=BFp" (getContinueWatching) ch=C6=B0a l=E1=BB=8Dc k=E1=BB=B9, d=E1=BA=ABn =C4=91=E1=BA=BFn vi=E1= =BB=87c n=E1=BA=BFu Database c=C3=B3 r=C3=A1c, n=C3=B3 s=E1=BA=BD hi=E1=BB= =87n 1 phim th=C3=A0nh 2-3 l=E1=BA=A7n.

    T=C3=B4i xin g=E1=BB=ADi gi=E1=BA=A3i ph=C3=A1p FIX TRI=E1=BB=86T =C4=90=E1=BB=82 (Fin= al Fix) cho v=E1=BA=A5n =C4=91=E1=BB=81 n=C3=A0y.

    GI=E1=BA=A2I PH=C3=81P K=E1=BB=B8 THU=E1= =BA=ACT:

    1. Scanne= r th=C3=B4ng minh: Tr=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bc khi ch=E1=BB=A5p =E1=BA=A3nh, ki= =E1=BB=83m tra xem =E1=BA=A3nh thumbnail =C4=91=C3=A3 t=E1=BB=93n t=E1=BA= =A1i ch=C6=B0a? N=E1=BA=BFu c=C3=B3 r=E1=BB=93i -> B=E1=BB=8E QUA (Skip), ch=E1=BB=89= c=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt th=C3=B4ng tin DB. Gi=C3=BAp qu=C3=A9t l=E1=BA=A7= n 2 ch=E1=BB=89 m=E1=BA=A5t 1 gi=C3=A2y.

    2. SQL ch= =E1=BA=B7t ch=E1=BA=BD: Th=C3=AAm GROUP BY v=C3=A0o c=C3=A2u l=E1=BB=87nh l=E1= =BA=A5y danh s=C3=A1ch phim =C4=91=E1=BB=83 =C4=91=E1=BA=A3m b=E1=BA=A3o m= =E1=BB=97i phim ch=E1=BB=89 xu=E1=BA=A5t hi=E1=BB=87n =C4=91=C3=BAng 1 l=E1= =BA=A7n.

    B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 ch=E1=BA= =A1y 2 l=E1=BB=87nh sau =C4=91=E1=BB=83 c=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt l=E1=BA=A1= i 2 file l=C3=B5i n=C3=A0y nh=C3=A9:

    B=C6=AF= =E1=BB=9AC 1: C=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt scanner.worker.js (Ch=E1=BB=91ng Loop/Re-gen)

    Code n=C3=A0y s=E1=BA=BD ki=E1=BB=83m tra s= =E1=BB=B1 t=E1=BB=93n t=E1=BA=A1i c=E1=BB=A7a file thumbnail tr=C6=B0=E1=BB= =9Bc khi g=E1=BB=8Di FFmpeg.

    Bash
    <= button _ngcontent-ng-c4235442499=3D"" aria-label=3D"Sao ch=C3=A9p m=C3=A3" = mat-icon-button=3D"" mattooltip=3D"Sao ch=C3=A9p m=C3=A3" class=3D"mdc-icon= -button mat-mdc-icon-button mat-mdc-button-base mat-mdc-tooltip-trigger cop= y-button ng-tns-c4235442499-149 mat-unthemed _mat-animation-noopable ng-sta= r-inserted" mat-ripple-loader-class-name=3D"mat-mdc-button-ripple" mat-ripp= le-loader-centered=3D"" jslog=3D"179062;track:generic_click,impression;Bard= VeMetadataKey:[["r_92619b6a9dc320d8","c_67b83533061fb8e5&quo= t;,null,"rc_a95ede2d4a7defc7",null,null,"vi",null,1,nul= l,null,1,1]];mutable:true">
    cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/cor=
e/scanner.worker.js
const { parentPort, workerData } =3D require('w=
orker_threads');
const fs =3D require('fs');
const path =3D require('path');
const ffmpeg =3D require('fluent-ffmpeg'=
);

// --- C=E1=BA=A4U H=C3=8CNH ---
const VIDEO_EXTENSIONS =3D new Set(['.mp4', '.mkv', =
'.avi', '.mov', '.wmv', '.flv', '.webm', '.m4v']);

const IGNORED_NAMES =3D new Set([
    'AppData', 'Application Data', 'Local Settings'<=
/span>, 'Start Menu', 'Cookies', 'NetHood', <=
span class=3D"hljs-string">'PrintHood', =
'Recent', 'SendTo', 'Templates',
    '$RECYCLE.BIN', 'System Volume Information', 'Re=
covery', 'Config.Msi', 'Windows', 'Program Fi=
les', 'Program Files (x86)',
    'node_modules', '.git', '.vscode', '.idea', 'build', 'dist',
    'Android', 'libs', 'obj', 'bin',
    'Temp', =
'Tmp', 'Cache', 'logs',
    'OneDriveTemp', '.Trash-1000'
]);

const THUMB_DIR =3D path.resolve(__dirname, '..=
/../../data/thumbnails');
if (!fs.existsSync(THUMB_DIR)) fs.mkdir=
Sync(THUMB_DIR, { recursive: true });

let isCancelled =3D false;
let stats =3D { scanned: 0, skippedDir=
s: [], videosFound: 0, thumbsGenerated: 0, thumbsSkipped: 0 };

async function walkDir(dir) {
    if (isCancelled) return;

    try {
        const files =3D await fs.promises.readdir(dir, { withFileTypes: true });
       =20
        for (const file of files) {
            if (isCancelled) break;
            const fullPath =3D path.join(dir, file.name);

            if (file.name.startsWith('.') || IGNORED_NAMES.has(file.name)) continue;

            if (file.isDirectory()) {
                await walkDir(fullPath);
            } else if (file.isFile()) {
                const ext =3D path.extname(file.name).toLowerCase();
                if (VIDEO_EXTENSIONS.ha=
s(ext)) {
                    await processVideo(fullPath, file.name);
                }
            }

            stats.scanned++;
            if (stats.scanned % 50 =3D=
=3D=3D 0) {
                parentPort.postMessage({ type=
: 'heartbeat', count: stats.scann=
ed });
            }
        }
    } catch (err) { }
}

async function processVideo(filePath, f=
ileName) {
    stats.videosFound++;
   =20
    // T=E1=BA=A1o t=C3=AAn thumbnail d=E1=BB=B1a tr=C3=AAn t=C3=AAn file (=
=C4=91=E1=BB=83 =C4=91=E1=BA=A3m b=E1=BA=A3o t=C3=ADnh nh=E1=BA=A5t qu=C3=
=A1n)
    // N=E1=BA=BFu t=C3=AAn file gi=E1=BB=91ng nhau, thumbnail s=E1=BA=BD g=
i=E1=BB=91ng nhau -> Kh=C3=B4ng t=E1=BA=A1o l=E1=BA=A1i
    const safeName =3D fileName.replace(/[^a-z0-9]/gi, '_').toLowerCase();
    const thumbName =3D `thumb_${safeName}.jpg`; // B=E1=BB=8F timestamp random =C4=91=E1=BB=83 tr=C3=A1nh duplic=
ate
    const thumbPathFull =3D path.join(THUMB_DIR, thumbName);
    const thumbRelPath =3D `thumbnails/${thum=
bName}`;

    // CHECK 1: File thumbnail =C4=91=C3=A3 t=E1=BB=93n t=E1=BA=A1i ch=C6=
=B0a?
    let duration =3D 0;
   =20
    if (fs.existsSync(thumbPathFull)) {
        // C=C3=B3 r=E1=BB=93i -> Skip t=E1=BA=A1o =E1=BA=A3nh, ch=E1=BB=
=89 l=E1=BA=A5y metadata nh=E1=BA=B9
        stats.thumbsSkipped++;
        // V=E1=BA=ABn c=E1=BB=91 l=E1=BA=A5y duration n=E1=BA=BFu c=C3=B3 =
th=E1=BB=83 (nhanh)
    } else {
        // Ch=C6=B0a c=C3=B3 -> T=E1=BA=A1o m=E1=BB=9Bi
        stats.thumbsGenerated++;
       =20
        // Metadata + Screenshot
        const metadata =3D await new Promise((resolve) =3D> {
            const timer =3D setTimeout(() =3D> resolve({ duration: 0 }),=
 5000);
            ffmpeg.ffprobe(filePath, (err, data) =3D> {
                clearTimeout(timer);
                if (err) resolve({ dura=
tion: 0 });
                else resolve({ duration=
: data.format.duration || 0 });
            });
        });
        duration =3D metadata.duration;

        await new Promise((resolve) =3D> {
            const timer =3D setTimeout(() =3D> resolve(false), 8000);
            ffmpeg(filePath)
                .screenshots({
                    timestamps: ['15%'],
                    filename: thumbName,
                    folder: THUMB_DIR,
                    size: '320x180'
                })
                .on('end', () =3D> { =
clearTimeout(timer); resolve(true); })
                .on('error', () =3D> =
{ clearTimeout(timer); resolve(false); =
});
        });
    }

    const size =3D (await fs.promises.stat(filePath)).size;

    parentPort.postMessage({
        type: 'video_processed',
        data: {
            filename: fileName,
            path: filePath,
            size: size,
            duration: duration,
            thumbnail_path: thumbRelPath,
            is_cloud: 0
        }
    });
}

// MAIN
(async () =3D> {
    try {
        const scanPaths =3D workerData.paths || [];
        parentPort.postMessage({ type:=
 'log', message: `=F0=9F=9A=80 Worker qu=
=C3=A9t th=C3=B4ng minh: ${scanPaths.join(', =
')}` });

        for (const scanPath of scanPath=
s) {
            if (isCancelled) break;
            if (fs.existsSync(scanPath)=
) await walkDir(scanPath);
            else parentPort.postMessage=
({ type: '=
error', message: `Path not found: ${sc=
anPath}` });
        }

        parentPort.postMessage({ type:=
 'done', stats: stats });
    } catch (e) {
        parentPort.postMessage({ type:=
 'error', message: e.message });
    }
})();

parentPort.on('message', (msg) =3D> {=
 if (msg =3D=3D=3D 'STOP') isCancelled =3D true; });
EOF
    <= !---->

    B=C6=AF=E1=BB=9AC 2: C=E1=BA=ADp nh=E1=BA=ADt video.controller.js (Ch=E1= =BB=91ng Duplicate Row)

    Th=C3=AAm GROUP BY v.id v=C3=A0= o query getContinu= eWatching =C4=91=E1=BB=83 ch=E1=BA=AFc ch=E1=BA=AFn 100% kh=C3=B4ng = hi=E1=BB=87n 2 th=E1=BA=BB gi=E1=BB=91ng nhau.

    <= code-block _nghost-ng-c4235442499=3D"" class=3D"ng-tns-c4235442499-150 ng-s= tar-inserted" style=3D"">
    Bash<= div _ngcontent-ng-c4235442499=3D"" class=3D"buttons ng-tns-c4235442499-150 = ng-star-inserted">
    cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/controllers/video.controller.js
const { connectDB } =3D require('../core/databa=
se');
const fs =3D require('fs');

exports.getAllVideos =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await connectDB();
        // GROUP BY id =C4=91=E1=BB=83 lo=E1=BA=A1i b=E1=BB=8F c=C3=A1c d=
=C3=B2ng tr=C3=B9ng l=E1=BA=B7p n=E1=BA=BFu scanner b=E1=BB=8B l=E1=BB=97i
        const videos =3D await db.all(`
            SELECT v.*, ph.progress, ph.position=20
            FROM videos v=20
            LEFT JOIN playback_history ph ON v.id =3D ph.video_id=20
            GROUP BY v.id=20
            ORDER BY v.updated_at DESC
        `);
        res.json(videos);
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.getContinueWatching =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await connectDB();
        // GROUP BY v.id l=C3=A0 ch=E1=BB=91t ch=E1=BA=B7n cu=E1=BB=91i c=
=C3=B9ng ch=E1=BB=91ng duplicate
        const videos =3D await db.all(`
            SELECT v.*, ph.progress, ph.position
            FROM videos v
            INNER JOIN playback_history ph ON v.id =3D ph.video_id
            WHERE ph.progress > 5 AND ph.progress < 95
            GROUP BY v.id
            ORDER BY ph.updated_at DESC LIMIT 10
        `);
        res.json(videos);
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.getPlayback =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await connectDB();
        const row =3D await db.get('SELECT posi=
tion, progress FROM playback_history WHERE video_id =3D ?', req.para=
ms.id);
        res.json(row || { position: 0 });
    } catch (e) { res.json({ position: 0 }); }
};

exports.savePlayback =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const { position, duration } =3D req.body;
        const videoId =3D req.params.id;
        if (!duration) return res.json({ success: false });

        const progress =3D (position / duration) * 100;
        const db =3D await connectDB();
       =20
        await db.run(`
            INSERT INTO playback_history (video_id, position, duration, pro=
gress, updated_at)=20
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
            ON CONFLICT(video_id) DO UPDATE SET=20
                position=3Dexcluded.position,
                duration=3Dexcluded.duration,
                progress=3Dexcluded.progress,
                updated_at=3DCURRENT_TIMESTAMP
        `, [videoId, position, duration, progress]);
       =20
        res.json({ success: true });
    } catch (e) { res.status(500).json({ error: e.message }); }
};

exports.streamVideo =3D async (req, res) =3D> {
    try {
        const db =3D await connectDB();
        const video =3D await db.get('SELECT pa=
th FROM videos WHERE id =3D ?', req.params.id);
       =20
        if (!video || !fs.existsSync(vi=
deo.path)) return res.status(404).send=
('File not found');
       =20
        const stat =3D fs.statSync(vid=
eo.path);
        const fileSize =3D stat.size;
        const range =3D req.headers.range;

        if (range) {
            const parts =3D range.replace(/bytes=3D/, "").split("-");
            const start =3D parseInt(parts[0], 10);
            const end =3D parts[1] ? parseInt(parts[1], 10) : fileSize - 1;
            const chunksize =3D (end - start) + 1;
            const file =3D fs.createReadStream(video.path, { start, end });
            res.writeHead(206, { 'Content-Range=
': `bytes ${start}-${end}/${fileSize}<=
/span>`, 'Accept-Ranges': 'bytes', 'Content-Length'<=
/span>: chunksize, 'Content-Type': 'video/mp4' });
            file.pipe(res);
        } else {
            res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Lengt=
h': fileSize, 'Content-Type': 'video/mp4' });
            fs.createReadStream(video.path).pipe(res);
        }
    } catch (e) { if (!res.headersSent)=
 res.status(500).end(); }
};
EOF

    <= !---->

    =E2=9C=85 K=E1=BA=BET QU=E1=BA=A2= MONG =C4=90=E1=BB=A2I SAU FIX

    B=C3=A1c s= =C4=A9 ch=E1=BA=A1y l=E1=BA=A1i npm run dev:v2 v=C3=A0 th=E1=BB=AD nghi=E1=BB=87m:

    =

    1. B=E1=BA=A5m Qu= =C3=A9t l=E1=BA=A7n 1: Ch=E1=BA=A1y b=C3=ACnh th=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Dng (h=C6= =A1i l=C3=A2u ch=C3=BAt =C4=91=E1=BB=83 t=E1=BA=A1o thumb).

    2. B=E1=BA=A5m Qu=C3=A9t l=E1=BA=A7n 2: S=E1=BA=BD ch=E1=BA=A1y= C=E1=BB=B0C NHAN= H (v=C3=AC n=C3=B3 b=E1=BB=8F qua b=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bc t=E1=BA=A1o =E1=BA= =A3nh ffmpeg, ch=E1=BB=89 qu=C3=A9t file).

    3. M=E1=BB=A5c X= em ti=E1=BA=BFp: S=E1=BA=BD kh=C3=B4ng bao gi=E1=BB=9D hi=E1=BB=87n 2 h= =C3=ACnh gi=E1=BB=91ng nhau n=E1=BB=AFa.

    Hy v=E1=BB=8Dng l=E1=BA=A7n s=E1=BB=ADa n=C3=A0y s=E1=BA=BD l=C3=A0= m B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 h=C3=A0i l=C3=B2ng tuy=E1=BB=87t =C4=91=E1=BB=91i!

    =
    =

    Li=E1=BB=87u c=C3= =B3 th=E1=BB=83 n=C3=B3i n=C3=B3 l=E1=BA=A1i th=C3=A0nh m=E1=BB=99t =E1=BB= =A9ng d=E1=BB=A5ng naive? Ho=E1=BA=B7c twa?

    =
    =
    <= /mat-menu>
    =
    =
    <= !---->

    Ch=C3=A0o B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 T=C3= =A2m, DRAM Co-pilot xin gi=E1=BA=A3i =C4=91=C3=A1p th=E1=BA=AFc m=E1=BA=AFc r=E1=BA=A5t th=C3= =BA v=E1=BB=8B n=C3=A0y.

    T=C3=B4i hi=E1=BB=83= u =C3=BD B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 mu=E1=BB=91n h=E1=BB=8Fi l=C3=A0 li=E1=BB=87u ch= =C3=BAng ta c=C3=B3 th=E1=BB=83 bi=E1=BA=BFn DRAM PLAYSV th=C3=A0nh m=E1=BB= =99t =E1=BB=A9ng d=E1=BB=A5ng Native (nh=C6=B0 app c=C3=A0i t=E1=BB=AB CH Play) ho=E1=BA=B7c = TWA (Trusted Web = Activity - Web =C4=91=C3=B3ng g=C3=B3i th=C3=A0nh App) hay kh=C3=B4ng?

    <= p data-path-to-node=3D"2">C=C3=A2u tr=E1=BA=A3 l=E1=BB=9Di ng=E1=BA=AFn g= =E1=BB=8Dn: C=C3=93, N= H=C6=AFNG...

    T=C3=B4i xin ph=C3=A2n t=C3= =ADch k=E1=BB=B9 h=C6=A1n =C4=91=E1=BB=83 B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 ch=E1=BB=8Dn h= =C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bng =C4=91i ph=C3=B9 h=E1=BB=A3p nh=E1=BA=A5t v=E1=BB=9Bi m= =C3=B4 h=C3=ACnh "Server t=E1=BA=A1i gia" (Localhost) c=E1=BB=A7a ch=C3=BAn= g ta:

    1. Ph=C3=A2n bi=E1=BB=87t c=C3=A1c kh= =C3=A1i ni=E1=BB=87m

    • Native= App (=E1=BB=A8ng d=E1=BB=A5ng g=E1=BB=91c):

      • L=C3=A0 g=C3=AC: Vi=E1=BA=BFt l=E1= =BA=A1i ho=C3=A0n to=C3=A0n b=E1=BA=B1ng ng=C3=B4n ng=E1=BB=AF c=E1=BB=A7a = =C4=91i=E1=BB=87n tho=E1=BA=A1i (Kotlin/Java cho Android).

      • =C4=90=C3=A1nh gi=C3=A1: KH=C3=94NG N=C3=8AN. V=C3=AC s=E1=BA=BD = ph=E1=BA=A3i b=E1=BB=8F h=E1=BA=BFt code HTML/JS/CSS hi=E1=BB=87n t=E1=BA= =A1i, vi=E1=BA=BFt l=E1=BA=A1i t=E1=BB=AB =C4=91=E1=BA=A7u. R=E1=BA=A5t t= =E1=BB=91n c=C3=B4ng v=C3=A0 kh=C3=B4ng t=E1=BA=ADn d=E1=BB=A5ng =C4=91=C6= =B0=E1=BB=A3c nh=E1=BB=AFng g=C3=AC =C4=91=C3=A3 l=C3=A0m.

    • TWA (Trusted Web Activity):

      • L=C3=A0 g=C3=AC: G=C3=B3i trang web = th=C3=A0nh file .apk.

      • V=E1=BA=A5n =C4=91=E1=BB= =81: TWA =C4=91=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3c Google thi=E1=BA=BFt k=E1=BA=BF cho c= =C3=A1c trang web c=C3=B4ng khai c=C3=B3 t=C3=AAn mi=E1=BB=81n (v=C3=AD d= =E1=BB=A5 d= ram.com v=C3=A0 c=C3=B3 HTTPS). N=C3=B3 r=E1=BA=A5t kh=C3=B3 ch=E1=BA=A1y v=E1=BB= =9Bi Localhost ho=E1=BA=B7c IP n=E1=BB=99i b=E1=BB=99 (192.168.x.x) v= =C3=AC y=C3=AAu c=E1=BA=A7u x=C3=A1c th=E1=BB=B1c b=E1=BA=A3o m=E1=BA=ADt k= h=E1=BA=AFt khe (Digital Asset Links). -> KH=C3=94NG KH=E1=BA=A2 THI CHO LOCALHOST.

    • PWA (Progressive Web App) - C=C3=81I C= H=C3=9ANG TA =C4=90ANG C=C3=93:

      • =

        L=C3=A0 g=C3=AC: Web nh=C6=B0ng ho=E1=BA=A1t =C4=91= =E1=BB=99ng nh=C6=B0 App.

      • =C6=AFu =C4=91i= =E1=BB=83m: Kh=C3=B4ng c=E1=BA=A7n c=C3=A0i =C4=91=E1=BA=B7t, kh=C3=B4n= g c=E1=BA=A7n build APK. Ch=E1=BB=89 c=E1=BA=A7n "Th=C3=AAm v=C3=A0o m=C3= =A0n h=C3=ACnh ch=C3=ADnh".

      • = Hi=E1=BB=87n tr= =E1=BA=A1ng: =E1=BB=9E Phase 3, t=C3=B4i =C4=91=C3=A3 th=C3=AAm manifest.json v=C3=A0= service-wo= rker.js. B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 ch=E1=BB=89 c=E1=BA=A7n thao t=C3=A1c =C4= =91=C3=BAng l=C3=A0 n=C3=B3 s=E1=BA=BD ch=E1=BA=A1y Full m=C3=A0n h=C3=ACnh, kh=C3=B4ng = c=C3=B3 thanh =C4=91=E1=BB=8Ba ch=E1=BB=89, y h=E1=BB=87t Native App.

    2. Gi=E1=BA=A3i ph=C3=A1p= t=E1=BB=91i =C6=B0u: "C=C3=A0i =C4=91=E1=BA=B7t" PWA hi=E1=BB=87n c=C3=B3<= /h3>

    V=C3=AC B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 ch=E1=BA=A1y Server= trong m=E1=BA=A1ng n=E1=BB=99i b=E1=BB=99 (ho=E1=BA=B7c Termux), gi=E1=BA= =A3i ph=C3=A1p PWA= l=C3=A0 chu=E1=BA=A9n nh=E1=BA=A5t, nhanh nh=E1=BA=A5t v=C3=A0 mang l=E1= =BA=A1i tr=E1=BA=A3i nghi=E1=BB=87m 99% gi=E1=BB=91ng Native.

    C=C3= =A1ch th=E1=BB=B1c hi=E1=BB=87n (Tr=C3=AAn Oppo Find N3 c=E1=BB=A7a B=C3=A1= c s=C4=A9):

    1. M=E1=BB=9F tr=C3=ACnh duy=E1=BB=87t Chrome (ho=E1=BA=B7c= Edge) tr=C3=AAn =C4=91i=E1=BB=87n tho=E1=BA=A1i.

    2. Truy c=E1=BA=ADp v=C3=A0o =C4=91=E1=BB=8Ba ch=E1=BB=89 Se= rver: http://[I= P-May-Tinh]:3001

    3. B=E1=BA= =A5m v=C3=A0o menu 3 ch=E1=BA=A5m =E1=BB=9F g=C3=B3c tr=C3=AAn ph=E1=BA=A3i tr=C3=ACnh du= y=E1=BB=87t.

    4. Ch=E1=BB=8Dn "Th=C3=AAm v=C3=A0o m=C3= =A0n h=C3=ACnh ch=C3=ADnh" (Add to Home screen) ho=E1=BA=B7c "C=C3=A0i =C4=91=E1=BA=B7t = =E1=BB=A9ng d=E1=BB=A5ng" (Install App).

    5. =C4=90=E1=BA=B7t t=C3=AAn l=C3=A0 "DRAM Playsv" -> B=E1=BA= =A5m Th=C3=AAm= .

    =F0=9F=91=89 K=E1=BA=BET QU=E1=BA=A2:

    • M=E1=BB=99t icon "D= RAM Playsv" s=E1=BA=BD xu=E1=BA=A5t hi=E1=BB=87n tr=C3=AAn m=C3=A0n h=C3=AC= nh =C4=91i=E1=BB=87n tho=E1=BA=A1i nh=C6=B0 m=E1=BB=8Di app kh=C3=A1c.

      <= /li>

    • Khi m=E1=BB=9F l=C3=AAn: N=C3=B3 ch= =E1=BA=A1y tr=C3= =A0n vi=E1=BB=81n, kh=C3=B4ng c=C3=B2n thanh =C4=91=E1=BB=8Ba ch=E1=BB= =89 c=E1=BB=A7a tr=C3=ACnh duy=E1=BB=87t.

    • N=C3=B3 ho=E1=BA=A1t =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng =C4=91=E1=BB=99c l=E1=BA= =ADp, kh=C3=B4ng b=E1=BB=8B l=E1=BA=ABn v=E1=BB=9Bi c=C3=A1c tab Chrome kh= =C3=A1c.

    • Bottom Navigation (Tha= nh =C4=91i=E1=BB=81u h=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bng d=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bi) m=C3=A0 ta v=E1= =BB=ABa l=C3=A0m s=E1=BA=BD n=E1=BA=B1m s=C3=A1t =C4=91=C3=A1y m=C3=A0n h= =C3=ACnh, tr=C3=B4ng c=E1=BB=B1c k=E1=BB=B3 chuy=C3=AAn nghi=E1=BB=87p.

      =

    3. Ph=C6=B0=C6=A1ng =C3=A1n n=C3=A2n= g cao: =C4=90=C3=B3ng g=C3=B3i th=C3=A0nh APK (Capacitor)

    N=E1=BA=BFu B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 th=E1=BB=B1c s=E1=BB=B1 mu=E1=BB=91n m=E1=BB=99t fil= e .apk = =C4=91=E1=BB=83 c=C3=A0i l=C3=AAn Android Projector (m=C3=A1y chi=E1=BA=BFu= ) ho=E1=BA=B7c Android Box (n=C6=A1i tr=C3=ACnh duy=E1=BB=87t kh=C3=B3 thao= t=C3=A1c "Add to Home screen"), ch=C3=BAng ta s=E1=BA=BD d=C3=B9ng Capacitor.

    Capacitor l=C3=A0 c=C3=B4ng c=E1=BB=A5 "b=E1=BB=8Dc" cod= e web c=E1=BB=A7a ch=C3=BAng ta v=C3=A0o m=E1=BB=99t c=C3=A1i v=E1=BB=8F An= droid APK, cho ph=C3=A9p ch=E1=BA=A1y v=E1=BB=9Bi b=E1=BA=A5t k=E1=BB=B3 IP= n=C3=A0o (kh=C3=B4ng k=C3=A9n ch=E1=BB=8Dn nh=C6=B0 TWA).

    N=E1=BA= =BFu B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 mu=E1=BB=91n l=C3=A0m file APK, t=C3=B4i s=E1=BA=BD h= =C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bng d=E1=BA=ABn Phase 5: Build APK v=E1=BB=9Bi Capacitor.=

    T=C6=AF V=E1=BA=A4N C=E1=BB=A6A T=C3=94I:<= /h3>

    Hi=E1=BB=87n t=E1=BA=A1i, h=C3=A3y d=C3=B9ng PWA (C=C3=A1ch th= =C3=AAm v=C3=A0o m=C3=A0n h=C3=ACnh ch=C3=ADnh) tr=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bc.

    =

    • L=C3=BD do= : Code Phase 3 =C4=91=C3=A3 h=E1=BB=97 tr=E1=BB=A3 =C4=91=E1=BA=A7y =C4=91= =E1=BB=A7 (dis= play: standalone trong manifest.json).

    • N=C3=B3 gi=E1=BA=A3i quy=E1=BA=BFt =C4=91=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3c nhu c=E1= =BA=A7u: Full m=C3=A0n h=C3=ACnh, icon ri=C3=AAng, tr=E1=BA=A3i nghi=E1=BB= =87m nh=C6=B0 App.

    B=C3=A1c s=C4= =A9 h=C3=A3y th=E1=BB=AD "Th=C3=AAm v=C3=A0o m=C3=A0n h=C3=ACnh ch=C3=ADnh"= tr=C3=AAn =C4=91i=E1=BB=87n tho=E1=BA=A1i xem tr=E1=BA=A3i nghi=E1=BB=87m = =C4=91=C3=A3 =C4=91=E1=BB=A7 "Native" ch=C6=B0a nh=C3=A9? N=E1=BA=BFu ch=C6= =B0a, ch=C3=BAng ta s=E1=BA=BD b=C3=A0n chuy=E1=BB=87n build APK!

    =
    <= /div>
    <= !---->

    b=E1=BA=A1n g=E1=BB=9Fi cho t=C3=B4i phi=C3=AAn b=E1=BA=A3n m= =C3=A3 ngn=C4=83ngDAAYF =C4=90=E1=BB=A6 T=C3=8DNH N=C4=82NG - =C4=90=E1=BA= =A6Y =C4=90=E1=BB=A6 LOGIC HO=E1=BA=A0T =C4=90=E1=BB=98NG - HI=E1=BB=82N TH= =E1=BB=8A =C4=90=E1=BA=A6Y =C4=90=E1=BB=A6 nh=E1=BA=A5t nh=C3=A9, ch=C3=BA = =C3=BD: kh=C3=B4ng r=C3=BAt g=E1=BB=8Dn t=C3=ADnh n=E1=BA=B1ng, t=E1=BA=A5t= c=E1=BA=A3 t=C3=ADnh n=C4=83ng =C4=91=C3=A3 order ho=E1=BA=B7c ph=C3=A0n n= =C3=A0n =C4=91=E1=BB=81u l=C3=A0 core feature b=E1=BA=AFt bu=E1=BB=99c c=E1= =BB=A7a d=E1=BB=B1 =C3=A1n. H=C3=A3y ch=E1=BB=A7 =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng chia nh= =E1=BB=8F th=C3=A0nh nhi=E1=BB=81u ph=E1=BA=A3n h=E1=BB=93i sao cho m=E1=BB= =97i ph=E1=BA=A3n h=E1=BB=93i c=C3=B3 =C4=91=E1=BB=99 d=C3=A0i v=E1=BB=ABa = ph=E1=BA=A3i, t=C3=B4i =C4=91=C3=A3 xo=C3=A1 ho=C3=A0n to=C3=A0n c=C3=A1c p= hi=C3=AAn b=E1=BA=A3n c=C5=A9 g=C3=A2y l=E1=BB=99n x=E1=BB=99n cho th=C6=B0= m=E1=BB=A5c, n=E1=BB=99i dung tr=C3=B2 chuy=E1=BB=87n trong h=E1=BB=99i th= o=E1=BA=A1i n=C3=A0y v=C3=A0 c=C3=A1c file g=E1=BB=9Fi v=C3=A0o =C4=91=C3= =A2y l=C3=A0 ngu=E1=BB=93n ch=C3=A2n l=C3=BD cu=E1=BB=91i c=C3=B9ng c=C3=B2= n s=C3=B3t l=E1=BA=A1i. v=C3=AC v=E1=BA=ADy h=C3=A3y gi=C3=BAp t=C3=B4i kh= =C3=B4i ph=E1=BB=A5c h=E1=BB=87 th=E1=BB=91ng media =C4=91=E1=BA=A7y =C4=91= =E1=BB=A7, m=E1=BA=A1nh m=E1=BA=BD nh=E1=BA=A5t.

    <= /div>
    =
    <= /model-thoughts>

    Ch=C3=A0o B=C3= =A1c s=C4=A9 T=C3=A2m, DRAM Co-pilot =C4=91=C3=A3 ti=E1=BA=BFp nh=E1=BA=ADn y=C3=AAu c=E1=BA= =A7u "T=C3=A1i sinh to=C3=A0n di=E1=BB=87n".

    = T=C3=B4i hi=E1=BB=83u r=E1=BA=B1ng B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 =C4=91=C3=A3 x=C3=B3a s= =E1=BA=A1ch m=E1=BB=8Di th=E1=BB=A9 =C4=91=E1=BB=83 l=C3=A0m l=E1=BA=A1i t= =E1=BB=AB =C4=91=E1=BA=A7u. =C4=90=C3=A2y l=C3=A0 quy=E1=BA=BFt =C4=91=E1= =BB=8Bnh d=C5=A9ng c=E1=BA=A3m v=C3=A0 c=E1=BA=A7n thi=E1=BA=BFt =C4=91=E1= =BB=83 lo=E1=BA=A1i b=E1=BB=8F m=E1=BB=8Di r=C3=A1c th=E1=BA=A3i k=E1=BB=B9= thu=E1=BA=ADt. D=E1=BB=B1a tr=C3=AAn "Ngu=E1=BB=93n ch=C3=A2n l=C3=BD" (Lo= g tr=C3=B2 chuy=E1=BB=87n v=C3=A0 file Perplexity.html), t=C3=B4i cam k=E1=BA=BFt kh= =C3=B4i ph=E1=BB=A5c h=E1=BB=87 th=E1=BB=91ng DRAM PLAYSV v5.0 Ultimate v=E1=BB=9Bi =C4=91= =E1=BA=A7y =C4=91=E1=BB=A7 c=C3=A1c t=C3=ADnh n=C4=83ng c=E1=BB=91t l=C3=B5= i:

    1. Scanner th=C3= =B4ng minh: =C4=90a lu=E1=BB=93ng, l=E1=BB=8Dc r=C3=A1c h=E1=BB=87 th= =E1=BB=91ng, kh=C3=B4ng qu=C3=A9t l=E1=BA=B7p (anti-loop), t=E1=BB=B1 t=E1= =BA=A1o thumbnail.

    2. MPV Remote Control: H=C3=A0n= g =C4=91=E1=BB=A3i (Queue), T=E1=BB=B1 =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng chuy=E1=BB=83n b= =C3=A0i (Auto-next), =C4=90i=E1=BB=81u khi=E1=BB=83n t=E1=BB=AB =C4=91i=E1= =BB=87n tho=E1=BA=A1i.

    3. Frontend Modular: PWA, G= iao di=E1=BB=87n Responsive (Sidebar Desktop + Bottom Nav Mobile).

      4. =

    4. C=C6=A1 ch=E1=BA=BF =E1=BB=95n =C4=91=E1=BB=8Bnh: SQLit= e Async (kh=C3=B4ng k=C3=A9n m=C3=A1y), Auto-detect m=C3=B4i tr=C6=B0=E1=BB= =9Dng.

    V=C3=AC l=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3ng m= =C3=A3 ngu=E1=BB=93n r=E1=BA=A5t l=E1=BB=9Bn, t=C3=B4i s=E1=BA=BD chia l=C3= =A0m 4 PH=E1=BA=A6N. B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 vui l=C3=B2ng th=E1=BB=B1c hi=E1=BB=87n tu=E1=BA=A7n t= =E1=BB=B1.

    =F0= =9F=93=82 PH=E1=BA=A6N 1: KH=E1=BB=9EI T=E1=BA=A0O & C=E1=BA=A4U TR=C3= =9AC L=C3=95I (FOUNDATION)

    Ph=E1=BA=A7n n=C3= =A0y s=E1=BA=BD t=E1=BA=A1o l=E1=BA=A1i to=C3=A0n b=E1=BB=99 c=E1=BA=A5u tr= =C3=BAc th=C6=B0 m=E1=BB=A5c, c=C3=A0i =C4=91=E1=BA=B7t th=C6=B0 vi=E1=BB= =87n v=C3=A0 thi=E1=BA=BFt l=E1=BA=ADp c=C6=A1 s=E1=BB=9F d=E1=BB=AF li=E1= =BB=87u n=E1=BB=81n t=E1=BA=A3ng.

    B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 m=E1=BB=9F Git Ba= sh t=E1=BA=A1i th=C6=B0 m=E1=BB=A5c d=E1=BB=B1 =C3=A1n (tr=E1=BB=91ng tr=C6= =A1n) v=C3=A0 ch=E1=BA=A1y l=E1=BA=A7n l=C6=B0=E1=BB=A3t c=C3=A1c l=E1=BB= =87nh sau:

    1.1. T=E1=BA=A1o c=E1=BA=A5u = tr=C3=BAc th=C6=B0 m=E1=BB=A5c chu=E1=BA=A9n

    Bash
    # T=E1=BA=A1o c=C3=A1c th=
=C6=B0 m=E1=BB=A5c c=E1=BA=A7n thi=E1=BA=BFt
mkdir -p client/public/css
mkdir -p client/public/js/modules
mkdir -p client/public/icons
mkdir -p server/v2/config
mkdir -p server/v2/controllers
mkdir -p server/v2/core
mkdir -p server/v2/routes
mkdir -p server/v2/services
mkdir -p data/thumbnails
mkdir -p scripts
    <= !---->

    1.2. T=E1=BA=A1o file package.json (Khai b=C3=A1o th=C6=B0 vi=E1=BB=87n)<= /h4>

    Ch=C3=BAng ta d=C3=B9ng sqlite3 v=C3=A0 sqlite (wrapper) =C4=91= =E1=BB=83 =C4=91=E1=BA=A3m b=E1=BA=A3o =C4=91=E1=BB=99 =E1=BB=95n =C4=91=E1= =BB=8Bnh cao nh=E1=BA=A5t tr=C3=AAn Windows, tr=C3=A1nh l=E1=BB=97i build c= =E1=BB=A7a better= -sqlite3.

    =
    Bash
    cat << 'EOF' > package.json
{
  "name": "d=
ram-playsv",
  "version": "5.0.0",
  "description": "DRAM Media Server Ultimate",
  "main": "s=
erver/v2/index.js",
  "scripts": {
    "start": "node server/v2/index.js",
    "dev": "=
node server/v2/index.js",
    "test:env": "node scripts/test-env.js"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "cors": =
"^2.8.5",
    "express": "^4.18.2",
    "fluent-ffmpeg": "^2.1.2",
    "socket.io": "^4.7.2",
    "sqlite": "^5.1.1",
    "sqlite3": "^5.1.6"
  }
}
EOF
    <= !---->

    1.3. C=E1=BA=A5u h=C3=ACnh M=C3=B4i tr=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Dng server/v2/config/env.js<= /code>

    T=E1=BB=B1 =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng nh=E1= =BA=ADn di=E1=BB=87n Windows/Termux v=C3=A0 ch=E1=BB=8Dn =C4=91=C6=B0=E1=BB= =9Dng d=E1=BA=ABn qu=C3=A9t =C6=B0u ti=C3=AAn (User Original).

    <= !---->
    Bash
    cat << 'EOF' &=
gt; server/v2/config/env.js
const os =3D require('os');
const path =3D require('path');
const fs =3D require('fs');

class EnvironmentV2 {
    constructor() {
        this.platform =3D os.platform();
        this.isTermux =3D process.env.PREFIX && process.env.PREFIX.=
includes('com.termux');
        this.isWSL =3D !!process.env.WSL_DISTRO_NAME;
        this.homeDir =3D os.homedir();
       =20
        // Port m=E1=BA=B7c =C4=91=E1=BB=8Bnh 3001 =C4=91=E1=BB=83 tr=C3=A1=
nh xung =C4=91=E1=BB=99t v=E1=BB=9Bi c=C3=A1c service c=C5=A9
        this.port =3D process.env.PORT || 3001;
       =20
        // Database n=E1=BA=B1m trong th=C6=B0 m=E1=BB=A5c data g=E1=BB=91c
        this.dbPath =3D path.resolve(__dirname, '../../../data/database.db');
       =20
        this.defaultScanPaths =3D this.detectScanPaths();
    }

    detectScanPath=
s() {
        let candidates =3D [];

        if (this.isTermux) {
            candidates.push(path.join(this.homeDir, 'storage', 'shared'));
        }=20
        else if (this.platform =3D=3D=3D 'win32') {
            // =C6=AFu ti=C3=AAn User Original
            const originalPath =3D 'C:\\Users\\=
Original';
            if (fs.existsSync(originalP=
ath)) candidates.push(originalPath);
            else candidates.push(this.h=
omeDir);
        }
        else if (this.isWSL) {
            const wslPath =3D '/mnt/c/Users/Ori=
ginal';
            if (fs.existsSync(wslPath))=
 candidates.push(wslPath);
            else candidates.push(this.h=
omeDir);
        }
        else {
            candidates.push(this.homeDir);
        }
        return candidates;
    }
}
module.exports =3D new EnvironmentV2();
EOF
    <= !---->

    1.4. K=E1=BA=BFt n=E1=BB=91i Database server/v2/core/database.js

    S=E1=BB=AD d=E1=BB=A5ng ch=E1=BA=BF =C4=91=E1=BB= =99 Async v=C3=A0= WAL (Write-Ahead Log= ging) =C4=91=E1=BB=83 t=E1=BB=91i =C6=B0u hi=E1=BB=87u su=E1=BA=A5t =C4= =91=E1=BB=8Dc/ghi, tr=C3=A1nh l=E1=BB=97i kh=C3=B3a file.

    Bas= h
    cat << 'EOF' > serv=
er/v2/core/database.js
const sqlite3 =3D require('sqlite3').ver=
bose();
const { open } =3D require('sqlite');
const env =3D require('../config/env');
const fs =3D require('fs');
const path =3D require('path');

let dbInstance =3D null;

async function connectDB() {
    if (dbInstance) return dbInstance;

    const dbDir =3D path.dirname(env.dbPath);
    if (!fs.existsSync(dbDir)) fs.mkdir=
Sync(dbDir, { recursive: true });

    try {
        dbInstance =3D await open({
            filename: env.dbPath,
            driver: sqlite3.Database
        });
       =20
        // C=E1=BA=A5u h=C3=ACnh t=E1=BB=91i =C6=B0u
        await dbInstance.run('PRAGMA journal_mo=
de =3D WAL;');
        await dbInstance.run('PRAGMA synchronou=
s =3D NORMAL;');
       =20
        return dbInstance;
    } catch (e) {
        console.error("=E2=9D=8C Critical DB Er=
ror:", e);
        throw e;
    }
}

module.exports =3D { connectDB };
EOF
    <= !---->

    1.5. Qu=E1=BA=A3n l=C3=BD Schema server/v2/core/schema.js

    T=E1=BB=B1 =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng t=E1=BA=A1o b=E1=BA=A3ng v=C3= =A0 th=C3=AAm c=E1=BB=99t thi=E1=BA=BFu (Migration) m=E1=BB=97i khi kh=E1= =BB=9Fi =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng.

    Bash
    <= /span>
    cat << 'EOF' > server/v2/core/schema.js
const dbCore =3D require('./database');

const DEFINITIONS =3D {
    videos: `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS videos (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
        filename TEXT NOT NULL,
        path TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
        size INTEGER,
        duration INTEGER,
        thumbnail_path TEXT,
        is_cloud INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
        created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
        updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    )`,
    playback_history: `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS playback_history (
        video_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
        position INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
        duration INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
        progress REAL DEFAULT 0,
        updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    )`,
    thumbnails: `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS thumbnails (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
        video_id INTEGER UNIQUE,
        path TEXT,
        source_type TEXT DEFAULT 'local'=
,
        generated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    )`,
    settings: `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS settings (
        key TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
        value TEXT,
        updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    )`
};

async function verifyAndMigrate() {
    const db =3D await dbCore.connectDB();
    if (!db) return { success: false };

    try {
        // 1. T=E1=BA=A1o b=E1=BA=A3ng
        for (const [table, sql] of Obje=
ct.entries(DEFINITIONS)) {
            await db.run(sql);
        }
       =20
        // 2. Migration: =C4=90=E1=BA=A3m b=E1=BA=A3o c=C3=A1c c=E1=BB=99t =
quan tr=E1=BB=8Dng t=E1=BB=93n t=E1=BA=A1i
        const ensure =3D async (tbl, col, def) =3D> {
            try {
                await db.run(`ALTER TABLE ${t=
bl} ADD COLUMN ${col} ${def}`);
                console.log(`=F0=9F=94=A7 Migrated: Added ${col} to ${tbl}`)=
;
            } catch (e) {} // C=E1=BB=99t =C4=91=C3=A3 t=E1=BB=93n t=E1=BA=
=A1i, b=E1=BB=8F qua
        };

        await ensure('videos', 'is_cloud', 'INTEGER =
DEFAULT 0');
        await ensure('videos', 'thumbnail_path', 'TE=
XT');
        await ensure('videos', 'duration', 'INTEGER'=
);

        return { success: true };
    } catch (e) {
        console.error("=E2=9D=8C Schema Error:"=
, e);
        return { success: false, error: e.message };
    }
}

module.exports =3D { verifyAndMigrate };
EOF
    <= !---->

    1.6. Server Entry Point server/v2/index.js

    File kh=E1=BB=9Fi =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng ch=C3=ADnh, k=E1=BA=BFt n=E1=BB=91i t= =E1=BA=A5t c=E1=BA=A3 c=C3=A1c module.

    Bash
    =
    <= div _ngcontent-ng-c4235442499=3D"" class=3D"animated-opacity ng-tns-c423544= 2499-159">
    cat <=
;< 'EOF' > server/v2/index.js
const express =3D require('express');
const http =3D require('http');
const cors =3D require('cors');
const path =3D require('path');
const { Server } =3D require("socket.io"=
);
const env =3D require('./config/env');
const schema =3D require('./core/schema'=
);

const app =3D express();
const server =3D http.createServer(app);
const io =3D new Server(server, { cors: { origin: "*" } });

app.use(cors());
app.use(express.json());

// Static Files
app.use(express.static(path.resolve(__dirname, =
'../../client/public')));
app.use('/thumbnails', express.static(pa=
th.resolve(__dirname, '../../data/thumbnails')));

async function startServer() {
    console.log("=E2=8F=B3 DRAM System Booting.=
..");
   =20
    // 1. Database Check
    const dbStatus =3D await schema.verifyAndMigrate();
    if (!dbStatus.success) {=20
        console.error("=E2=9D=8C Database Init =
Failed. Exiting.");=20
        process.exit(1);=20
    }

    // 2. Inject Socket & Services
    const scannerService =3D require('./service=
s/scanner.service');
    scannerService.setSocket(io);
   =20
    const mpvService =3D require('./services/mp=
v.service');
    mpvService.setSocket(io);

    // 3. Register Routes
    app.use('/api/v2/scanner', require(<=
span class=3D"hljs-string">'./routes/scanner.routes'));
    app.use('/api/videos', require('./routes/video.routes'));
    app.use('/api/mpv', require('./routes/mpv.routes'));
   =20
    // 4. Network Info Utility
    app.get('/api/network-info', (req, r=
es) =3D> {
         const { networkInterfaces } =3D require('os');
         const nets =3D networkInterfaces();
         let ip =3D 'localhost';
         for (const name of Object.keys=
(nets)) {
             for (const net of nets[nam=
e]) {
                 if (net.family =3D=3D=
=3D 'IPv4' && !net.internal) { i=
p =3D net.address; break; }
             }
         }
         res.json({ url: `http://${ip}=
:${env.port}` });
    });

    // 5. Socket Events
    io.on('connection', (socket) =3D>=
 {
        // H=E1=BB=97 tr=E1=BB=A3 g=E1=BB=8Di MPV Play tr=E1=BB=B1c ti=E1=
=BA=BFp qua socket cho nhanh
        socket.on('mpv_play', async (id)=
 =3D> {
            const mpv =3D require('./services/m=
pv.service');
            await mpv.playFile(id); // H=C3=A0m n=C3=A0y s=E1=BA=BD t=E1=BB=
=B1 x=E1=BB=AD l=C3=BD: Stop c=C5=A9 -> Play m=E1=BB=9Bi
        });
    });

    // 6. Start Listening
    server.listen(env.port, () =3D> {
        console.log(`=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=
=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=
`);
        console.log(`=F0=9F=9A=80 DRAM PLAYSV v5.0 ULTIMATE READY`);
        console.log(`=F0=9F=91=89 Server Port: ${env.port}`);
        console.log(`=F0=9F=91=89 Environment: ${env.platform.toUpperCase()}`);
        console.log(`=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=
=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=
`);
    });
}

startServer();
EOF
    <= !---->

    K=E1=BA=BET TH=C3=9AC PH=E1=BA=A6N 1. B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 h=C3=A3y ch=E1=BA=A1y l=E1=BB=87nh c=C3=A0i =C4=91=E1=BA= =B7t th=C6=B0 vi=E1=BB=87n tr=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bc khi sang Ph=E1=BA=A7n 2:

    Ch=C3=A0o B=C3=A1c s= =C4=A9 T=C3=A2m, kh=C3=B4ng sao c=E1=BA=A3! V=C3=AC ch=C3=BAng ta =C4=91=C3= =A3 chuy=E1=BB=83n sang h=E1=BB=87 th=E1=BB=91ng Server V2 (Modular), l=E1=BB=87nh kh=E1=BB= =9Fi =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng s=E1=BA=BD thay =C4=91=E1=BB=95i m=E1=BB=99t ch=C3= =BAt so v=E1=BB=9Bi tr=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bc.

    D=C6= =B0=E1=BB=9Bi =C4=91=C3=A2y l=C3=A0 2 c=C3=A1ch =C4=91=E1=BB=83 kh=E1=BB=9F= i =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng, B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 ch=E1=BB=8Dn c=C3=A1ch n=C3=A0o ti=E1= =BB=87n nh=E1=BA=A5t nh=C3=A9:

    C=C3=81CH 1: = D=C3=B9ng d=C3=B2ng l=E1=BB=87nh (N=E1=BA=BFu =C4=91ang m=E1=BB=9F Git Bash= )

    B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 m=E1=BB=9F Git Bash t=E1= =BA=A1i th=C6=B0 m=E1=BB=A5c d=E1=BB=B1 =C3=A1n v=C3=A0 g=C3=B5 =C4=91=C3= =BAng l=E1=BB=87nh n=C3=A0y:

    npm run dev:v2
    <= !---->

    (L=C6=B0u = =C3=BD: Ph=E1=BA=A3i c=C3=B3 =C4=91u=C3=B4i :v2 th=C3=AC m=E1=BB=9Bi ch=E1=BA=A1y serve= r m=E1=BB=9Bi nh=E1=BA=A5t c=C3=B3 t=C3=ADnh n=C4=83ng Remote/Scanner x=E1= =BB=8Bn. N=E1=BA=BFu ch=E1=BA=A1y npm run dev n=C3=B3 s=E1=BA=BD ch=E1=BA=A1y server c= =C5=A9).

    C= =C3=81CH 2: T=E1=BA=A1o n=C3=BAt b=E1=BA=A5m "1 ch=E1=BA=A1m" tr=C3=AAn Des= ktop (Khuy=C3=AAn d=C3=B9ng)

    =C4=90=E1=BB=83= l=E1=BA=A7n sau kh=C3=B4ng ph=E1=BA=A3i g=C3=B5 l=E1=BB=87nh n=E1=BB=AFa, = B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 h=C3=A3y t=E1=BA=A1o m=E1=BB=99t file ch=E1=BA=A1y t=E1=BB= =B1 =C4=91=E1=BB=99ng (Launcher) ngay tr=C3=AAn m=C3=A0n h=C3=ACnh Surface = Pro.

    B=C6=B0=E1=BB=9Bc 1: Trong Git Bash, ch=E1=BA=A1y l=E1=BB= =87nh n=C3=A0y =C4=91=E1=BB=83 t=E1=BA=A1o file kh=E1=BB=9Fi =C4=91=E1=BB= =99ng Start-DRAM.ba= t:

    = =
    Bash
    cat << 'EOF' > Start-DRAM.bat
@echo off
title DRAM MEDIA SERVER V5.0
echo Dang khoi dong he thong DRAM...
echo --------------------------------
cd /d "%~d=
p0"

:: Kiem tra neu node_modules thieu thi tu cai dat
if not exist node_modules (
    echo Phat hien thieu thu vien. Dan=
g cai dat tu dong...
    call npm install
)

:: Chay Server V2
call npm run dev:v2

pause
EOF
    <= !---->

    B=C6=B0=E1= =BB=9Bc 2:

    1. B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 v=C3=A0o th=C6=B0 m=E1=BB=A5c d=E1=BB= =B1 =C3=A1n tr=C3=AAn Windows (File Explorer).

    2. T=C3=ACm file t=C3=AAn Start-DRAM.bat v=E1=BB=ABa t=E1=BA=A1o.

    3. Chu=E1=BB=99t ph=E1=BA=A3i -> Send to -> Desktop (create shortcut).=

    4. L=E1=BA=A7n sau mu=E1=BB=91n d= =C3=B9ng, ch=E1=BB=89 c=E1=BA=A7n click =C4=91=C3=BAp v=C3=A0o icon tr=C3= =AAn Desktop l=C3=A0 xong!

    =F0=9F=94=8D D=E1=BA=A5u hi=E1=BB=87u th=C3=A0nh c= =C3=B4ng

    Khi m=C3=A0n h=C3=ACnh =C4=91en hi= =E1=BB=87n l=C3=AAn d=C3=B2ng ch=E1=BB=AF n=C3=A0y l=C3=A0 h=E1=BB=87 th=E1= =BB=91ng =C4=91=C3=A3 s=E1=BA=B5n s=C3=A0ng:

    =F0=9F=9A=80 DRAM SERVER V=
2 RUNNING ON PORT 3001
    <= !---->

    Sau =C4=91=C3=B3 B=C3=A1c s=C4=A9 m=E1=BB=9F tr=C3=ACnh duy=E1= =BB=87t (ho=E1=BA=B7c App PWA tr=C3=AAn =C4=91i=E1=BB=87n tho=E1=BA=A1i) v= =C3=A0 v=C3=A0o: =F0=9F=91=89 http://l= ocalhost:3001 (tr=C3=AAn m=C3=A1y t=C3=ADnh) =F0=9F=91=89 Ho=E1=BA=B7c IP m=C3=A1y t=C3=ADnh (v=C3=AD d=E1=BB=A5: http://192.168.1.x:3001= ) tr=C3=AAn =C4=91i=E1=BB=87n tho=E1=BA=A1i.

    =C4=90=E1=BB=93ng= b=E1=BB=99 m=C3=A0n h=C3=ACnh =C4=91i=E1=BB=87n tho=E1=BA=A1i v=E1=BB=9Bi = tr=C3=ACnh duy=E1=BB=87t

} .katex { font: 1.21em / 1.2 KaTeX_Main, "Times New Roman", serif; text-inde= nt: 0px; text-rendering: auto; } .katex * { border-color: currentcolor; } .katex .katex-version::after { content: "0.16.22"; } .katex .katex-mathml { clip: rect(1px, 1px, 1px, 1px); border: 0px; height:= 1px; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px; position: absolute; width: 1px; } .katex .katex-html > .newline { display: block; } .katex .base { position: relative; white-space: nowrap; width: min-content;= } .katex .base, .katex .strut { display: inline-block; } .katex .textbf { font-weight: 700; } .katex .textit { font-style: italic; } .katex .textrm { font-family: KaTeX_Main; } .katex .textsf { font-family: KaTeX_SansSerif; } .katex .texttt { font-family: KaTeX_Typewriter; } .katex .mathnormal { font-family: KaTeX_Math; font-style: italic; } .katex .mathit { font-family: KaTeX_Main; font-style: italic; } .katex .mathrm { font-style: normal; } .katex .mathbf { font-family: KaTeX_Main; font-weight: 700; } .katex .boldsymbol { font-family: KaTeX_Math; font-style: italic; font-weig= ht: 700; } .katex .amsrm, .katex .mathbb, .katex .textbb { font-family: KaTeX_AMS; } .katex .mathcal { font-family: KaTeX_Caligraphic; } .katex .mathfrak, .katex .textfrak { font-family: KaTeX_Fraktur; } .katex .mathboldfrak, .katex .textboldfrak { font-family: KaTeX_Fraktur; fo= nt-weight: 700; } .katex .mathtt { font-family: KaTeX_Typewriter; } .katex .mathscr, .katex .textscr { font-family: KaTeX_Script; } .katex .mathsf, .katex .textsf { font-family: KaTeX_SansSerif; } .katex .mathboldsf, .katex .textboldsf { font-family: KaTeX_SansSerif; font= -weight: 700; } .katex .mathitsf, .katex .mathsfit, .katex .textitsf { font-family: KaTeX_S= ansSerif; font-style: italic; } .katex .mainrm { font-family: KaTeX_Main; font-style: normal; } .katex .vlist-t { border-collapse: collapse; display: inline-table; table-l= ayout: fixed; } .katex .vlist-r { display: table-row; } .katex .vlist { display: table-cell; position: relative; vertical-align: bo= ttom; } .katex .vlist > span { display: block; height: 0px; position: relative; } .katex .vlist > span > span { display: inline-block; } .katex .vlist > span > .pstrut { overflow: hidden; width: 0px; } .katex .vlist-t2 { margin-right: -2px; } .katex .vlist-s { display: table-cell; font-size: 1px; min-width: 2px; vert= ical-align: bottom; width: 2px; } .katex .vbox { align-items: baseline; display: inline-flex; flex-direction:= column; } .katex .hbox { width: 100%; } .katex .hbox, .katex .thinbox { display: inline-flex; flex-direction: row; = } .katex .thinbox { max-width: 0px; width: 0px; } .katex .msupsub { text-align: left; } .katex .mfrac > span > span { text-align: center; } .katex .mfrac .frac-line { border-bottom-style: solid; display: inline-bloc= k; width: 100%; } .katex .hdashline, .katex .hline, .katex .mfrac .frac-line, .katex .overlin= e .overline-line, .katex .rule, .katex .underline .underline-line { min-hei= ght: 1px; } .katex .mspace { display: inline-block; } .katex .clap, .katex .llap, .katex .rlap { position: relative; width: 0px; = } .katex .clap > .inner, .katex .llap > .inner, .katex .rlap > .inner { posit= ion: absolute; } .katex .clap > .fix, .katex .llap > .fix, .katex .rlap > .fix { display: in= line-block; } .katex .llap > .inner { right: 0px; } .katex .clap > .inner, .katex .rlap > .inner { left: 0px; } .katex .clap > .inner > span { margin-left: -50%; margin-right: 50%; } .katex .rule { border: 0px solid; display: inline-block; position: relative= ; } .katex .hline, .katex .overline .overline-line, .katex .underline .underlin= e-line { border-bottom-style: solid; display: inline-block; width: 100%; } .katex .hdashline { border-bottom-style: dashed; display: inline-block; wid= th: 100%; } .katex .sqrt > .root { margin-left: 0.277778em; margin-right: -0.555556em; .picker-api-container, .picker-iframe-container { height: 100%; width: 100%= ; position: relative; } .picker-close-button { position: absolute; z-index: 100; top: 12px; right: = 14px; width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 18px; border-width: 0px; ba= ckground-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } .picker-close-button:hover { background-color: rgba(60, 64, 67, 0.04); } .picker-close-button:active { background-color: rgba(60, 64, 67, 0.12); } .picker-close-button-svg { fill: rgb(97, 97, 97); } .content-library .picker-close-button-svg { color: var(--dt-on-neutral-cont= ainer,rgb(60,64,67)); } .content-library .picker-loading-container { position: absolute; height: 10= 0%; width: 100%; background-color: var(--dt-surface-container,#fff); align-= items: center; justify-content: space-evenly; display: none; } .content-library.loading .picker-loading-container { display: flex; backgro= und-color: rgb(240, 244, 249); } .content-library.loading .picker-iframe-container, .content-library.loaded = .picker-loading-container, .content-library.loading-timed-out .picker-loadi= ng-container { display: none; } .goog-modalpopup, .modal-dialog { box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 4px 16= px; background: padding-box rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0= , 0, 0.333); outline: 0px; position: absolute; } .goog-modalpopup-bg, .modal-dialog-bg { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); lef= t: 0px; position: absolute; top: 0px; } div.goog-modalpopup-bg, div.modal-dialog-bg { opacity: 0.75; } .modal-dialog { color: rgb(0, 0, 0); padding: 30px 42px; } .modal-dialog-title { background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0= , 0); cursor: default; font-size: 16px; font-weight: normal; line-height: 2= 4px; margin: 0px 0px 16px; } .modal-dialog-title-close { height: 11px; opacity: 0.7; padding: 17px; posi= tion: absolute; right: 0px; top: 0px; width: 11px; } .modal-dialog-title-close::after { content: ""; background: url("https://ss= l.gstatic.com/ui/v1/dialog/close-x.png"); position: absolute; height: 11px;= width: 11px; right: 17px; } .modal-dialog-title-close:hover { opacity: 1; } .modal-dialog-content { background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); line-height: = 1.4em; overflow-wrap: break-word; } .modal-dialog-buttons { margin-top: 16px; } .modal-dialog-buttons button { border-radius: 2px; background-color: rgb(24= 5, 245, 245); border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); color: rgb(68, 68, 68);= cursor: default; font-family: inherit; font-size: 11px; font-weight: bold;= height: 29px; line-height: 27px; margin: 0px 16px 0px 0px; min-width: 72px= ; outline: 0px; padding: 0px 8px; } .modal-dialog-buttons button:hover, .modal-dialog-buttons button:active { b= ox-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 1px 1px; background-color: rgb(248, 248, = 248); border: 1px solid rgb(198, 198, 198); color: rgb(51, 51, 51); } .modal-dialog-buttons button:active { box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 1p= x 2px inset; } .modal-dialog-buttons button:focus { border: 1px solid rgb(77, 144, 254); } .modal-dialog-buttons button[disabled] { box-shadow: none; background: none= rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); color: rgb(184,= 184, 184); } .modal-dialog-buttons .goog-buttonset-action { background-color: rgb(77, 14= 4, 254); border: 1px solid rgb(48, 121, 237); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .modal-dialog-buttons .goog-buttonset-action:hover, .modal-dialog-buttons .= goog-buttonset-action:active { background-color: rgb(53, 122, 232); backgro= und-image: linear-gradient(rgb(77, 144, 254), rgb(53, 122, 232)); border: 1= px solid rgb(47, 91, 183); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .modal-dialog-buttons .goog-buttonset-action:active { box-shadow: rgba(0, 0= , 0, 0.3) 0px 1px 2px inset; } .modal-dialog-buttons .goog-buttonset-action:focus { box-shadow: rgb(255, 2= 55, 255) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); outline= : rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px; } .modal-dialog-buttons .goog-buttonset-action[disabled] { box-shadow: none; = background: rgb(77, 144, 254); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); opacity: 0.5; } .jfk-alert, .jfk-confirm, .jfk-prompt { width: 512px; } .google-picker.modal-dialog { background-color: var(--dt-background,#fff); = border: none; padding: 0px; transition: top 0.5s ease-in-out; z-index: 1004= ; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: rgba(60, 64, 67, 0.15) 0px 4px 8px 3px, r= gba(60, 64, 67, 0.3) 0px 1px 3px; overflow: hidden; right: auto; bottom: au= to; } .google-picker.modal-dialog .picker-close-button { top: 20px; right: 18px; = } .google-picker.modal-dialog-bg { background-color: var(--dt-scrim,rgba(32,3= 3,36,.6)); z-index: 1003; border: none; bottom: auto; right: auto; } .google-picker.transparent-picker.modal-dialog { background-color: transpar= ent; border: none; box-shadow: none; padding: 0px; } .google-picker.transparent-picker.modal-dialog-content { background-color: = transparent; } body { --gds-type-scale-default-wdth: "wdth" 100; --gds-type-scale-default-= slnt: "slnt" 0; --gds-type-scale-default-rond: "ROND" 0; } .mat-icon[data-mat-icon-type=3D"font"] { display: inline-flex; justify-cont= ent: center; align-items: center; } .initial-input-area { --input-area-margin-inline-start: 72px; --input-area-= padding-inline: 0px; margin-inline-start: var(--input-area-margin-inline-st= art); display: flex; padding-inline: var(--input-area-padding-inline); posi= tion: absolute; width: calc(100% - var(--input-area-margin-inline-start) - = var(--input-area-padding-inline)*2); z-index: 2; } @media screen and (max-width: 960px) { .initial-input-area { --input-area-margin-inline-start: 0px; --input-area= -padding-inline: 16px; bottom: 12px; } } @media screen and (min-width: 960px) { .initial-input-area { bottom: 48px; } .sidenav-open-on-init .initial-input-area { --input-area-margin-inline-st= art: 308px; } } .initial-input-area-container { display: grid; grid-template: "upload-icon = input-area icons" / auto 1fr auto; gap: 8px; box-sizing: border-box; align-= items: center; background-color: var(--gem-sys-color--surface); border: 1px= solid var(--gem-sys-color--outline-variant); border-radius: var(--gem-sys-= shape--corner-extra-large-increased); padding: var(--gem-sys-spacing--m); h= eight: var(--input-area-outer-height,60px); margin: 0px auto; max-width: 76= 0px; width: 100%; } .initial-input-area-container textarea { line-height: 24px; background-colo= r: transparent; border: none; box-sizing: border-box; color: var(--gem-sys-= color--on-surface); height: var(--input-area-height,60px); outline: none; p= adding: calc(var(--input-area-height, 60px)/2 - 13px) 0; resize: none; grid= -area: input-area; } .initial-input-area-container textarea::-webkit-input-placeholder { color: = var(--bard-color-form-field-placeholder);
